content.content:
1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	"""
3	backtest_qt_v4.py — "Buffett Quality Compounder"
4	=================================================
5	Sửa hai weakness của QT v1:
6	  (i)  Entry chậm  → thêm GARP path (PEG ≤ 1 + growth ≥ 20%) song song với VALUE
7	  (ii) Hold ngắn   → bỏ TIME EXIT, bỏ TRAIL STOP, chấp nhận DD lớn miễn FA còn tốt
8	
9	Entry (OR):
10	  Path VALUE   : (PE_z<-1 OR PB_z<-1 OR DD52w<-30) AND (Close>MA200 OR DD52w>-20)
11	  Path GARP    : PEG∈(0,1] AND NP_YoY≥20% AND Rev_YoY≥20% AND PE<25 AND Close>MA200
12	Universe: ≥70% A+B (≥12Q lịch sử), latest A/B, liq ≥5B/day
13	
14	Exit (chỉ 3):
15	  FA_DEGRADE        : tier xuống C/D/E ở quý kế
16	  OVERVALUED_EXIT   : PE_z>+2.5 AND PB_z>+1.5
17	  GROWTH_BROKEN     : NP_YoY<-15% AND Rev_YoY<-15% trong 2 quý liên tiếp
18	  (KHÔNG trail-stop / hard-stop / time-exit / MA200 break / RSI)
19	
20	Position sizing:
21	  Max 8 vị thế, initial 10% NAV/pos
22	  Average-down: lỗ ≤-20% từ entry AND FA vẫn A/B AND PE_z giảm thêm → +5% NAV
23	                Tối đa 2 lần averaging → cap 20% NAV/pos
24	Blacklist 90 ngày sau FA_DEGRADE/GROWTH_BROKEN; 30 ngày sau OVERVALUED_EXIT
25	"""
26	import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
27	import os, subprocess, tempfile, sys, pickle
28	try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
29	except Exception: pass
30	from io import StringIO
31	import pandas as pd, numpy as np
32	
33	PROJECT = "[REDACTED]"
34	BQ = r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
35	INIT_NAV = 50e9
36	
37	def bq_query(sql):
38	    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".sql", delete=False, encoding="utf-8") as f:
39	        f.write(sql); tmp = f.name
40	    try:
41	        cmd = f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=10000000'
42	        r = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=1800, shell=True)
43	    finally:
44	        try: os.unlink(tmp)
45	        except: pass
46	    if r.returncode != 0: raise RuntimeError(r.stderr[:500])
47	    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))
48	
49	# ─── 1. Quality universe (giữ v1) ────────────────────────────────────────
50	print("[1] Building quality universe from FA history ...", flush=True)
51	fa = pd.read_csv("fa_ratings_lh.csv", parse_dates=["time","Release_Date"])
52	fa = fa.sort_values(["ticker","quarter"]).reset_index(drop=True)
53	
54	quality_at_q = {}
55	for tk, g in fa.groupby("ticker"):
56	    g = g.sort_values("quarter").reset_index(drop=True)
57	    for i, row in g.iterrows():
58	        if i < 12: continue
59	        history = g.iloc[:i+1]
60	        pct_ab = (history["tier"].isin(["A","B"])).sum() / len(history) * 100
61	        quality_at_q[(tk, row["quarter"])] = {
62	            "pct_AB": pct_ab,
63	            "latest_tier": row["tier"],
64	            "score": row["score"],
65	            "sub": row["sub"],
66	        }
67	print(f"  Quality lookup built: {len(quality_at_q):,} entries")
68	
69	print("\n[2] Loading TA panel cache ...", flush=True)
70	with open("qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl","rb") as f:
71	    panel = pickle.load(f)
72	panel["time"] = pd.to_datetime(panel["time"])
73	print(f"  Panel: {len(panel):,} rows")
74	
75	# Compute derived features
76	panel = panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)
77	panel["hi_52w"] = panel.groupby("ticker")["Close"].transform(lambda x: x.rolling(252, min_periods=60).max())
78	panel["dd_52w_pct"] = (panel["Close"]/panel["hi_52w"] - 1) * 100
79	panel["pe_z"] = ((panel["PE"]-panel["PE_MA5Y"])/panel["PE_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
80	panel["pb_z"] = ((panel["PB"]-panel["PB_MA5Y"])/panel["PB_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
81	panel["vs_MA200_pct"] = (panel["Close"]/panel["MA200"] - 1) * 100
82	
83	# ─── 3. Pull quarterly financial (PEG/NP_R/Revenue_YoY) ──────────────────
84	fin_cache = "qt_v4_fin.pkl"
85	if os.path.exists(fin_cache):
86	    with open(fin_cache,"rb") as f: fin = pickle.load(f)
87	    print(f"  Loaded financial cache: {len(fin):,} rows")
88	else:
89	    print("\n[3] Pulling quarterly financial fields ...", flush=True)
90	    fin = bq_query("""
91	    SELECT f.ticker, f.quarter, f.time AS q_time, f.Release_Date,
92	           f.PEG, f.NP_R, f.Revenue_YoY_P0, f.PE
93	    FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
94	    WHERE f.time >= '2010-01-01'
95	    """)
96	    fin["q_time"] = pd.to_datetime(fin["q_time"])
97	    fin["Release_Date"] = pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"])
98	    fin["eff_release"] = fin["Release_Date"].fillna(fin["q_time"] + pd.Timedelta(days=60))
99	    with open(fin_cache,"wb") as f: pickle.dump(fin, f)
100	    print(f"  Pulled + cached: {len(fin):,} rows")
101	
102	# Per-ticker financial timeline sorted by eff_release
103	fin_map = {}
104	for tk, g in fin.groupby("ticker"):
105	    fin_map[tk] = g.sort_values("eff_release").reset_index(drop=True)
106	
107	# FA release timeline (for tier lookup)
108	fa_release_map = {}
109	for tk, g in fa.groupby("ticker"):
110	    g = g.sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
111	    g["eff_release"] = g["Release_Date"].fillna(g["time"] + pd.Timedelta(days=60))
112	    fa_release_map[tk] = g[["eff_release","quarter","tier","score","sub"]].copy()
113	
114	def get_fa_at(tk, dt):
115	    if tk not in fa_release_map: return None
116	    g = fa_release_map[tk]
117	    av = g[g["eff_release"] <= dt]
118	    if len(av) == 0: return None
119	    last = av.iloc[-1]
120	    q = last["quarter"]
121	    qi = quality_at_q.get((tk, q))
122	    return qi  # contains pct_AB, latest_tier, sub
123	
124	def get_fin_at(tk, dt):
125	    """Returns dict with PEG, NP_R, Revenue_YoY_P0, prev_NP_R, prev_Rev_YoY."""
126	    if tk not in fin_map: return None
127	    g = fin_map[tk]
128	    av = g[g["eff_release"] <= dt]
129	    if len(av) == 0: return None
130	    last = av.iloc[-1]
131	    prev = av.iloc[-2] if len(av) >= 2 else None
132	    return {
133	        "PEG": last["PEG"],
134	        "NP_R": last["NP_R"],
135	        "Rev_YoY": last["Revenue_YoY_P0"],
136	        "PE": last["PE"],
137	        "prev_NP_R": prev["NP_R"] if prev is not None else np.nan,
138	        "prev_Rev_YoY": prev["Revenue_YoY_P0"] if prev is not None else np.nan,
139	    }
140	
141	# ─── 4. Pivots for daily lookup ──────────────────────────────────────────
142	print("\n[4] Setting up pivots ...", flush=True)
143	px_close = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="Close", aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
144	px_open  = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="Open",  aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
145	ma200    = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="MA200", aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
146	pe_z     = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="pe_z",  aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
147	pb_z     = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="pb_z",  aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
148	dd_52w   = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="dd_52w_pct", aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
149	vs_ma200 = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="vs_MA200_pct", aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
150	pe_daily = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="PE", aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
151	liq      = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="Volume_3M_P50", aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
152	
153	trading_days = sorted(panel["time"].unique())
154	
155	# ─── 5. Backtest ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
156	print("\n[5] Running QT v4 (Buffett spec) backtest ...", flush=True)
157	
158	MAX_POSITIONS    = 8
159	INIT_PCT         = 0.10
160	AVG_DOWN_PCT     = 0.05
161	MAX_POS_PCT      = 0.20
162	AVG_DOWN_TRIGGER = -20.0   # %
163	MAX_AVG_DOWN     = 2
164	LIQ_CAP_PCT      = 0.20
165	MAX_FILL_DAYS    = 5
166	SLIP_IN          = 0.001
167	SLIP_OUT         = 0.0015
168	TAX_SALE         = 0.001
169	DEPOSIT_RATE     = 0.01
170	BL_DAYS_FA       = 90
171	BL_DAYS_OVR      = 30
172	PE_Z_OVR         = 2.5
173	PB_Z_OVR         = 1.5
174	GROWTH_BAD_THR   = -15.0  # %
175	
176	start_dt = pd.Timestamp("2014-04-01")
177	end_dt   = pd.Timestamp("2026-05-13")
178	sim_days = [d for d in trading_days if start_dt <= d <= end_dt]
179	
180	cash = INIT_NAV
181	positions = {}      # tk → {entry_dt, entry_px, shares, entry_pe_z, n_avg_down, total_cost}
182	blacklist = {}
183	nav_history = []
184	trades = []
185	daily_rate = (1+DEPOSIT_RATE)**(1/365.25) - 1
186	
187	pending_buys  = []  # {ticker, type: NEW|AVGDN, signal_dt}
188	pending_sells = []
189	
190	vni = bq_query("""SELECT t.time, t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time >= '2014-01-01' AND t.Close > 100 ORDER BY t.time""")
191	vni["time"] = pd.to_datetime(vni["time"])
192	vni_px = vni.set_index("time")["Close"]
193	
194	print(f"  Sim window: {start_dt.date()} → {end_dt.date()} ({len(sim_days)} days)", flush=True)
195	
196	for i, dt in enumerate(sim_days):
197	    if i % 500 == 0:
198	        mtm = sum(p["shares"] * px_close.at[dt, tk] for tk,p in positions.items()
199	                  if tk in px_close.columns and pd.notna(px_close.at[dt, tk]))
200	        nav = cash + mtm
201	        print(f"  Day {i}/{len(sim_days)} ({dt.date()}): NAV={nav/1e9:.2f}B pos={len(positions)} cash={cash/1e9:.1f}B", flush=True)
202	    cash *= (1 + daily_rate)
203	
204	    # T+1 Sells
205	    nps = []
206	    for s in pending_sells:
207	        tk = s["ticker"]
208	        if tk not in positions: continue
209	        if tk not in px_open.columns: continue
210	        fpx = px_open.at[dt, tk]
211	        if pd.isna(fpx) or fpx <= 0: nps.append(s); continue
212	        pos = positions[tk]
213	        gross = pos["shares"] * fpx * (1 - SLIP_OUT)
214	        net = gross * (1 - TAX_SALE)
215	        cash += net
216	        avg_entry = pos["total_cost"]/pos["shares"] if pos["shares"]>0 else pos["entry_px"]
217	        trades.append({"dt":dt,"ticker":tk,"side":s["reason"],"shares":pos["shares"],
218	                       "px":fpx,"net":net,"entry_dt":pos["entry_dt"],"entry_px":avg_entry,
219	                       "ret_pct":(fpx/avg_entry-1)*100,"hold_days":(dt-pos["entry_dt"]).days,
220	                       "n_avg_down":pos["n_avg_down"]})
221	        bl_days = BL_DAYS_OVR if s["reason"]=="OVERVALUED" else BL_DAYS_FA
222	        blacklist[tk] = dt + pd.Timedelta(days=bl_days)
223	        del positions[tk]
224	    pending_sells = nps
225	
226	    # T+1 Buys (new + avg down)
227	    npb = []
228	    for b in pending_buys:
229	        tk = b["ticker"]; btype = b["type"]
230	        if tk not in px_open.columns: continue
231	        fpx = px_open.at[dt, tk]
232	        if pd.isna(fpx) or fpx <= 0: npb.append(b); continue
233	
234	        mtm = sum(p["shares"]*px_close.at[dt,t_] for t_,p in positions.items()
235	                  if t_ in px_close.columns and pd.notna(px_close.at[dt,t_]))
236	        nav_now = cash + mtm
237	
238	        if btype == "NEW":
239	            if tk in positions: continue
240	            if len(positions) >= MAX_POSITIONS: continue
241	            if tk in blacklist and blacklist[tk] > dt: continue
242	            target = nav_now * INIT_PCT
243	        else:  # AVGDN
244	            if tk not in positions: continue
245	            pos = positions[tk]
246	            if pos["n_avg_down"] >= MAX_AVG_DOWN: continue
247	            cur_value = pos["shares"] * px_close.at[dt, tk] if pd.notna(px_close.at[dt, tk]) else 0
248	            if cur_value/nav_now >= MAX_POS_PCT: continue
249	            target = nav_now * AVG_DOWN_PCT
250	            target = min(target, nav_now*MAX_POS_PCT - cur_value)
251	            if target <= 0: continue
252	
253	        adv = liq.at[dt, tk] if tk in liq.columns else 0
254	        if pd.isna(adv) or adv <= 0: adv = 1e6
255	        cap = LIQ_CAP_PCT * adv * MAX_FILL_DAYS * fpx
256	        alloc = min(target, cap)
257	        if alloc < 1e6: continue
258	
259	        eff_px = fpx * (1 + SLIP_IN)
260	        shares = alloc / eff_px
261	        cost = shares * eff_px
262	        if cost > cash: continue
263	        cash -= cost
264	
265	        if btype == "NEW":
266	            positions[tk] = {"entry_dt":dt, "entry_px":fpx, "shares":shares,
267	                              "entry_pe_z": pe_z.at[dt,tk] if tk in pe_z.columns else np.nan,
268	                              "n_avg_down":0, "total_cost":cost}
269	            trades.append({"dt":dt,"ticker":tk,"side":"BUY","shares":shares,"px":fpx,
270	                            "net":-cost,"entry_dt":dt,"entry_px":fpx,"ret_pct":0,
271	                            "hold_days":0,"n_avg_down":0})
272	        else:
273	            pos = positions[tk]
274	            pos["shares"] += shares
275	            pos["total_cost"] += cost
276	            pos["n_avg_down"] += 1
277	            trades.append({"dt":dt,"ticker":tk,"side":f"AVGDN_{pos['n_avg_down']}",
278	                            "shares":shares,"px":fpx,"net":-cost,
279	                            "entry_dt":pos["entry_dt"],"entry_px":pos["total_cost"]/pos["shares"],
280	                            "ret_pct":0,"hold_days":(dt-pos["entry_dt"]).days,
281	                            "n_avg_down":pos["n_avg_down"]})
282	    pending_buys = []
283	
284	    # Check exits + avg-down triggers
285	    for tk, pos in list(positions.items()):
286	        if tk not in px_close.columns: continue
287	        p_today = px_close.at[dt, tk]
288	        if pd.isna(p_today): continue
289	
290	        exit_reason = None
291	        fa_info  = get_fa_at(tk, dt)
292	        fin_info = get_fin_at(tk, dt)
293	
294	        # FA degrade
295	        if fa_info is not None and fa_info["latest_tier"] in ("C","D","E"):
296	            exit_reason = "FA_DEGRADE"
297	        # Overvalued
298	        if exit_reason is None:
299	            pez = pe_z.at[dt, tk] if tk in pe_z.columns else np.nan
300	            pbz = pb_z.at[dt, tk] if tk in pb_z.columns else np.nan
301	            if pd.notna(pez) and pd.notna(pbz) and pez > PE_Z_OVR and pbz > PB_Z_OVR:
302	                exit_reason = "OVERVALUED"
303	        # Growth broken (2 quý liên tiếp âm sâu)
304	        if exit_reason is None and fin_info is not None:
305	            if (pd.notna(fin_info["NP_R"]) and pd.notna(fin_info["Rev_YoY"])
306	                and pd.notna(fin_info["prev_NP_R"]) and pd.notna(fin_info["prev_Rev_YoY"])
307	                and fin_info["NP_R"]*100 < GROWTH_BAD_THR and fin_info["Rev_YoY"]*100 < GROWTH_BAD_THR
308	                and fin_info["prev_NP_R"]*100 < GROWTH_BAD_THR and fin_info["prev_Rev_YoY"]*100 < GROWTH_BAD_THR):
309	                exit_reason = "GROWTH_BROKEN"
310	
311	        if exit_reason:
312	            pending_sells.append({"ticker":tk,"reason":exit_reason})
313	            continue
314	
315	        # Avg-down trigger
316	        if pos["n_avg_down"] < MAX_AVG_DOWN:
317	            avg_entry = pos["total_cost"]/pos["shares"]
318	            ret_pct = (p_today/avg_entry - 1)*100
319	            if ret_pct <= AVG_DOWN_TRIGGER:
320	                pez_now = pe_z.at[dt, tk] if tk in pe_z.columns else np.nan
321	                if (fa_info is not None and fa_info["latest_tier"] in ("A","B")
322	                    and pd.notna(pez_now) and pd.notna(pos["entry_pe_z"])
323	                    and pez_now < pos["entry_pe_z"] - 0.3):  # giảm ≥ 0.3 std
324	                    # đẩy pending avg-down (chỉ 1 lần/ngày)
325	                    if not any(b["ticker"]==tk for b in pending_buys):
326	                        pending_buys.append({"ticker":tk,"type":"AVGDN","signal_dt":dt})
327	
328	    # Scan for NEW entries (only if room)
329	    if len(positions) + sum(1 for b in pending_buys if b["type"]=="NEW") < MAX_POSITIONS:
330	        slots_left = MAX_POSITIONS - len(positions) - sum(1 for b in pending_buys if b["type"]=="NEW")
331	        # Score candidates per day and take top N
332	        candidates = []
333	        for tk in px_close.columns:
334	            if tk in positions: continue
335	            if tk in blacklist and blacklist[tk] > dt: continue
336	            if any(b["ticker"]==tk for b in pending_buys): continue
337	
338	            fa_info = get_fa_at(tk, dt)
339	            if fa_info is None: continue
340	            if fa_info["pct_AB"] < 70: continue
341	            if fa_info["latest_tier"] not in ("A","B"): continue
342	
343	            adv_vnd = liq.at[dt, tk] if tk in liq.columns else 0
344	            p = px_close.at[dt, tk]
345	            if pd.isna(p) or pd.isna(adv_vnd) or adv_vnd*p < 5e9: continue
346	
347	            pez = pe_z.at[dt, tk] if tk in pe_z.columns else np.nan
348	            pbz = pb_z.at[dt, tk] if tk in pb_z.columns else np.nan
349	            ddv = dd_52w.at[dt, tk] if tk in dd_52w.columns else np.nan
350	            vs200 = vs_ma200.at[dt, tk] if tk in vs_ma200.columns else np.nan
351	            pe_now = pe_daily.at[dt, tk] if tk in pe_daily.columns else np.nan
352	
353	            # Path VALUE
354	            v_under = ((pd.notna(pez) and pez < -1.0)
355	                       or (pd.notna(pbz) and pbz < -1.0)
356	                       or (pd.notna(ddv) and ddv < -30))
357	            v_not_falling_knife = (pd.notna(vs200) and vs200 > 0) or (pd.notna(ddv) and ddv > -20)
358	            value_pass = v_under and v_not_falling_knife
359	
360	            # Path GARP
361	            fin_info = get_fin_at(tk, dt)
362	            garp_pass = False
363	            if fin_info is not None:
364	                peg = fin_info["PEG"]; npyoy = fin_info["NP_R"]; revyoy = fin_info["Rev_YoY"]
365	                if (pd.notna(peg) and 0 < peg <= 1.0
366	                    and pd.notna(npyoy) and npyoy >= 0.20
367	                    and pd.notna(revyoy) and revyoy >= 0.20
368	                    and pd.notna(pe_now) and pe_now < 25
369	                    and pd.notna(vs200) and vs200 > 0):
370	                    garp_pass = True
371	
372	            if not (value_pass or garp_pass): continue
373	
374	            # Score: prefer lower PE_z + higher fa score
375	            score = -(pez if pd.notna(pez) else 0) * 2 + fa_info["score"]/10
376	            if garp_pass: score += 2
377	            candidates.append((tk, score, "VALUE" if value_pass else "GARP"))
378	
379	        candidates.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
380	        for tk, sc, path in candidates[:slots_left]:
381	            pending_buys.append({"ticker":tk,"type":"NEW","signal_dt":dt,"path":path})
382	
383	    # NAV
384	    mtm = sum(p["shares"]*px_close.at[dt, tk] for tk,p in positions.items()
385	              if tk in px_close.columns and pd.notna(px_close.at[dt, tk]))
386	    nav = cash + mtm
387	    nav_history.append({"date":dt,"nav":nav,"cash":cash,"equity":mtm,"n_pos":len(positions)})
388	
389	nav_df = pd.DataFrame(nav_history).set_index("date")
390	trades_df = pd.DataFrame(trades)
391	print(f"\n  Sim complete: {len(trades_df)} trades, final NAV={nav_df['nav'].iloc[-1]/1e9:.2f}B")
392	
393	# ─── 6. Metrics ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
394	def metrics(nav, start, end):
395	    s = nav[(nav.index>=start) & (nav.index<=end)]
396	    if len(s) < 30: return None
397	    yrs = (s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
398	    cagr = (s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs) - 1
399	    rets = s.pct_change().dropna()
400	    spy = len(rets)/yrs
401	    sh = rets.mean()/rets.std()*np.sqrt(spy) if rets.std()>0 else 0
402	    dd = (s - s.cummax())/s.cummax()
403	    mdd = dd.min()
404	    calmar = cagr/abs(mdd) if mdd<0 else 0
405	    return {"CAGR":cagr*100,"Sharpe":sh,"MaxDD":mdd*100,"Calmar":calmar}
406	
407	vni_aligned = vni_px.reindex(nav_df.index).ffill()
408	periods = [
409	    ("FULL_12y",  pd.Timestamp("2014-04-01"), pd.Timestamp("2026-05-13")),
410	    ("PRE_2024",  pd.Timestamp("2014-04-01"), pd.Timestamp("2023-12-31")),
411	    ("OOS_2024+", pd.Timestamp("2024-01-01"), pd.Timestamp("2026-05-13")),
412	    ("Y2022",     pd.Timestamp("2022-01-01"), pd.Timestamp("2022-12-31")),
413	    ("Q1_2026",   pd.Timestamp("2025-12-30"), pd.Timestamp("2026-03-30")),
414	]
415	print("\n" + "="*100)
416	print(f"  {'Period':<14}{'CAGR':>10}{'Sharpe':>10}{'MaxDD':>10}{'Calmar':>10}{'VNI':>10}{'alpha':>10}")
417	for nm, ps, pe in periods:
418	    m = metrics(nav_df["nav"], ps, pe); vm = metrics(vni_aligned, ps, pe)
419	    if m is None or vm is None: continue
420	    a = m["CAGR"] - vm["CAGR"]
421	    print(f"  {nm:<14}{m['CAGR']:>+9.2f}%{m['Sharpe']:>+10.2f}{m['MaxDD']:>+9.2f}%{m['Calmar']:>+10.2f}{vm['CAGR']:>+9.2f}%{a:>+9.2f}pp")
422	
423	if len(trades_df) > 0:
424	    exits = trades_df[~trades_df["side"].isin(["BUY","AVGDN_1","AVGDN_2"])]
425	    print(f"\n  --- Trade summary ---")
426	    print(f"  Total events: {len(trades_df)}  | Buys: {(trades_df['side']=='BUY').sum()}  | Avg-downs: {(trades_df['side'].str.startswith('AVGDN')).sum()}  | Exits: {len(exits)}")
427	    if len(exits) > 0:
428	        for rs, g in exits.groupby("side"):
429	            print(f"    {rs:<14}: N={len(g):3d}, avg_ret={g['ret_pct'].mean():+6.1f}%, median_hold={g['hold_days'].median():.0f}d, WR={(g['ret_pct']>0).mean()*100:.1f}%")
430	        print(f"  Avg hold (exits): {exits['hold_days'].mean():.0f}d | Avg return: {exits['ret_pct'].mean():+.2f}%")
431	        print(f"  Win rate: {(exits['ret_pct']>0).mean()*100:.1f}%")
432	        if len(exits) > 0:
433	            print(f"  Best: {exits['ret_pct'].max():+.1f}% ({exits.loc[exits['ret_pct'].idxmax(),'ticker']})")
434	            print(f"  Worst: {exits['ret_pct'].min():+.1f}% ({exits.loc[exits['ret_pct'].idxmin(),'ticker']})")
435	        per_tk = exits.groupby("ticker").agg(n=("ticker","size"),avg_ret=("ret_pct","mean"),
436	                                              total_ret=("ret_pct","sum"),avg_hold=("hold_days","mean"))
437	        per_tk = per_tk.sort_values("total_ret", ascending=False)
438	        print(f"\n  Top 15 by cum return:")
439	        for tk, r in per_tk.head(15).iterrows():
440	            print(f"    {tk:<7} N={int(r['n']):2d}  avg={r['avg_ret']:+6.1f}%  cum={r['total_ret']:+7.1f}%  hold={r['avg_hold']:.0f}d")
441	
442	nav_df.to_csv("qt_v4_nav.csv")
443	trades_df.to_csv("qt_v4_trades.csv", index=False)
444	print("\nSaved: qt_v4_nav.csv, qt_v4_trades.csv")
445

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
backtest_qt_v4.py — "Buffett Quality Compounder"
=================================================
Sửa hai weakness của QT v1:
  (i)  Entry chậm  → thêm GARP path (PEG ≤ 1 + growth ≥ 20%) song song với VALUE
  (ii) Hold ngắn   → bỏ TIME EXIT, bỏ TRAIL STOP, chấp nhận DD lớn miễn FA còn tốt

Entry (OR):
  Path VALUE   : (PE_z<-1 OR PB_z<-1 OR DD52w<-30) AND (Close>MA200 OR DD52w>-20)
  Path GARP    : PEG∈(0,1] AND NP_YoY≥20% AND Rev_YoY≥20% AND PE<25 AND Close>MA200
Universe: ≥70% A+B (≥12Q lịch sử), latest A/B, liq ≥5B/day

Exit (chỉ 3):
  FA_DEGRADE        : tier xuống C/D/E ở quý kế
  OVERVALUED_EXIT   : PE_z>+2.5 AND PB_z>+1.5
  GROWTH_BROKEN     : NP_YoY<-15% AND Rev_YoY<-15% trong 2 quý liên tiếp
  (KHÔNG trail-stop / hard-stop / time-exit / MA200 break / RSI)

Position sizing:
  Max 8 vị thế, initial 10% NAV/pos
  Average-down: lỗ ≤-20% từ entry AND FA vẫn A/B AND PE_z giảm thêm → +5% NAV
                Tối đa 2 lần averaging → cap 20% NAV/pos
Blacklist 90 ngày sau FA_DEGRADE/GROWTH_BROKEN; 30 ngày sau OVERVALUED_EXIT
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import os, subprocess, tempfile, sys, pickle
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
from io import StringIO
import pandas as pd, numpy as np

PROJECT = "[REDACTED]"
BQ = r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
INIT_NAV = 50e9

def bq_query(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".sql", delete=False, encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); tmp = f.name
    try:
        cmd = f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=10000000'
        r = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=1800, shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    if r.returncode != 0: raise RuntimeError(r.stderr[:500])
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

# ─── 1. Quality universe (giữ v1) ────────────────────────────────────────
print("[1] Building quality universe from FA history ...", flush=True)
fa = pd.read_csv("fa_ratings_lh.csv", parse_dates=["time","Release_Date"])
fa = fa.sort_values(["ticker","quarter"]).reset_index(drop=True)

quality_at_q = {}
for tk, g in fa.groupby("ticker"):
    g = g.sort_values("quarter").reset_index(drop=True)
    for i, row in g.iterrows():
        if i < 12: continue
        history = g.iloc[:i+1]
        pct_ab = (history["tier"].isin(["A","B"])).sum() / len(history) * 100
        quality_at_q[(tk, row["quarter"])] = {
            "pct_AB": pct_ab,
            "latest_tier": row["tier"],
            "score": row["score"],
            "sub": row["sub"],
        }
print(f"  Quality lookup built: {len(quality_at_q):,} entries")

print("\n[2] Loading TA panel cache ...", flush=True)
with open("qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl","rb") as f:
    panel = pickle.load(f)
panel["time"] = pd.to_datetime(panel["time"])
print(f"  Panel: {len(panel):,} rows")

# Compute derived features
panel = panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)
panel["hi_52w"] = panel.groupby("ticker")["Close"].transform(lambda x: x.rolling(252, min_periods=60).max())
panel["dd_52w_pct"] = (panel["Close"]/panel["hi_52w"] - 1) * 100
panel["pe_z"] = ((panel["PE"]-panel["PE_MA5Y"])/panel["PE_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
panel["pb_z"] = ((panel["PB"]-panel["PB_MA5Y"])/panel["PB_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
panel["vs_MA200_pct"] = (panel["Close"]/panel["MA200"] - 1) * 100

# ─── 3. Pull quarterly financial (PEG/NP_R/Revenue_YoY) ──────────────────
fin_cache = "qt_v4_fin.pkl"
if os.path.exists(fin_cache):
    with open(fin_cache,"rb") as f: fin = pickle.load(f)
    print(f"  Loaded financial cache: {len(fin):,} rows")
else:
    print("\n[3] Pulling quarterly financial fields ...", flush=True)
    fin = bq_query("""
    SELECT f.ticker, f.quarter, f.time AS q_time, f.Release_Date,
           f.PEG, f.NP_R, f.Revenue_YoY_P0, f.PE
    FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
    WHERE f.time >= '2010-01-01'
    """)
    fin["q_time"] = pd.to_datetime(fin["q_time"])
    fin["Release_Date"] = pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"])
    fin["eff_release"] = fin["Release_Date"].fillna(fin["q_time"] + pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    with open(fin_cache,"wb") as f: pickle.dump(fin, f)
    print(f"  Pulled + cached: {len(fin):,} rows")

# Per-ticker financial timeline sorted by eff_release
fin_map = {}
for tk, g in fin.groupby("ticker"):
    fin_map[tk] = g.sort_values("eff_release").reset_index(drop=True)

# FA release timeline (for tier lookup)
fa_release_map = {}
for tk, g in fa.groupby("ticker"):
    g = g.sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
    g["eff_release"] = g["Release_Date"].fillna(g["time"] + pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fa_release_map[tk] = g[["eff_release","quarter","tier","score","sub"]].copy()

def get_fa_at(tk, dt):
    if tk not in fa_release_map: return None
    g = fa_release_map[tk]
    av = g[g["eff_release"] <= dt]
    if len(av) == 0: return None
    last = av.iloc[-1]
    q = last["quarter"]
    qi = quality_at_q.get((tk, q))
    return qi  # contains pct_AB, latest_tier, sub

def get_fin_at(tk, dt):
    """Returns dict with PEG, NP_R, Revenue_YoY_P0, prev_NP_R, prev_Rev_YoY."""
    if tk not in fin_map: return None
    g = fin_map[tk]
    av = g[g["eff_release"] <= dt]
    if len(av) == 0: return None
    last = av.iloc[-1]
    prev = av.iloc[-2] if len(av) >= 2 else None
    return {
        "PEG": last["PEG"],
        "NP_R": last["NP_R"],
        "Rev_YoY": last["Revenue_YoY_P0"],
        "PE": last["PE"],
        "prev_NP_R": prev["NP_R"] if prev is not None else np.nan,
        "prev_Rev_YoY": prev["Revenue_YoY_P0"] if prev is not None else np.nan,
    }

# ─── 4. Pivots for daily lookup ──────────────────────────────────────────
print("\n[4] Setting up pivots ...", flush=True)
px_close = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="Close", aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
px_open  = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="Open",  aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
ma200    = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="MA200", aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
pe_z     = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="pe_z",  aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
pb_z     = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="pb_z",  aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
dd_52w   = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="dd_52w_pct", aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
vs_ma200 = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="vs_MA200_pct", aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
pe_daily = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="PE", aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
liq      = panel.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="Volume_3M_P50", aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()

trading_days = sorted(panel["time"].unique())

# ─── 5. Backtest ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print("\n[5] Running QT v4 (Buffett spec) backtest ...", flush=True)

MAX_POSITIONS    = 8
INIT_PCT         = 0.10
AVG_DOWN_PCT     = 0.05
MAX_POS_PCT      = 0.20
AVG_DOWN_TRIGGER = -20.0   # %
MAX_AVG_DOWN     = 2
LIQ_CAP_PCT      = 0.20
MAX_FILL_DAYS    = 5
SLIP_IN          = 0.001
SLIP_OUT         = 0.0015
TAX_SALE         = 0.001
DEPOSIT_RATE     = 0.01
BL_DAYS_FA       = 90
BL_DAYS_OVR      = 30
PE_Z_OVR         = 2.5
PB_Z_OVR         = 1.5
GROWTH_BAD_THR   = -15.0  # %

start_dt = pd.Timestamp("2014-04-01")
end_dt   = pd.Timestamp("2026-05-13")
sim_days = [d for d in trading_days if start_dt <= d <= end_dt]

cash = INIT_NAV
positions = {}      # tk → {entry_dt, entry_px, shares, entry_pe_z, n_avg_down, total_cost}
blacklist = {}
nav_history = []
trades = []
daily_rate = (1+DEPOSIT_RATE)**(1/365.25) - 1

pending_buys  = []  # {ticker, type: NEW|AVGDN, signal_dt}
pending_sells = []

vni = bq_query("""SELECT t.time, t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time >= '2014-01-01' AND t.Close > 100 ORDER BY t.time""")
vni["time"] = pd.to_datetime(vni["time"])
vni_px = vni.set_index("time")["Close"]

print(f"  Sim window: {start_dt.date()} → {end_dt.date()} ({len(sim_days)} days)", flush=True)

for i, dt in enumerate(sim_days):
    if i % 500 == 0:
        mtm = sum(p["shares"] * px_close.at[dt, tk] for tk,p in positions.items()
                  if tk in px_close.columns and pd.notna(px_close.at[dt, tk]))
        nav = cash + mtm
        print(f"  Day {i}/{len(sim_days)} ({dt.date()}): NAV={nav/1e9:.2f}B pos={len(positions)} cash={cash/1e9:.1f}B", flush=True)
    cash *= (1 + daily_rate)

    # T+1 Sells
    nps = []
    for s in pending_sells:
        tk = s["ticker"]
        if tk not in positions: continue
        if tk not in px_open.columns: continue
        fpx = px_open.at[dt, tk]
        if pd.isna(fpx) or fpx <= 0: nps.append(s); continue
        pos = positions[tk]
        gross = pos["shares"] * fpx * (1 - SLIP_OUT)
        net = gross * (1 - TAX_SALE)
        cash += net
        avg_entry = pos["total_cost"]/pos["shares"] if pos["shares"]>0 else pos["entry_px"]
        trades.append({"dt":dt,"ticker":tk,"side":s["reason"],"shares":pos["shares"],
                       "px":fpx,"net":net,"entry_dt":pos["entry_dt"],"entry_px":avg_entry,
                       "ret_pct":(fpx/avg_entry-1)*100,"hold_days":(dt-pos["entry_dt"]).days,
                       "n_avg_down":pos["n_avg_down"]})
        bl_days = BL_DAYS_OVR if s["reason"]=="OVERVALUED" else BL_DAYS_FA
        blacklist[tk] = dt + pd.Timedelta(days=bl_days)
        del positions[tk]
    pending_sells = nps

    # T+1 Buys (new + avg down)
    npb = []
    for b in pending_buys:
        tk = b["ticker"]; btype = b["type"]
        if tk not in px_open.columns: continue
        fpx = px_open.at[dt, tk]
        if pd.isna(fpx) or fpx <= 0: npb.append(b); continue

        mtm = sum(p["shares"]*px_close.at[dt,t_] for t_,p in positions.items()
                  if t_ in px_close.columns and pd.notna(px_close.at[dt,t_]))
        nav_now = cash + mtm

        if btype == "NEW":
            if tk in positions: continue
            if len(positions) >= MAX_POSITIONS: continue
            if tk in blacklist and blacklist[tk] > dt: continue
            target = nav_now * INIT_PCT
        else:  # AVGDN
            if tk not in positions: continue
            pos = positions[tk]
            if pos["n_avg_down"] >= MAX_AVG_DOWN: continue
            cur_value = pos["shares"] * px_close.at[dt, tk] if pd.notna(px_close.at[dt, tk]) else 0
            if cur_value/nav_now >= MAX_POS_PCT: continue
            target = nav_now * AVG_DOWN_PCT
            target = min(target, nav_now*MAX_POS_PCT - cur_value)
            if target <= 0: continue

        adv = liq.at[dt, tk] if tk in liq.columns else 0
        if pd.isna(adv) or adv <= 0: adv = 1e6
        cap = LIQ_CAP_PCT * adv * MAX_FILL_DAYS * fpx
        alloc = min(target, cap)
        if alloc < 1e6: continue

        eff_px = fpx * (1 + SLIP_IN)
        shares = alloc / eff_px
        cost = shares * eff_px
        if cost > cash: continue
        cash -= cost

        if btype == "NEW":
            positions[tk] = {"entry_dt":dt, "entry_px":fpx, "shares":shares,
                              "entry_pe_z": pe_z.at[dt,tk] if tk in pe_z.columns else np.nan,
                              "n_avg_down":0, "total_cost":cost}
            trades.append({"dt":dt,"ticker":tk,"side":"BUY","shares":shares,"px":fpx,
                            "net":-cost,"entry_dt":dt,"entry_px":fpx,"ret_pct":0,
                            "hold_days":0,"n_avg_down":0})
        else:
            pos = positions[tk]
            pos["shares"] += shares
            pos["total_cost"] += cost
            pos["n_avg_down"] += 1
            trades.append({"dt":dt,"ticker":tk,"side":f"AVGDN_{pos['n_avg_down']}",
                            "shares":shares,"px":fpx,"net":-cost,
                            "entry_dt":pos["entry_dt"],"entry_px":pos["total_cost"]/pos["shares"],
                            "ret_pct":0,"hold_days":(dt-pos["entry_dt"]).days,
                            "n_avg_down":pos["n_avg_down"]})
    pending_buys = []

    # Check exits + avg-down triggers
    for tk, pos in list(positions.items()):
        if tk not in px_close.columns: continue
        p_today = px_close.at[dt, tk]
        if pd.isna(p_today): continue

        exit_reason = None
        fa_info  = get_fa_at(tk, dt)
        fin_info = get_fin_at(tk, dt)

        # FA degrade
        if fa_info is not None and fa_info["latest_tier"] in ("C","D","E"):
            exit_reason = "FA_DEGRADE"
        # Overvalued
        if exit_reason is None:
            pez = pe_z.at[dt, tk] if tk in pe_z.columns else np.nan
            pbz = pb_z.at[dt, tk] if tk in pb_z.columns else np.nan
            if pd.notna(pez) and pd.notna(pbz) and pez > PE_Z_OVR and pbz > PB_Z_OVR:
                exit_reason = "OVERVALUED"
        # Growth broken (2 quý liên tiếp âm sâu)
        if exit_reason is None and fin_info is not None:
            if (pd.notna(fin_info["NP_R"]) and pd.notna(fin_info["Rev_YoY"])
                and pd.notna(fin_info["prev_NP_R"]) and pd.notna(fin_info["prev_Rev_YoY"])
                and fin_info["NP_R"]*100 < GROWTH_BAD_THR and fin_info["Rev_YoY"]*100 < GROWTH_BAD_THR
                and fin_info["prev_NP_R"]*100 < GROWTH_BAD_THR and fin_info["prev_Rev_YoY"]*100 < GROWTH_BAD_THR):
                exit_reason = "GROWTH_BROKEN"

        if exit_reason:
            pending_sells.append({"ticker":tk,"reason":exit_reason})
            continue

        # Avg-down trigger
        if pos["n_avg_down"] < MAX_AVG_DOWN:
            avg_entry = pos["total_cost"]/pos["shares"]
            ret_pct = (p_today/avg_entry - 1)*100
            if ret_pct <= AVG_DOWN_TRIGGER:
                pez_now = pe_z.at[dt, tk] if tk in pe_z.columns else np.nan
                if (fa_info is not None and fa_info["latest_tier"] in ("A","B")
                    and pd.notna(pez_now) and pd.notna(pos["entry_pe_z"])
                    and pez_now < pos["entry_pe_z"] - 0.3):  # giảm ≥ 0.3 std
                    # đẩy pending avg-down (chỉ 1 lần/ngày)
                    if not any(b["ticker"]==tk for b in pending_buys):
                        pending_buys.append({"ticker":tk,"type":"AVGDN","signal_dt":dt})

    # Scan for NEW entries (only if room)
    if len(positions) + sum(1 for b in pending_buys if b["type"]=="NEW") < MAX_POSITIONS:
        slots_left = MAX_POSITIONS - len(positions) - sum(1 for b in pending_buys if b["type"]=="NEW")
        # Score candidates per day and take top N
        candidates = []
        for tk in px_close.columns:
            if tk in positions: continue
            if tk in blacklist and blacklist[tk] > dt: continue
            if any(b["ticker"]==tk for b in pending_buys): continue

            fa_info = get_fa_at(tk, dt)
            if fa_info is None: continue
            if fa_info["pct_AB"] < 70: continue
            if fa_info["latest_tier"] not in ("A","B"): continue

            adv_vnd = liq.at[dt, tk] if tk in liq.columns else 0
            p = px_close.at[dt, tk]
            if pd.isna(p) or pd.isna(adv_vnd) or adv_vnd*p < 5e9: continue

            pez = pe_z.at[dt, tk] if tk in pe_z.columns else np.nan
            pbz = pb_z.at[dt, tk] if tk in pb_z.columns else np.nan
            ddv = dd_52w.at[dt, tk] if tk in dd_52w.columns else np.nan
            vs200 = vs_ma200.at[dt, tk] if tk in vs_ma200.columns else np.nan
            pe_now = pe_daily.at[dt, tk] if tk in pe_daily.columns else np.nan

            # Path VALUE
            v_under = ((pd.notna(pez) and pez < -1.0)
                       or (pd.notna(pbz) and pbz < -1.0)
                       or (pd.notna(ddv) and ddv < -30))
            v_not_falling_knife = (pd.notna(vs200) and vs200 > 0) or (pd.notna(ddv) and ddv > -20)
            value_pass = v_under and v_not_falling_knife

            # Path GARP
            fin_info = get_fin_at(tk, dt)
            garp_pass = False
            if fin_info is not None:
                peg = fin_info["PEG"]; npyoy = fin_info["NP_R"]; revyoy = fin_info["Rev_YoY"]
                if (pd.notna(peg) and 0 < peg <= 1.0
                    and pd.notna(npyoy) and npyoy >= 0.20
                    and pd.notna(revyoy) and revyoy >= 0.20
                    and pd.notna(pe_now) and pe_now < 25
                    and pd.notna(vs200) and vs200 > 0):
                    garp_pass = True

            if not (value_pass or garp_pass): continue

            # Score: prefer lower PE_z + higher fa score
            score = -(pez if pd.notna(pez) else 0) * 2 + fa_info["score"]/10
            if garp_pass: score += 2
            candidates.append((tk, score, "VALUE" if value_pass else "GARP"))

        candidates.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
        for tk, sc, path in candidates[:slots_left]:
            pending_buys.append({"ticker":tk,"type":"NEW","signal_dt":dt,"path":path})

    # NAV
    mtm = sum(p["shares"]*px_close.at[dt, tk] for tk,p in positions.items()
              if tk in px_close.columns and pd.notna(px_close.at[dt, tk]))
    nav = cash + mtm
    nav_history.append({"date":dt,"nav":nav,"cash":cash,"equity":mtm,"n_pos":len(positions)})

nav_df = pd.DataFrame(nav_history).set_index("date")
trades_df = pd.DataFrame(trades)
print(f"\n  Sim complete: {len(trades_df)} trades, final NAV={nav_df['nav'].iloc[-1]/1e9:.2f}B")

# ─── 6. Metrics ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def metrics(nav, start, end):
    s = nav[(nav.index>=start) & (nav.index<=end)]
    if len(s) < 30: return None
    yrs = (s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr = (s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs) - 1
    rets = s.pct_change().dropna()
    spy = len(rets)/yrs
    sh = rets.mean()/rets.std()*np.sqrt(spy) if rets.std()>0 else 0
    dd = (s - s.cummax())/s.cummax()
    mdd = dd.min()
    calmar = cagr/abs(mdd) if mdd<0 else 0
    return {"CAGR":cagr*100,"Sharpe":sh,"MaxDD":mdd*100,"Calmar":calmar}

vni_aligned = vni_px.reindex(nav_df.index).ffill()
periods = [
    ("FULL_12y",  pd.Timestamp("2014-04-01"), pd.Timestamp("2026-05-13")),
    ("PRE_2024",  pd.Timestamp("2014-04-01"), pd.Timestamp("2023-12-31")),
    ("OOS_2024+", pd.Timestamp("2024-01-01"), pd.Timestamp("2026-05-13")),
    ("Y2022",     pd.Timestamp("2022-01-01"), pd.Timestamp("2022-12-31")),
    ("Q1_2026",   pd.Timestamp("2025-12-30"), pd.Timestamp("2026-03-30")),
]
print("\n" + "="*100)
print(f"  {'Period':<14}{'CAGR':>10}{'Sharpe':>10}{'MaxDD':>10}{'Calmar':>10}{'VNI':>10}{'alpha':>10}")
for nm, ps, pe in periods:
    m = metrics(nav_df["nav"], ps, pe); vm = metrics(vni_aligned, ps, pe)
    if m is None or vm is None: continue
    a = m["CAGR"] - vm["CAGR"]
    print(f"  {nm:<14}{m['CAGR']:>+9.2f}%{m['Sharpe']:>+10.2f}{m['MaxDD']:>+9.2f}%{m['Calmar']:>+10.2f}{vm['CAGR']:>+9.2f}%{a:>+9.2f}pp")

if len(trades_df) > 0:
    exits = trades_df[~trades_df["side"].isin(["BUY","AVGDN_1","AVGDN_2"])]
    print(f"\n  --- Trade summary ---")
    print(f"  Total events: {len(trades_df)}  | Buys: {(trades_df['side']=='BUY').sum()}  | Avg-downs: {(trades_df['side'].str.startswith('AVGDN')).sum()}  | Exits: {len(exits)}")
    if len(exits) > 0:
        for rs, g in exits.groupby("side"):
            print(f"    {rs:<14}: N={len(g):3d}, avg_ret={g['ret_pct'].mean():+6.1f}%, median_hold={g['hold_days'].median():.0f}d, WR={(g['ret_pct']>0).mean()*100:.1f}%")
        print(f"  Avg hold (exits): {exits['hold_days'].mean():.0f}d | Avg return: {exits['ret_pct'].mean():+.2f}%")
        print(f"  Win rate: {(exits['ret_pct']>0).mean()*100:.1f}%")
        if len(exits) > 0:
            print(f"  Best: {exits['ret_pct'].max():+.1f}% ({exits.loc[exits['ret_pct'].idxmax(),'ticker']})")
            print(f"  Worst: {exits['ret_pct'].min():+.1f}% ({exits.loc[exits['ret_pct'].idxmin(),'ticker']})")
        per_tk = exits.groupby("ticker").agg(n=("ticker","size"),avg_ret=("ret_pct","mean"),
                                              total_ret=("ret_pct","sum"),avg_hold=("hold_days","mean"))
        per_tk = per_tk.sort_values("total_ret", ascending=False)
        print(f"\n  Top 15 by cum return:")
        for tk, r in per_tk.head(15).iterrows():
            print(f"    {tk:<7} N={int(r['n']):2d}  avg={r['avg_ret']:+6.1f}%  cum={r['total_ret']:+7.1f}%  hold={r['avg_hold']:.0f}d")

nav_df.to_csv("qt_v4_nav.csv")
trades_df.to_csv("qt_v4_trades.csv", index=False)
print("\nSaved: qt_v4_nav.csv, qt_v4_trades.csv")

lastPrompt: tôi nghĩ chúng ta có thể bắt đầu lại với hệ thống QT v4 (Buffett). chúng ta nên thay đổi cách tiếp cận. hãy xem như đây là hệ thống lọc ra những cổ phiếu tốt để đầu tư dài hạn, chúng ta đo lường kết q…

aiTitle: Review fundamental analysis for stock selection systems

content.text:
QT v4 đã rõ — đây là bộ lọc **Buffett quality-compounder**: universe ≥70% A/B tier, entry qua 2 path (VALUE: rẻ + không bắt dao rơi / GARP: PEG≤1 + tăng trưởng ≥20%), exit 3 quy tắc (FA_DEGRADE / OVERVALUED / GROWTH_BROKEN). File hiện tại `backtest_qt_v4.py` đo **portfolio NAV** — đúng kiểu bạn muốn TRÁNH.

Tôi sẽ dựng **event-study**: dùng đúng signal entry/exit của QT v4 nhưng đo **per-signal** (equal-weight, vốn vô hạn) — vào lúc nào, forward return dài hạn, exit rule có tốt không. Trước hết verify data files.

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
qt_v4_eventstudy.py — QT v4 (Buffett) as a STOCK FILTER, measured per-signal\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Reframe (user): QT v4 picks GOOD companies for long-term holding. Measure the
QUALITY OF THE PICKS at the stock/event level — NOT portfolio NAV/Sharpe/Calmar
(which drag in capital constraints and obscure the filter's real signal).

Three questions:
  (1) WHEN TO BUY  — entry signals (VALUE / GARP paths), are the picks good?
  (2) LONG-TERM OUTCOME — forward return at 3M/6M/1Y/2Y/3Y, vs VNINDEX, win-rate
  (3) WHEN TO EXIT — do QT v4 exit rules beat just holding to a fixed horizon?

Method: event study. Each entry = first day the QT v4 entry signal fires for a
ticker after being off (distinct episode), equal-weight, unlimited capital.
Forward returns point-in-time from Close; exit rules applied per-position.
NO portfolio, NO cash, NO Sharpe. Just: what happens to the stocks it picks.

Reuses backtest_qt_v4.py's exact signal definitions + data (panel pkl, fa_ratings_lh,
fin cache). Output: data/qt_v4_eventstudy.md
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile, pickle
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd

WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"
BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
HOR=[(63,"3M"),(126,"6M"),(252,"1Y"),(504,"2Y"),(756,"3Y")]

def bq_query(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try:
        cmd=f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=200000'
        r=subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=600,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

def main():
    lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))

    # ── load data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    fa=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"fa_ratings_lh.csv"),parse_dates=["time","Release_Date"])
    fa=fa.sort_values(["ticker","quarter"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    fa["eff_release"]=fa["Release_Date"].fillna(fa["time"]+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    # rolling pct_AB (>=12Q history) per ticker
    fa["is_ab"]=fa["tier"].isin(["A","B"]).astype(int)
    fa["cum_ab"]=fa.groupby("ticker")["is_ab"].cumcsum() if False else fa.groupby("ticker")["is_ab"].cumsum()
    fa["qnum"]=fa.groupby("ticker").cumcount()+1
    fa["pct_AB"]=fa["cum_ab"]/fa["qnum"]*100
    fa["valid_hist"]=fa["qnum"]>=12

    panel=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl"),"rb"))
    panel["time"]=pd.to_datetime(panel["time"])
    panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    panel["hi52"]=panel.groupby("ticker")["Close"].transform(lambda x:x.rolling(252,min_periods=60).max())
    panel["dd52"]=(panel["Close"]/panel["hi52"]-1)*100
    panel["pe_z"]=((panel["PE"]-panel["PE_MA5Y"])/panel["PE_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["pb_z"]=((panel["PB"]-panel["PB_MA5Y"])/panel["PB_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["vs200"]=(panel["Close"]/panel["MA200"]-1)*100
    panel["liqv"]=panel["Volume_3M_P50"]*panel["Close"]

    fin=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_v4_fin.pkl"),"rb"))
    fin["eff_release"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]).fillna(pd.to_datetime(fin["q_time"])+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fin=fin.sort_values(["ticker","eff_release"])
    fin["prev_NP_R"]=fin.groupby("ticker")["NP_R"].shift(1)
    fin["prev_Rev"]=fin.groupby("ticker")["Revenue_YoY_P0"].shift(1)

    # ── as-of merge FA tier/pct_AB/score + fin onto panel ─────────────────
    panel=panel.sort_values("time")
    fa_a=fa.sort_values("eff_release")
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fa_a[["ticker","eff_release","tier","pct_AB","valid_hist","score"]]
                        .rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"}),on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    fin_a=fin.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","PEG","NP_R","Revenue_YoY_P0","prev_NP_R","prev_Rev"]]\
            .rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fin_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)

    # ── QT v4 entry + exit flags (vectorized) ─────────────────────────────
    q_gate=(panel["pct_AB"]>=70)&(panel["valid_hist"])&(panel["tier"].isin(["A","B"]))&(panel["liqv"]>=5e9)
    v_under=((panel["pe_z"]<-1)|(panel["pb_z"]<-1)|(panel["dd52"]<-30))
    v_notknife=((panel["vs200"]>0)|(panel["dd52"]>-20))
    value_pass=v_under&v_notknife
    garp_pass=((panel["PEG"]>0)&(panel["PEG"]<=1.0)&(panel["NP_R"]>=0.20)&(panel["Revenue_YoY_P0"]>=0.20)
               &(panel["PE"]<25)&(panel["vs200"]>0))
    panel["entry"]=q_gate&(value_pass|garp_pass)
    panel["path"]=np.where(garp_pass&~value_pass,"GARP",np.where(value_pass&~garp_pass,"VALUE","BOTH"))
    # exit flags
    panel["x_fa"]=panel["tier"].isin(["C","D","E"])
    panel["x_ovr"]=(panel["pe_z"]>2.5)&(panel["pb_z"]>1.5)
    panel["x_growth"]=((panel["NP_R"]*100<-15)&(panel["Revenue_YoY_P0"]*100<-15)
                       &(panel["prev_NP_R"]*100<-15)&(panel["prev_Rev"]*100<-15))
    panel["any_exit"]=panel["x_fa"]|panel["x_ovr"]|panel["x_growth"]

    # ── VNINDEX for benchmarking ──────────────────────────────────────────
    vni=bq_query("SELECT t.time,t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time>='2014-01-01' AND t.Close>100 ORDER BY t.time")
    vni["time"]=pd.to_datetime(vni["time"]); vni_s=vni.set_index("time")["Close"]

    # ── build entry EVENTS (fresh trigger: entry True after False) ────────
    events=[]
    for tk,g in panel.groupby("ticker"):
        g=g.reset_index(drop=True)
        e=g["entry"].values
        cl=g["Close"].values; tm=g["time"].values; ax=g["any_exit"].values
        xfa=g["x_fa"].values; xovr=g["x_ovr"].values; xg=g["x_growth"].values
        for i in range(len(g)):
            if e[i] and (i==0 or not e[i-1]):  # fresh entry
                ep=cl[i]
                if not np.isfinite(ep) or ep<=0: continue
                ev={"ticker":tk,"date":pd.Timestamp(tm[i]),"path":g["path"].values[i],
                    "pe_z":g["pe_z"].values[i],"entry_px":ep}
                # forward fixed-horizon returns
                for H,nm in HOR:
                    j=i+H
                    ev[f"r_{nm}"]=(cl[j]/ep-1)*100 if j<len(g) and np.isfinite(cl[j]) and cl[j]>0 else np.nan
                # rule-based exit (first any_exit after entry)
                xi=None
                for j in range(i+1,len(g)):
                    if ax[j]: xi=j; break
                if xi is not None:
                    ev["exit_ret"]=(cl[xi]/ep-1)*100; ev["hold_d"]=(pd.Timestamp(tm[xi])-pd.Timestamp(tm[i])).days
                    ev["exit_reason"]=("FA_DEGRADE" if xfa[xi] else "OVERVALUED" if xovr[xi] else "GROWTH_BROKEN")
                else:
                    ev["exit_ret"]=(cl[-1]/ep-1)*100; ev["hold_d"]=(pd.Timestamp(tm[-1])-pd.Timestamp(tm[i])).days
                    ev["exit_reason"]="STILL_OPEN"
                events.append(ev)
    ev=pd.DataFrame(events)
    # excess vs VNI at each horizon
    vni_arr=vni_s.reindex(panel["time"].drop_duplicates().sort_values()).ffill()
    def vni_fwd(d,H):
        idx=vni_s.index.searchsorted(d)
        if idx>=len(vni_s): return np.nan
        j=idx+H
        if j>=len(vni_s): return np.nan
        return (vni_s.iloc[j]/vni_s.iloc[idx]-1)*100
    for H,nm in HOR:
        ev[f"vni_{nm}"]=ev["date"].apply(lambda d: vni_fwd(d,H))
        ev[f"exc_{nm}"]=ev[f"r_{nm}"]-ev[f"vni_{nm}"]

    P("# QT v4 (Buffett) as a FILTER — per-signal event study")
    P("")
    P(f"Entry events (fresh triggers) {len(ev):,} | tickers {ev['ticker'].nunique()} "
      f"| {ev['date'].min().date()}→{ev['date'].max().date()}")
    P(f"Path mix: "+", ".join(f"{p}={int((ev['path']==p).sum())}" for p in ev['path'].unique()))
    P("")

    # ── (1)+(2) forward outcome by horizon ────────────────────────────────
    P("## (1)(2) Forward outcome of picks — hold to fixed horizon")
    P(f"{'horizon':<8}{'N':>6}{'med':>8}{'mean':>8}{'win%':>7}{'vsVNI med':>10}{'beatVNI%':>9}")
    P("-"*56)
    for H,nm in HOR:
        r=ev[f"r_{nm}"].dropna(); exc=ev[f"exc_{nm}"].dropna()
        if len(r)<20: continue
        P(f"{nm:<8}{len(r):>6}{r.median():>+7.1f}%{r.mean():>+7.1f}%{(r>0).mean()*100:>6.0f}%"
          f"{exc.median():>+9.1f}%{(exc>0).mean()*100:>8.0f}%")
    P("")
    P("## By entry path (forward 1Y / 2Y median, beat-VNI%)")
    for p in ["VALUE","GARP","BOTH"]:
        g=ev[ev["path"]==p]
        if len(g)<15: continue
        P(f"  {p:<6} N={len(g):>4}  1Y med={g['r_1Y'].median():+6.1f}% (beat {100*(g['exc_1Y']>0).mean():.0f}%)"
          f"  2Y med={g['r_2Y'].median():+6.1f}% (beat {100*(g['exc_2Y']>0).mean():.0f}%)")
    P("")

    # ── (3) exit rules vs fixed-horizon holds ─────────────────────────────
    P("## (3) WHEN TO EXIT — QT v4 rule-based exit vs holding to fixed horizon")
    closed=ev[ev["exit_reason"]!="STILL_OPEN"]
    P(f"Rule-based exits: {len(closed)}/{len(ev)} closed; {len(ev)-len(closed)} STILL_OPEN at data end")
    P(f"  rule exit:  median ret {closed['exit_ret'].median():+.1f}%  mean {closed['exit_ret'].mean():+.1f}%  "
      f"median hold {closed['hold_d'].median():.0f}d  win {(closed['exit_ret']>0).mean()*100:.0f}%")
    for H,nm in HOR:
        r=ev[f"r_{nm}"].dropna()
        P(f"  hold {nm:<3}:  median ret {r.median():+.1f}%  mean {r.mean():+.1f}%  win {(r>0).mean()*100:.0f}%  (N={len(r)})")
    P("")
    P("Exit reason breakdown:")
    P(f"{'reason':<16}{'N':>5}{'med ret':>9}{'mean':>8}{'med hold':>10}{'win%':>7}")
    for rs,g in ev.groupby("exit_reason"):
        P(f"{rs:<16}{len(g):>5}{g['exit_ret'].median():>+8.1f}%{g['exit_ret'].mean():>+7.1f}%{g['hold_d'].median():>9.0f}d{(g['exit_ret']>0).mean()*100:>6.0f}%")
    P("")
    P("Read: if 'rule exit' mean/win ≈ or > best fixed-horizon hold, the exit rules add value.")
    P("If holding longer (2Y/3Y) beats rule exit, the rules exit too early (cut compounders).")
    P("")
    ev.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4_events.csv"),index=False)
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4_eventstudy.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))
    P("Saved data/qt_v4_eventstudy.md + data/qt_v4_events.csv")

if __name__=="__main__":
    main()

                ep=cl[i]
                if not np.isfinite(ep) or ep<=0: continue
                ev={"ticker":tk,"date":pd.Timestamp(tm[i]),"path":g["path"].values[i],
                    "pe_z":g["pe_z"].values[i],"entry_px":ep}
                # forward fixed-horizon returns
                for H,nm in HOR:
                    j=i+H
                    ev[f"r_{nm}"]=(cl[j]/ep-1)*100 if j<len(g) and np.isfinite(cl[j]) and cl[j]>0 else np.nan
                # rule-based exit (first any_exit after entry)
                xi=None
                for j in range(i+1,len(g)):
                    if ax[j]: xi=j; break
                if xi is not None:
                    ev["exit_ret"]=(cl[xi]/ep-1)*100; ev["hold_d"]=(pd.Timestamp(tm[xi])-pd.Timestamp(tm[i])).days
                    ev["exit_reason"]=("FA_DEGRADE" if xfa[xi] else "OVERVALUED" if xovr[xi] else "GROWTH_BROKEN")
                else:
                    ev["exit_ret"]=(cl[-1]/ep-1)*100; ev["hold_d"]=(pd.Timestamp(tm[-1])-pd.Timestamp(tm[i])).days
                    ev["exit_reason"]="STILL_OPEN"
                events.append(ev)
    ev=pd.DataFrame(events)
    # excess vs VNI at each horizon
    vni_arr=vni_s.reindex(panel["time"].drop_duplicates().sort_values()).ffill()
    def vni_fwd(d,H):
        idx=vni_s.index.searchsorted(d)
        if idx>=len(vni_s): return np.nan
        j=idx+H
        if j>=len(vni_s): return np.nan
        return (vni_s.iloc[j]/vni_s.iloc[idx]-1)*100
    for H,nm in HOR:
        ev[f"vni_{nm}"]=ev["date"].apply(lambda d: vni_fwd(d,H))
        ev[f"exc_{nm}"]=ev[f"r_{nm}"]-ev[f"vni_{nm}"]

    P("# QT v4 (Buffett) as a FILTER — per-signal event study")
    P("")
    P(f"Entry events (fresh triggers) {len(ev):,} | tickers {ev['ticker'].nunique()} "
      f"| {ev['date'].min().date()}→{ev['date'].max().date()}")
    P(f"Path mix: "+", ".join(f"{p}={int((ev['path']==p).sum())}" for p in ev['path'].unique()))
    P("")

    # ── (1)+(2) forward outcome by horizon ────────────────────────────────
    P("## (1)(2) Forward outcome of picks — hold to fixed horizon")
    P(f"{'horizon':<8}{'N':>6}{'med':>8}{'mean':>8}{'win%':>7}{'vsVNI med':>10}{'beatVNI%':>9}")
    P("-"*56)
    for H,nm in HOR:
        r=ev[f"r_{nm}"].dropna(); exc=ev[f"exc_{nm}"].dropna()
        if len(r)<20: continue
        P(f"{nm:<8}{len(r):>6}{r.median():>+7.1f}%{r.mean():>+7.1f}%{(r>0).mean()*100:>6.0f}%"
          f"{exc.median():>+9.1f}%{(exc>0).mean()*100:>8.0f}%")
    P("")
    P("## By entry path (forward 1Y / 2Y median, beat-VNI%)")
    for p in ["VALUE","GARP","BOTH"]:
        g=ev[ev["path"]==p]
        if len(g)<15: continue
        P(f"  {p:<6} N={len(g):>4}  1Y med={g['r_1Y'].median():+6.1f}% (beat {100*(g['exc_1Y']>0).mean():.0f}%)"
          f"  2Y med={g['r_2Y'].median():+6.1f}% (beat {100*(g['exc_2Y']>0).mean():.0f}%)")
    P("")

    # ── (3) exit rules vs fixed-horizon holds ─────────────────────────────
    P("## (3) WHEN TO EXIT — QT v4 rule-based exit vs holding to fixed horizon")
    closed=ev[ev["exit_reason"]!="STILL_OPEN"]
    P(f"Rule-based exits: {len(closed)}/{len(ev)} closed; {len(ev)-len(closed)} STILL_OPEN at data end")
    P(f"  rule exit:  median ret {closed['exit_ret'].median():+.1f}%  mean {closed['exit_ret'].mean():+.1f}%  "
      f"median hold {closed['hold_d'].median():.0f}d  win {(closed['exit_ret']>0).mean()*100:.0f}%")
    for H,nm in HOR:
        r=ev[f"r_{nm}"].dropna()
        P(f"  hold {nm:<3}:  median ret {r.median():+.1f}%  mean {r.mean():+.1f}%  win {(r>0).mean()*100:.0f}%  (N={len(r)})")
    P("")
    P("Exit reason breakdown:")
    P(f"{'reason':<16}{'N':>5}{'med ret':>9}{'mean':>8}{'med hold':>10}{'win%':>7}")
    for rs,g in ev.groupby("exit_reason"):
        P(f"{rs:<16}{len(g):>5}{g['exit_ret'].median():>+8.1f}%{g['exit_ret'].mean():>+7.1f}%{g['hold_d'].median():>9.0f}d{(g['exit_ret']>0).mean()*100:>6.0f}%")
    P("")
    P("Read: if 'rule exit' mean/win ≈ or > best fixed-horizon hold, the exit rules add value.")
    P("If holding longer (2Y/3Y) beats rule exit, the rules exit too early (cut compounders).")
    P("")
    ev.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4_events.csv"),index=False)
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4_eventstudy.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))
    P("Saved data/qt_v4_eventstudy.md + data/qt_v4_events.csv")

if __name__=="__main__":
    main()

# QT v4 (Buffett) as a FILTER — per-signal event study

Entry events (fresh triggers) 628 | tickers 62 | 2016-11-01→2026-05-12
Path mix: VALUE=421, GARP=183, BOTH=24

## (1)(2) Forward outcome of picks — hold to fixed horizon
horizon      N     med    mean   win% vsVNI med beatVNI%
--------------------------------------------------------
3M         582   +2.0%   +3.8%    56%     -1.8%      45%
6M         551   +3.0%   +6.8%    56%     -3.5%      42%
1Y         487   +1.0%  +15.7%    52%     -5.1%      44%
2Y         404  +11.2%  +29.7%    58%     -1.6%      49%
3Y         302  +30.4%  +52.0%    65%     +7.2%      54%

## By entry path (forward 1Y / 2Y median, beat-VNI%)
  VALUE  N= 421  1Y med=  +4.8% (beat 37%)  2Y med= +15.0% (beat 34%)
  GARP   N= 183  1Y med=  -8.9% (beat 27%)  2Y med=  +0.9% (beat 24%)
  BOTH   N=  24  1Y med=  +0.6% (beat 33%)  2Y med=  +2.4% (beat 33%)

## (3) WHEN TO EXIT — QT v4 rule-based exit vs holding to fixed horizon
Rule-based exits: 410/628 closed; 218 STILL_OPEN at data end
  rule exit:  median ret +9.3%  mean +27.0%  median hold 274d  win 57%
  hold 3M :  median ret +2.0%  mean +3.8%  win 56%  (N=582)
  hold 6M :  median ret +3.0%  mean +6.8%  win 56%  (N=551)
  hold 1Y :  median ret +1.0%  mean +15.7%  win 52%  (N=487)
  hold 2Y :  median ret +11.2%  mean +29.7%  win 58%  (N=404)
  hold 3Y :  median ret +30.4%  mean +52.0%  win 65%  (N=302)

Exit reason breakdown:
reason              N  med ret    mean  med hold   win%
FA_DEGRADE        217    -2.3%   +7.5%      224d    44%
GROWTH_BROKEN      77    -3.0%   -1.0%      455d    34%
OVERVALUED        116   +81.4%  +82.2%      561d    96%
STILL_OPEN        218    -4.2%  +29.9%      598d    41%

Read: if 'rule exit' mean/win ≈ or > best fixed-horizon hold, the exit rules add value.
If holding longer (2Y/3Y) beats rule exit, the rules exit too early (cut compounders).

Saved data/qt_v4_eventstudy.md + data/qt_v4_events.csv

content.text:
Đây là **kết quả sạch và đúng tầm** — và lần này nó **tích cực**: cách reframe của bạn đã làm lộ ra edge thật mà portfolio-NAV che mất.

## (1)(2) Kết quả các pick — edge là THẬT nhưng cần 3 NĂM

| Horizon | N | median | mean | win% | vs VNINDEX | beat VNI% |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 3M | 582 | +2.0% | +3.8% | 56% | −1.8% | 45% |
| 6M | 551 | +3.0% | +6.8% | 56% | −3.5% | 42% |
| 1Y | 487 | +1.0% | +15.7% | 52% | −5.1% | 44% |
| 2Y | 404 | +11.2% | +29.7% | 58% | −1.6% | 49% |
| **3Y** | 302 | **+30.4%** | **+52.0%** | **65%** | **+7.2%** | **54%** |

→ Pick của QT v4 **lag index tới 1Y, hòa ở 2Y, và VƯỢT index ở 3Y** (+7.2pp median, 65% win, +30% median tuyệt đối). Đây chính xác là luận điểm "FA hợp dài hạn" của bạn — giờ đo sạch ở cấp cổ phiếu, không bị portfolio làm nhiễu. **Bộ lọc DN tốt thật, chỉ cần giữ đủ lâu (3 năm).**

## Câu 1 — Vào lúc nào: VALUE >> GARP

- **VALUE** (mua rẻ): 1Y +4.8%, 2Y +15.0% — đường này tạo edge
- **GARP** (mua tăng trưởng PEG≤1): 1Y **−8.9%**, 2Y +0.9%, beat VNI chỉ 24-27% — **đường này là lực cản**

→ Với bộ lọc quality dài hạn, **mua rẻ thắng mua tăng trưởng**. Nên cân nhắc bỏ/sửa path GARP.

## Câu 3 — Thoát lúc nào: OVERVALUED là vàng, FA_DEGRADE thoát quá sớm

| Exit reason | N | median | mean | hold | win% |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **OVERVALUED** | 116 | **+81.4%** | +82.2% | 561d | **96%** |
| FA_DEGRADE | 217 | −2.3% | +7.5% | 224d | 44% |
| GROWTH_BROKEN | 77 | −3.0% | −1.0% | 455d | 34% |
| STILL_OPEN | 218 | −4.2% | +29.9% | 598d | 41% |

- **OVERVALUED exit = đỉnh cao** (+81%, **96% win**): để winner chạy đến khi đắt (PE_z>2.5 & PB_z>1.5) rồi bán — đúng tinh thần Buffett "bán khi thị trường trả giá quá cao."
- **FA_DEGRADE/GROWTH_BROKEN = cắt lỗ phòng thủ** (median âm), bắn sau khi đã rớt.
- **Tổng thể rule-exit (mean +27%, giữ ~9 tháng) THUA HỜ hold-3Y (+52%)** → các rule (đặc biệt FA_DEGRADE, 217 lần) **thoát quá sớm, cắt mất compounder**.

## Hàm ý actionable (lần đầu trong cả phiên có hướng tiến thật)

Một QT v4 tinh chỉnh sẽ: **(a) nhấn path VALUE, bỏ GARP; (b) giữ ~3 năm; (c) thoát chủ yếu bằng OVERVALUED (thu hoạch winner); (d) kiên nhẫn hơn với FA_DEGRADE** (vd yêu cầu 2 quý liên tiếp, hoặc xác nhận bằng giá) thay vì cắt ngay trên 1 quý tier slip.

---
name: qt-v4-eventstudy-2026
description: QT v4 (Buffett) filter measured as per-signal event study (not portfolio) — long-horizon edge is real, VALUE>>GARP, OVERVALUED exit is gold
metadata:
  type: project
---

# QT v4 (Buffett) filter — per-signal event study (2026-05-29)

User reframe (correct, fixes prior mistake): stop measuring FA/quality filters as portfolio NAV (capacity/cash/Sharpe/Calmar obscure the signal). Measure the QUALITY OF THE PICKS at the stock/event level — when to buy, long-horizon outcome, when to exit. Script: `qt_v4_eventstudy.py` (reuses backtest_qt_v4 signal defs + data: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl, fa_ratings_lh.csv, qt_v4_fin.pkl). Equal-weight per signal, unlimited capital, point-in-time fwd returns. Output: `data/qt_v4_eventstudy.md`, `data/qt_v4_events.csv`.

**QT v4 = Buffett quality-compounder filter**: universe ≥70% A/B tier (≥12Q hist), latest A/B, liq≥5B/d. Entry OR{VALUE: (pe_z<−1|pb_z<−1|dd52w<−30)&not-falling-knife; GARP: PEG∈(0,1]&NP_R≥20%&Rev_YoY≥20%&PE<25&>MA200}. Exit OR{FA_DEGRADE tier→C/D/E; OVERVALUED pe_z>2.5&pb_z>1.5; GROWTH_BROKEN 2Q NP&Rev<−15%}.

## Findings (628 entry events, 62 tickers, 2016→2026)
- **Edge is REAL but LONG-horizon** (confirms the whole session's thesis, now clean at stock level): fwd median/mean/win, excess-vs-VNINDEX: 3M +2.0%/−1.8exc/beat45% → 1Y +1.0%/−5.1exc/beat44% (LAGS index through 1Y) → 2Y +11.2%/−1.6exc (matches) → **3Y +30.4%/+52.0mean/win65%/+7.2pp exc/beat54% (BEATS index only at 3Y)**. The picks need ~3 years; portfolio-NAV sims (1-2Y, capacity-bound) structurally couldn't show this.
- **VALUE path >> GARP path**: VALUE 1Y +4.8%/2Y +15.0%; **GARP 1Y −8.9%/2Y +0.9%/beat-VNI only 24-27%** (drag). For a long-horizon quality filter, buy-cheap beats buy-growth. → drop/rework GARP.
- **Exit: OVERVALUED is GOLD, FA_DEGRADE exits too early.** OVERVALUED (n=116): median **+81.4%**, **96% win**, hold 561d — let winners run, sell when expensive (pure Buffett). FA_DEGRADE (n=217): median −2.3%/win44% (fires after damage). GROWTH_BROKEN (n=77): median −3.0%/win34% (defensive). Overall rule-exit (mean +27%, ~9mo hold) << hold-3Y (+52%) → **rules exit too early, cut compounders** (esp. FA_DEGRADE on a single-quarter tier slip).

## Actionable refinement hypotheses (for a QT v4.x — NOT yet validated)
(a) emphasize VALUE entry, drop GARP; (b) target ~3Y hold; (c) primary exit = OVERVALUED (winner harvest); (d) make FA_DEGRADE patient (require 2 consecutive degrades or price confirmation) to stop cutting compounders. Measure refinements the SAME WAY (per-signal event study, 3Y outcome + excess vs VNI), NOT portfolio NAV.

## Caveats
Quality universe = 62 names with ≥12Q A/B history → mild survivorship (delisted/never-quality excluded by construction); edge is conditional on "already a quality name." 3Y horizon N=302 (entries ≤~2023). This is signal-quality (the right altitude for a long-term FILTER), distinct from deployable-portfolio (separate question — would need capital/position sizing, where prior sims showed capacity binds).

content.text:
Memory đã lưu (file mới `qt_v4_eventstudy_2026.md` + index). 

## Tóm lại — và đây là lần đầu cả phiên có hướng tiến THẬT

Cách reframe của bạn đã hoạt động đúng như kỳ vọng: **đo chất lượng pick thay vì portfolio** đã làm lộ ra edge mà mọi portfolio-NAV trước đó che mất.

**3 câu hỏi của bạn đều có câu trả lời sạch:**
1. **Vào lúc nào** → path **VALUE** (mua rẻ) tạo edge; **GARP bỏ đi** (lực cản, 1Y −8.9%)
2. **Kết quả dài hạn** → lag index tới 1Y, **vượt index ở 3Y** (+30% median, 65% win, +7.2pp vs VNINDEX) — luận điểm "FA hợp dài hạn" của bạn được xác nhận sạch ở cấp cổ phiếu
3. **Thoát lúc nào** → **OVERVALUED là vàng** (+81%, 96% win — để winner chạy, bán khi đắt); FA_DEGRADE thoát quá sớm, cắt mất compounder

Và nó cho ra **giả thuyết tinh chỉnh cụ thể, kiểm chứng được** (QT v4.x): VALUE-only + giữ ~3Y + exit chính bằng OVERVALUED + FA_DEGRADE kiên nhẫn hơn.

**Khác biệt mấu chốt so với các dead-end trước:** ta không còn ép FA thành portfolio-alpha capacity-bound; ta đo nó đúng bản chất — **một bộ lọc cổ phiếu tốt để giữ dài hạn**. Ở tầng đó, nó *hoạt động*.

Bước tiếp tự nhiên: dựng **QT v4.x** với 4 tinh chỉnh trên và đo lại bằng **cùng event-study** (outcome 3Y + excess vs VNINDEX, per-signal) — xem các thay đổi có nâng được median 3Y / beat-rate / chất lượng exit không. Bạn muốn tôi làm luôn không?

Đây là **insight cực kỳ giá trị** — và nó tinh chỉnh đúng chỗ phát hiện "GARP dở" của tôi. Bạn đang mô tả **hai archetype multibagger khác nhau**, mỗi cái cần một điều kiện entry khác:

- **Archetype A — "Quality bị sợ hãi định giá rẻ mạt"**: VCS 2014 (thị trường quá sợ), DGC 2015-16 (không ai hiểu ngành hóa chất, thanh khoản thấp) + 2019 (scare thuế xuất khẩu) → 10-20x. Điều kiện: **chất lượng còn nguyên + giá bị đánh rẻ/bỏ quên/sự cố tạm thời**, đặc biệt trong **crisis/bear**.
- **Archetype B — "Blue-chip còn trong pha tăng trưởng mạnh"**: VNM 2005-2017 tăng vài chục lần dù là blue-chip — **không cần rẻ, chỉ cần tăng trưởng mạnh**; nhưng **hết tăng trưởng thì giá giảm** (VNM post-2017).

→ Điều này nói: **điều kiện entry phải KHÁC theo loại doanh nghiệp**. GARP "dở" trước đó có thể vì áp dụng bừa; growth-entry nên **dành cho blue-chip**. Và thiếu một exit quan trọng: **growth maturity/giảm tốc** (bài học VNM), không chỉ −15% suy giảm.

Tôi test trực tiếp giả thuyết này. Trước hết kiểm tra 3 mã ví dụ + MktCap có trong data.

Tôi build test 2 archetype × (blue-chip vs small/mid), với metric **multibagger** (peak return + tỉ lệ 2x/3x/5x trong 3Y) — vì bạn quan tâm "ăn bằng lần", không phải median.

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
qt_v4x_archetypes.py — two multibagger archetypes (user insight 2026-05-29)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
User: entry condition must differ by company type.
  A) VALUE_FEAR  — quality intact but priced cheap/beaten/ignored (crisis, sector
     misunderstood, one-off incident scare). Pattern: VCS 2014, DGC 2015/2019.
     → needs CHEAP + fear (esp. CRISIS/BEAR state).
  B) GROWTH_BLUECHIP — established blue-chip STILL in strong-growth phase. Pattern:
     VNM 2005-2017 (~dozens×). → does NOT need cheap, just strong growth; exit when
     growth matures.

Tests, per (entry_type × size-class), at the STOCK level (event study, no portfolio):
  - 3Y point return + PEAK return within 3Y (captures "ăn bằng lần")
  - multibagger rates: peak ≥ +100% / +200% / +400% within 3Y
  - beat-VNINDEX
Hypothesis: GROWTH works for BLUECHIP (not cheap needed); VALUE_FEAR works for
SMALL/MID (cheap needed); GROWTH alone weak for small/mid.

Data: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl + fa_ratings_lh.csv (tier, MktCap) + qt_v4_fin.pkl + DT5G.
Caveat: panel prices start 2014 (VCS 2015-11, DGC 2018-12) → cannot capture the
original VCS-2014 / DGC-2015 entries; tests the archetype across 2016-2026.
Output: data/qt_v4x_archetypes.md
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile, pickle
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd

WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"
BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
STATE={1:"CRISIS",2:"BEAR",3:"NEUTRAL",4:"BULL",5:"EX-BULL"}
FWD=756  # 3Y window for peak/multibagger

def bq_query(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try:
        cmd=f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=200000'
        r=subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=600,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

def main():
    lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
    fa=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"fa_ratings_lh.csv"),parse_dates=["time","Release_Date"])
    fa=fa.sort_values(["ticker","quarter"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    fa["eff_release"]=fa["Release_Date"].fillna(fa["time"]+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fa["is_ab"]=fa["tier"].isin(["A","B"]).astype(int)
    fa["qnum"]=fa.groupby("ticker").cumcount()+1
    fa["pct_AB"]=fa.groupby("ticker")["is_ab"].cumsum()/fa["qnum"]*100
    fa["valid_hist"]=fa["qnum"]>=12

    panel=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl"),"rb"))
    panel["time"]=pd.to_datetime(panel["time"]); panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    panel["hi52"]=panel.groupby("ticker")["Close"].transform(lambda x:x.rolling(252,min_periods=60).max())
    panel["dd52"]=(panel["Close"]/panel["hi52"]-1)*100
    panel["pe_z"]=((panel["PE"]-panel["PE_MA5Y"])/panel["PE_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["pb_z"]=((panel["PB"]-panel["PB_MA5Y"])/panel["PB_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["liqv"]=panel["Volume_3M_P50"]*panel["Close"]

    fin=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_v4_fin.pkl"),"rb"))
    fin["eff_release"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]).fillna(pd.to_datetime(fin["q_time"])+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fin=fin.sort_values(["ticker","eff_release"])

    panel=panel.sort_values("time")
    fa_a=fa.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","tier","pct_AB","valid_hist","MktCap"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fa_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    fin_a=fin.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","PEG","NP_R","Revenue_YoY_P0"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fin_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")

    # DT5G state
    st=bq_query("SELECT s.time,s.state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live AS s ORDER BY s.time")
    st["time"]=pd.to_datetime(st["time"])
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel.sort_values("time"),st.sort_values("time"),on="time",direction="backward")
    panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)

    # quality gate + size class (cross-sectional MktCap tercile among quality names per day)
    panel["qok"]=(panel["pct_AB"]>=70)&(panel["valid_hist"])&(panel["tier"].isin(["A","B"]))&(panel["liqv"]>=5e9)
    panel["mc_pct"]=panel[panel["qok"]].groupby("time")["MktCap"].rank(pct=True)
    panel["mc_pct"]=panel["mc_pct"]  # NaN for non-qok rows
    panel["size_class"]=np.where(panel["mc_pct"]>=0.667,"BLUECHIP",
                          np.where(panel["mc_pct"].notna(),"SMALLMID",None))

    # two entry signals (quality gated)
    panel["sig_growth"]=panel["qok"]&(panel["NP_R"]>=0.20)&(panel["Revenue_YoY_P0"]>=0.20)
    panel["sig_value"]=panel["qok"]&((panel["pe_z"]<-1)|(panel["pb_z"]<-1)|(panel["dd52"]<-30))

    vni=bq_query("SELECT t.time,t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time>='2014-01-01' AND t.Close>100 ORDER BY t.time")
    vni["time"]=pd.to_datetime(vni["time"]); vni_s=vni.set_index("time")["Close"]
    def vni_fwd(d,H):
        i=vni_s.index.searchsorted(d); j=i+H
        return (vni_s.iloc[j]/vni_s.iloc[i]-1)*100 if i<len(vni_s) and j<len(vni_s) else np.nan

    # build events: fresh trigger of (growth OR value)
    events=[]
    for tk,g in panel.groupby("ticker"):
        g=g.reset_index(drop=True)
        sg=g["sig_growth"].values; sv=g["sig_value"].values; any_s=sg|sv
        cl=g["Close"].values; tm=g["time"].values
        for i in range(len(g)):
            if any_s[i] and (i==0 or not any_s[i-1]):
                ep=cl[i]
                if not np.isfinite(ep) or ep<=0: continue
                etype="BOTH" if (sg[i] and sv[i]) else ("GROWTH" if sg[i] else "VALUE_FEAR")
                end=min(i+FWD,len(g)-1)
                fwd=cl[i+1:end+1]; fwd=fwd[np.isfinite(fwd)]
                peak=(np.max(fwd)/ep-1)*100 if len(fwd) else np.nan
                r3y=(cl[end]/ep-1)*100 if np.isfinite(cl[end]) else np.nan
                events.append({"ticker":tk,"date":pd.Timestamp(tm[i]),"etype":etype,
                    "size":g["size_class"].values[i],"state":g["state"].values[i],
                    "MktCap_B":g["MktCap"].values[i]/1e9,"peak_3Y":peak,"r_3Y":r3y,
                    "fwd_days":(pd.Timestamp(tm[end])-pd.Timestamp(tm[i])).days,
                    "vni_3Y":vni_fwd(pd.Timestamp(tm[i]),min(FWD,end-i))})
    ev=pd.DataFrame(events)
    ev["exc_3Y"]=ev["r_3Y"]-ev["vni_3Y"]

    P("# QT v4.x — two multibagger archetypes (VALUE_FEAR vs GROWTH_BLUECHIP)")
    P("")
    P(f"events {len(ev):,} | tickers {ev['ticker'].nunique()} | {ev['date'].min().date()}→{ev['date'].max().date()}")
    P(f"(peak_3Y = max drawup within 3Y = the 'ăn bằng lần' opportunity; r_3Y = disciplined 3Y hold)")
    P("")

    def cell(g):
        n=len(g)
        return (f"{n:>5}{g['peak_3Y'].median():>+9.0f}%{g['r_3Y'].median():>+9.0f}%"
                f"{100*(g['peak_3Y']>=100).mean():>7.0f}%{100*(g['peak_3Y']>=200).mean():>7.0f}%"
                f"{100*(g['peak_3Y']>=400).mean():>7.0f}%{100*(g['exc_3Y']>0).mean():>8.0f}%")

    P("## Entry archetype × size class")
    P(f"{'cell':<26}{'N':>5}{'peakMed':>9}{'3YMed':>9}{'≥2x%':>7}{'≥3x%':>7}{'≥5x%':>7}{'beatVNI':>8}")
    P("-"*78)
    for et in ["GROWTH","VALUE_FEAR","BOTH"]:
        for sz in ["BLUECHIP","SMALLMID"]:
            g=ev[(ev["etype"]==et)&(ev["size"]==sz)]
            if len(g)<8: continue
            P(f"{et+' × '+sz:<26}"+cell(g))
    P("")
    P("## By size class only (all entries)")
    for sz in ["BLUECHIP","SMALLMID"]:
        g=ev[ev["size"]==sz]
        if len(g)>=8: P(f"{sz:<26}"+cell(g))
    P("")
    P("## VALUE_FEAR by entry STATE (does crisis/bear boost it?)")
    P(f"{'state':<26}{'N':>5}{'peakMed':>9}{'3YMed':>9}{'≥2x%':>7}{'≥3x%':>7}{'≥5x%':>7}{'beatVNI':>8}")
    vf=ev[ev["etype"].isin(["VALUE_FEAR","BOTH"])]
    for s in [1,2,3,4,5]:
        g=vf[vf["state"]==s]
        if len(g)>=8: P(f"{STATE[s]:<26}"+cell(g))
    P("")

    # face validity
    P("## Face validity — VCS / DGC / VNM entries caught by the filter")
    for tk in ["VCS","DGC","VNM"]:
        g=ev[ev["ticker"]==tk].sort_values("date")
        if len(g)==0: P(f"  {tk}: no events (panel price start limits)"); continue
        P(f"  {tk} ({len(g)} events):")
        for _,r in g.head(6).iterrows():
            P(f"    {r['date'].date()} {r['etype']:<10} {r['size'] or '?':<8} "
              f"MktCap={r['MktCap_B']:.0f}B  peak3Y={r['peak_3Y']:+.0f}%  hold3Y={r['r_3Y']:+.0f}%")
    P("")
    ev.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_events.csv"),index=False)
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_archetypes.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))
    P("Saved data/qt_v4x_archetypes.md + data/qt_v4x_events.csv")

if __name__=="__main__":
    main()
