toolUseResult.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
qt_v4x_archetypes.py — two multibagger archetypes (user insight 2026-05-29)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
User: entry condition must differ by company type.
  A) VALUE_FEAR  — quality intact but priced cheap/beaten/ignored (crisis, sector
     misunderstood, one-off incident scare). Pattern: VCS 2014, DGC 2015/2019.
     → needs CHEAP + fear (esp. CRISIS/BEAR state).
  B) GROWTH_BLUECHIP — established blue-chip STILL in strong-growth phase. Pattern:
     VNM 2005-2017 (~dozens×). → does NOT need cheap, just strong growth; exit when
     growth matures.

Tests, per (entry_type × size-class), at the STOCK level (event study, no portfolio):
  - 3Y point return + PEAK return within 3Y (captures "ăn bằng lần")
  - multibagger rates: peak ≥ +100% / +200% / +400% within 3Y
  - beat-VNINDEX
Hypothesis: GROWTH works for BLUECHIP (not cheap needed); VALUE_FEAR works for
SMALL/MID (cheap needed); GROWTH alone weak for small/mid.

Data: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl + fa_ratings_lh.csv (tier, MktCap) + qt_v4_fin.pkl + DT5G.
Caveat: panel prices start 2014 (VCS 2015-11, DGC 2018-12) → cannot capture the
original VCS-2014 / DGC-2015 entries; tests the archetype across 2016-2026.
Output: data/qt_v4x_archetypes.md
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile, pickle
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd

WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"
BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
STATE={1:"CRISIS",2:"BEAR",3:"NEUTRAL",4:"BULL",5:"EX-BULL"}
FWD=756  # 3Y window for peak/multibagger

def bq_query(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try:
        cmd=f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=200000'
        r=subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=600,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

def main():
    lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
    fa=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"fa_ratings_lh.csv"),parse_dates=["time","Release_Date"])
    fa=fa.sort_values(["ticker","quarter"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    fa["eff_release"]=fa["Release_Date"].fillna(fa["time"]+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fa["is_ab"]=fa["tier"].isin(["A","B"]).astype(int)
    fa["qnum"]=fa.groupby("ticker").cumcount()+1
    fa["pct_AB"]=fa.groupby("ticker")["is_ab"].cumsum()/fa["qnum"]*100
    fa["valid_hist"]=fa["qnum"]>=12

    panel=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl"),"rb"))
    panel["time"]=pd.to_datetime(panel["time"]); panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    panel["hi52"]=panel.groupby("ticker")["Close"].transform(lambda x:x.rolling(252,min_periods=60).max())
    panel["dd52"]=(panel["Close"]/panel["hi52"]-1)*100
    panel["pe_z"]=((panel["PE"]-panel["PE_MA5Y"])/panel["PE_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["pb_z"]=((panel["PB"]-panel["PB_MA5Y"])/panel["PB_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["liqv"]=panel["Volume_3M_P50"]*panel["Close"]

    fin=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_v4_fin.pkl"),"rb"))
    fin["eff_release"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]).fillna(pd.to_datetime(fin["q_time"])+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fin=fin.sort_values(["ticker","eff_release"])

    panel=panel.sort_values("time")
    fa_a=fa.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","tier","pct_AB","valid_hist","MktCap"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fa_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    fin_a=fin.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","PEG","NP_R","Revenue_YoY_P0"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fin_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")

    # DT5G state
    st=bq_query("SELECT s.time,s.state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live AS s ORDER BY s.time")
    st["time"]=pd.to_datetime(st["time"])
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel.sort_values("time"),st.sort_values("time"),on="time",direction="backward")
    panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)

    # quality gate + size class (cross-sectional MktCap tercile among quality names per day)
    panel["qok"]=(panel["pct_AB"]>=70)&(panel["valid_hist"])&(panel["tier"].isin(["A","B"]))&(panel["liqv"]>=5e9)
    panel["mc_pct"]=panel[panel["qok"]].groupby("time")["MktCap"].rank(pct=True)
    panel["mc_pct"]=panel["mc_pct"]  # NaN for non-qok rows
    panel["size_class"]=np.where(panel["mc_pct"]>=0.667,"BLUECHIP",
                          np.where(panel["mc_pct"].notna(),"SMALLMID",None))

    # two entry signals (quality gated)
    panel["sig_growth"]=panel["qok"]&(panel["NP_R"]>=0.20)&(panel["Revenue_YoY_P0"]>=0.20)
    panel["sig_value"]=panel["qok"]&((panel["pe_z"]<-1)|(panel["pb_z"]<-1)|(panel["dd52"]<-30))

    vni=bq_query("SELECT t.time,t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time>='2014-01-01' AND t.Close>100 ORDER BY t.time")
    vni["time"]=pd.to_datetime(vni["time"]); vni_s=vni.set_index("time")["Close"]
    def vni_fwd(d,H):
        i=vni_s.index.searchsorted(d); j=i+H
        return (vni_s.iloc[j]/vni_s.iloc[i]-1)*100 if i<len(vni_s) and j<len(vni_s) else np.nan

    # build events: fresh trigger of (growth OR value)
    events=[]
    for tk,g in panel.groupby("ticker"):
        g=g.reset_index(drop=True)
        sg=g["sig_growth"].values; sv=g["sig_value"].values; any_s=sg|sv
        cl=g["Close"].values; tm=g["time"].values
        for i in range(len(g)):
            if any_s[i] and (i==0 or not any_s[i-1]):
                ep=cl[i]
                if not np.isfinite(ep) or ep<=0: continue
                etype="BOTH" if (sg[i] and sv[i]) else ("GROWTH" if sg[i] else "VALUE_FEAR")
                end=min(i+FWD,len(g)-1)
                fwd=cl[i+1:end+1]; fwd=fwd[np.isfinite(fwd)]
                peak=(np.max(fwd)/ep-1)*100 if len(fwd) else np.nan
                r3y=(cl[end]/ep-1)*100 if np.isfinite(cl[end]) else np.nan
                events.append({"ticker":tk,"date":pd.Timestamp(tm[i]),"etype":etype,
                    "size":g["size_class"].values[i],"state":g["state"].values[i],
                    "MktCap_B":g["MktCap"].values[i]/1e9,"peak_3Y":peak,"r_3Y":r3y,
                    "fwd_days":(pd.Timestamp(tm[end])-pd.Timestamp(tm[i])).days,
                    "vni_3Y":vni_fwd(pd.Timestamp(tm[i]),min(FWD,end-i))})
    ev=pd.DataFrame(events)
    ev["exc_3Y"]=ev["r_3Y"]-ev["vni_3Y"]

    P("# QT v4.x — two multibagger archetypes (VALUE_FEAR vs GROWTH_BLUECHIP)")
    P("")
    P(f"events {len(ev):,} | tickers {ev['ticker'].nunique()} | {ev['date'].min().date()}→{ev['date'].max().date()}")
    P(f"(peak_3Y = max drawup within 3Y = the 'ăn bằng lần' opportunity; r_3Y = disciplined 3Y hold)")
    P("")

    def cell(g):
        n=len(g)
        return (f"{n:>5}{g['peak_3Y'].median():>+9.0f}%{g['r_3Y'].median():>+9.0f}%"
                f"{100*(g['peak_3Y']>=100).mean():>7.0f}%{100*(g['peak_3Y']>=200).mean():>7.0f}%"
                f"{100*(g['peak_3Y']>=400).mean():>7.0f}%{100*(g['exc_3Y']>0).mean():>8.0f}%")

    P("## Entry archetype × size class")
    P(f"{'cell':<26}{'N':>5}{'peakMed':>9}{'3YMed':>9}{'≥2x%':>7}{'≥3x%':>7}{'≥5x%':>7}{'beatVNI':>8}")
    P("-"*78)
    for et in ["GROWTH","VALUE_FEAR","BOTH"]:
        for sz in ["BLUECHIP","SMALLMID"]:
            g=ev[(ev["etype"]==et)&(ev["size"]==sz)]
            if len(g)<8: continue
            P(f"{et+' × '+sz:<26}"+cell(g))
    P("")
    P("## By size class only (all entries)")
    for sz in ["BLUECHIP","SMALLMID"]:
        g=ev[ev["size"]==sz]
        if len(g)>=8: P(f"{sz:<26}"+cell(g))
    P("")
    P("## VALUE_FEAR by entry STATE (does crisis/bear boost it?)")
    P(f"{'state':<26}{'N':>5}{'peakMed':>9}{'3YMed':>9}{'≥2x%':>7}{'≥3x%':>7}{'≥5x%':>7}{'beatVNI':>8}")
    vf=ev[ev["etype"].isin(["VALUE_FEAR","BOTH"])]
    for s in [1,2,3,4,5]:
        g=vf[vf["state"]==s]
        if len(g)>=8: P(f"{STATE[s]:<26}"+cell(g))
    P("")

    # face validity
    P("## Face validity — VCS / DGC / VNM entries caught by the filter")
    for tk in ["VCS","DGC","VNM"]:
        g=ev[ev["ticker"]==tk].sort_values("date")
        if len(g)==0: P(f"  {tk}: no events (panel price start limits)"); continue
        P(f"  {tk} ({len(g)} events):")
        for _,r in g.head(6).iterrows():
            P(f"    {r['date'].date()} {r['etype']:<10} {r['size'] or '?':<8} "
              f"MktCap={r['MktCap_B']:.0f}B  peak3Y={r['peak_3Y']:+.0f}%  hold3Y={r['r_3Y']:+.0f}%")
    P("")
    ev.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_events.csv"),index=False)
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_archetypes.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))
    P("Saved data/qt_v4x_archetypes.md + data/qt_v4x_events.csv")

if __name__=="__main__":
    main()

content.text:
Kết quả rất giàu — **xác nhận một phần lớn insight của bạn, và tinh chỉnh một phần quan trọng**.

## Archetype × quy mô (metric multibagger: peak trong 3Y)

| Cell | N | peakMed | 3Y hold | ≥2x | ≥3x | ≥5x | beat VNI |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| GROWTH × BLUECHIP | 22 | +43% | +8% | 27% | 5% | **0%** | 36% |
| GROWTH × SMALLMID | 80 | +40% | +1% | 18% | 2% | 1% | 25% |
| VALUE_FEAR × BLUECHIP | 152 | +77% | +31% | 22% | 7% | 0% | 28% |
| VALUE_FEAR × SMALLMID | 347 | +41% | +1% | 33% | 10% | 1% | 37% |
| **BOTH × SMALLMID** | 19 | **+150%** | **+56%** | **63%** | **32%** | **11%** | **53%** |

**Phát hiện then chốt — sweet spot multibagger = `BOTH × SMALL/MID`:** small/mid quality **vừa rẻ/bị đánh xuống VỪA còn tăng trưởng** → **63% nhân đôi, 32% nhân ba, 11% gấp 5** trong 3Y. **Đây chính xác là archetype VCS/DGC** bạn mô tả: chất lượng + bị sợ hãi định giá rẻ + vẫn đang tăng trưởng. Không phải growth-một-mình, không phải value-một-mình — mà là **giao của cả hai trong một cổ small/mid**.

## State timing — XÁC NHẬN mạnh ý bạn

VALUE_FEAR theo state lúc vào:

| State | 3Y hold | ≥2x | ≥3x |
|---|---|---|---|
| **CRISIS** | +26% | 38% | **16%** |
| **BEAR** | +24% | 24% | 14% |
| NEUTRAL | +5% | 32% | 9% |
| BULL | +14% | 25% | 5% |

→ **Mua cổ tốt giá rẻ trong CRISIS/BEAR = cơ hội tốt nhất** (≥3x 16% ở crisis vs 9% neutral; 3Y +26% vs +5%). Đúng y "crisis/bear là cơ hội tuyệt vời."

## Nhưng phần blue-chip — data hiện đại TINH CHỈNH lại giả thuyết của bạn

- **GROWTH × BLUECHIP KHÔNG multibag** (≥5x = 0%, 3Y chỉ +8%). VNM tăng vài chục lần là **giai đoạn 2005-2017 khi nó còn nhỏ/đang scale** — trước data của ta. Blue-chip VN **2016-2026 đã trưởng thành → growth không còn nhân lần được nữa.** Đúng với chính cảnh báo của bạn: "qua tăng trưởng thì giá giảm."
- **Face validity VNM = bài học cảnh báo hoàn hảo**: tất cả entry VNM 2018-2020 đều bị filter chấm "VALUE_FEAR" (trông rẻ) nhưng **peak chỉ +25%, hold −5% đến −23%** — **blue-chip rẻ nhưng đã hết tăng trưởng = bẫy giá trị**, không phải cơ hội. Cheapness vô nghĩa khi growth đã matured.
- VCS 2018-11 (VALUE_FEAR, small/mid) → peak +110%, hold +95% ✅ filter bắt được cú x2. DGC 2022-11 (BOTH) → peak +94% ✅.

## Tinh chỉnh QT v4.x rút ra (đã sắc hơn nhiều)

1. **Tín hiệu vàng = SMALL/MID + rẻ/bị-đánh-xuống + VẪN tăng trưởng (BOTH), vào trong CRISIS/BEAR** → tỉ lệ multibagger cao nhất. Đây là "công thức VCS/DGC."
2. **Blue-chip: cheapness KHÔNG đủ — phải còn tăng trưởng thực sự**; blue-chip rẻ + growth matured = bẫy (VNM). → với blue-chip, yêu cầu growth đang mạnh + exit khi growth giảm tốc.
3. **Growth-một-mình (không rẻ) yếu** ở cả hai quy mô trong data hiện đại.

**Caveat trung thực:** ô BOTH×SMALLMID chỉ N=19 (gợi ý, chưa chắc chắn thống kê); cửa sổ 3Y cắt ngắn multibagger thật (VCS/DGC 10-20x chạy 4-8 năm → ≥5x bị đếm thiếu); không test được entry gốc VCS-2014/DGC-2015/VNM-pre2017 do giới hạn data giá.

## Two-archetype refinement (user insight 2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_archetypes.py`)
User: entry must differ by company type — (A) VALUE_FEAR = quality priced cheap by crisis/sector-misunderstanding/incident (VCS 2014, DGC 2015/2019 → 10-20x); (B) GROWTH_BLUECHIP = blue-chip still in strong-growth phase, no cheap needed (VNM 2005-17 dozens×), exit when growth matures. Test (621 events, 70 tk, multibagger metric = peak drawup within 3Y):
- **Multibagger sweet spot = BOTH × SMALL/MID** (cheap/beaten AND still growing, small/mid): N=19, peak med +150%, 3Y +56%, **≥2x 63% / ≥3x 32% / ≥5x 11%**, beat 53% — exactly the VCS/DGC formula. Growth-alone OR value-alone each much weaker.
- **CRISIS/BEAR timing boosts VALUE_FEAR** (confirms user): CRISIS 3Y +26%/≥3x 16%, BEAR +24%/≥3x 14% vs NEUTRAL +5%/9%. Buy cheap quality in fear = best.
- **REFINES user on blue-chips**: GROWTH×BLUECHIP did NOT multibag in 2016-26 (≥5x 0%, 3Y +8%) — VN blue-chips now MATURE; VNM's dozens-× was pre-2017 (smaller/scaling, before data). **Cheap mature blue-chip = VALUE TRAP**: VNM 2018-20 all flagged VALUE_FEAR (looked cheap) but peak +25%/hold −5 to −23% — cheapness meaningless once growth matured. → for blue-chips require ACTIVE growth + exit on growth deceleration (missing exit: current GROWTH_BROKEN needs −15% decline, not deceleration). Face validity: VCS 2018-11 VALUE_FEAR→+95%✅, DGC 2022-11 BOTH→+42%✅.
- **QT v4.x direction**: golden signal = small/mid quality + cheap/beaten + still-growing, entered in CRISIS/BEAR; blue-chips need growth-not-cheapness + growth-decel exit; growth-alone weak. Caveats: BOTH cell N=19 (suggestive); 3Y window undercounts true multibaggers (VCS/DGC 10-20x run 4-8y); can't test pre-2017 VNM/VCS-2014/DGC-2015 (panel price start). Files: qt_v4x_archetypes.py, data/qt_v4x_events.csv.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
---
name: qt-v4-eventstudy-2026
description: "QT v4 (Buffett) filter measured as per-signal event study (not portfolio) — long-horizon edge is real, VALUE>>GARP, OVERVALUED exit is gold"
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: 23c2ffe0-ced2-4d30-bcff-e0b6aa1c8435
---

# QT v4 (Buffett) filter — per-signal event study (2026-05-29)

User reframe (correct, fixes prior mistake): stop measuring FA/quality filters as portfolio NAV (capacity/cash/Sharpe/Calmar obscure the signal). Measure the QUALITY OF THE PICKS at the stock/event level — when to buy, long-horizon outcome, when to exit. Script: `qt_v4_eventstudy.py` (reuses backtest_qt_v4 signal defs + data: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl, fa_ratings_lh.csv, qt_v4_fin.pkl). Equal-weight per signal, unlimited capital, point-in-time fwd returns. Output: `data/qt_v4_eventstudy.md`, `data/qt_v4_events.csv`.

**QT v4 = Buffett quality-compounder filter**: universe ≥70% A/B tier (≥12Q hist), latest A/B, liq≥5B/d. Entry OR{VALUE: (pe_z<−1|pb_z<−1|dd52w<−30)&not-falling-knife; GARP: PEG∈(0,1]&NP_R≥20%&Rev_YoY≥20%&PE<25&>MA200}. Exit OR{FA_DEGRADE tier→C/D/E; OVERVALUED pe_z>2.5&pb_z>1.5; GROWTH_BROKEN 2Q NP&Rev<−15%}.

## Findings (628 entry events, 62 tickers, 2016→2026)
- **Edge is REAL but LONG-horizon** (confirms the whole session's thesis, now clean at stock level): fwd median/mean/win, excess-vs-VNINDEX: 3M +2.0%/−1.8exc/beat45% → 1Y +1.0%/−5.1exc/beat44% (LAGS index through 1Y) → 2Y +11.2%/−1.6exc (matches) → **3Y +30.4%/+52.0mean/win65%/+7.2pp exc/beat54% (BEATS index only at 3Y)**. The picks need ~3 years; portfolio-NAV sims (1-2Y, capacity-bound) structurally couldn't show this.
- **VALUE path >> GARP path**: VALUE 1Y +4.8%/2Y +15.0%; **GARP 1Y −8.9%/2Y +0.9%/beat-VNI only 24-27%** (drag). For a long-horizon quality filter, buy-cheap beats buy-growth. → drop/rework GARP.
- **Exit: OVERVALUED is GOLD, FA_DEGRADE exits too early.** OVERVALUED (n=116): median **+81.4%**, **96% win**, hold 561d — let winners run, sell when expensive (pure Buffett). FA_DEGRADE (n=217): median −2.3%/win44% (fires after damage). GROWTH_BROKEN (n=77): median −3.0%/win34% (defensive). Overall rule-exit (mean +27%, ~9mo hold) << hold-3Y (+52%) → **rules exit too early, cut compounders** (esp. FA_DEGRADE on a single-quarter tier slip).

## Actionable refinement hypotheses (for a QT v4.x — NOT yet validated)
(a) emphasize VALUE entry, drop GARP; (b) target ~3Y hold; (c) primary exit = OVERVALUED (winner harvest); (d) make FA_DEGRADE patient (require 2 consecutive degrades or price confirmation) to stop cutting compounders. Measure refinements the SAME WAY (per-signal event study, 3Y outcome + excess vs VNI), NOT portfolio NAV.

## Caveats
Quality universe = 62 names with ≥12Q A/B history → mild survivorship (delisted/never-quality excluded by construction); edge is conditional on "already a quality name." 3Y horizon N=302 (entries ≤~2023). This is signal-quality (the right altitude for a long-term FILTER), distinct from deployable-portfolio (separate question — would need capital/position sizing, where prior sims showed capacity binds).

content.text:
Đã lưu memory đầy đủ vào `qt_v4_eventstudy_2026.md`.

## Tổng kết — insight của bạn phần lớn ĐÚNG, và được làm sắc hơn

**Xác nhận:**
- ✅ **Crisis/bear = cơ hội mua cổ tốt giá rẻ** (CRISIS 3Y +26%/≥3x 16% vs NEUTRAL +5%/9%)
- ✅ **Công thức VCS/DGC**: small/mid + rẻ/bị-đánh-xuống + **vẫn tăng trưởng** = sweet spot multibagger (63% x2, 32% x3)
- ✅ Filter bắt được thực tế: VCS 2018 +95%, DGC 2022 +42%

**Tinh chỉnh (data hiện đại nói khác một chút):**
- ⚠️ **Blue-chip + growth KHÔNG còn nhân lần** ở 2016-2026 — VNM tăng vài chục lần là thời 2005-2017 khi còn nhỏ; blue-chip VN giờ đã trưởng thành
- ⚠️ **VNM = bài học bẫy giá trị hoàn hảo**: rẻ nhưng growth đã hết → −5 đến −23%. **Với blue-chip, cheapness vô nghĩa nếu hết tăng trưởng** — đúng ý "qua tăng trưởng giá giảm" của bạn, và nó nói rõ: blue-chip phải đòi *growth còn sống*, không phải *rẻ*.

**Công thức QT v4.x đang dần hình thành:**
> Tín hiệu vàng = **small/mid quality + rẻ/bị-sợ-hãi + vẫn tăng trưởng, vào trong CRISIS/BEAR**. Blue-chip: đòi growth-đang-mạnh (không phải rẻ) + thoát khi growth giảm tốc. Growth-một-mình: yếu.

**Hai bước tiếp hợp lý** (khi bạn muốn):
1. **Mở rộng cửa sổ lên 4-5 năm** — 3Y đang đếm thiếu multibagger thật (VCS/DGC chạy 4-8 năm, ≥5x bị cắt). Sẽ thấy rõ hơn tail "ăn bằng lần."
2. **Dựng signal QT v4.x** đúng công thức trên + thêm **exit growth-deceleration** (bài học VNM mà QT v4 hiện thiếu — GROWTH_BROKEN chỉ bắt suy giảm −15%, không bắt giảm tốc), rồi event-study lại.

Bạn muốn tôi làm bước nào trước — mở rộng horizon để nhìn rõ multibagger, hay dựng luôn QT v4.x với 2 archetype + exit mới?

content: mở rộng horizon là hợp lý. với bạn có thể xem MWG, DGW, hoặc FRT, VTP vào thời kỳ tăng tốc thì chỉ số giá được định rất cao, kết quả vẫn duy trì được tăng trưởng thì cổ phiếu vẫn tăng bằng lần. Khi nào giảm tốc, thì hệ số định giá sẽ điều chỉnh lại ngay

content.text:
Insight này quan trọng — và nó **thách thức trực tiếp** phát hiện "OVERVALUED exit = vàng" của tôi. Bạn đang mô tả nhóm **growth hypergrowth (MWG/DGW/FRT/VTP)**: trong pha tăng tốc, **PE/PB rất cao là CHẤP NHẬN ĐƯỢC** miễn growth duy trì → cổ vẫn nhân lần. **Exit không phải khi đắt, mà khi GIẢM TỐC** — vì lúc đó multiple tự de-rate ngay. Nếu áp OVERVALUED exit (pe_z>2.5) lên nhóm này sẽ **cắt winner quá sớm**.

→ Exit phải **theo archetype**: VALUE names → bán khi đắt (mean-revert); GROWTH names → bán khi **growth giảm tốc** (không phải khi đắt).

Tôi mở rộng horizon lên **5 năm** (bắt đúng các run dài) + thêm 4 mã này vào face-validity + dùng **growth bền vững** (2 quý liên tiếp). Kiểm tra mã có trong data trước.

content.text:
**Phát hiện bug nghiêm trọng — dữ liệu giá panel bị hỏng.** BQ (Close điều chỉnh) cho MWG: 2015 = 11,420 → 2026 = **82,400 (7.2x thật)**. Nhưng `qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl` **đóng băng ở 14,780** từ 2021 trở đi (cùng một giá trị cho 2021/2024/2026). 

→ **Toàn bộ event-study QT v4 + archetype tôi vừa chạy dùng giá panel STALE/hỏng** → forward returns, multibagger, outcome VCS/DGC/MWG đều **không đáng tin**. Tôi phải nói thẳng điều này. Kiểm tra mức độ hỏng rồi rebuild giá từ BQ (như các script fa_horizon đã làm đúng).

input.command:
cd "C:/Users/hotro/OneDrive/Pictures/Documents/WorkingClaude" && python -c "
import sys; sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8')
import pickle,pandas as pd,numpy as np
p=pickle.load(open('qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl','rb')); p['time']=pd.to_datetime(p['time'])
# for each ticker, last date where Close changes (detect frozen tail)
frozen=0; total=0; examples=[]
for tk,g in p.groupby('ticker'):
    g=g.sort_values('time')
    if len(g)<50: continue
    total+=1
    # last 60 rows all identical Close => frozen
    tail=g['Close'].tail(60)
    if tail.nunique()<=2 and g['time'].max()>=pd.Timestamp('2025-01-01'):
        frozen+=1
        if len(examples)<8: examples.append((tk,str(g['time'].max().date()),tail.iloc[-1]))
print(f'tickers with frozen recent Close tail: {frozen}/{total}')
print('examples:',examples)
# overall: how many distinct Close values in 2024+ vs 2024+ rows
r24=p[p['time']>='2024-01-01']
print('2024+ rows',len(r24),'but check a normal ticker FPT:')
g=p[p.ticker=='FPT'].sort_values('time')

Các script event-study dùng **positional indexing i+H trên dữ liệu đã sort** nên **kết quả QT v4 + archetype vẫn hợp lệ**. Tôi đã hoảng vì một bug trong chính câu lệnh kiểm tra của mình.

Giờ làm đúng việc bạn yêu cầu: **mở rộng horizon lên 5 năm** + thêm MWG/DGW/FRT/VTP + cho thấy pe_z lúc entry (kiểm chứng "growth thì đắt nhưng OK").

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
qt_v4x_archetypes.py — two multibagger archetypes (user insight 2026-05-29)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
User: entry condition must differ by company type.
  A) VALUE_FEAR  — quality intact but priced cheap/beaten/ignored (crisis, sector
     misunderstood, one-off incident scare). Pattern: VCS 2014, DGC 2015/2019.
     → needs CHEAP + fear (esp. CRISIS/BEAR state).
  B) GROWTH_BLUECHIP — established blue-chip STILL in strong-growth phase. Pattern:
     VNM 2005-2017 (~dozens×). → does NOT need cheap, just strong growth; exit when
     growth matures.

Tests, per (entry_type × size-class), at the STOCK level (event study, no portfolio):
  - 3Y point return + PEAK return within 3Y (captures "ăn bằng lần")
  - multibagger rates: peak ≥ +100% / +200% / +400% within 3Y
  - beat-VNINDEX
Hypothesis: GROWTH works for BLUECHIP (not cheap needed); VALUE_FEAR works for
SMALL/MID (cheap needed); GROWTH alone weak for small/mid.

Data: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl + fa_ratings_lh.csv (tier, MktCap) + qt_v4_fin.pkl + DT5G.
Caveat: panel prices start 2014 (VCS 2015-11, DGC 2018-12) → cannot capture the
original VCS-2014 / DGC-2015 entries; tests the archetype across 2016-2026.
Output: data/qt_v4x_archetypes.md
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile, pickle
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd

WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"
BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
STATE={1:"CRISIS",2:"BEAR",3:"NEUTRAL",4:"BULL",5:"EX-BULL"}
FWD=756  # 3Y window for peak/multibagger

def bq_query(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try:
        cmd=f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=200000'
        r=subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=600,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

def main():
    lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
    fa=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"fa_ratings_lh.csv"),parse_dates=["time","Release_Date"])
    fa=fa.sort_values(["ticker","quarter"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    fa["eff_release"]=fa["Release_Date"].fillna(fa["time"]+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fa["is_ab"]=fa["tier"].isin(["A","B"]).astype(int)
    fa["qnum"]=fa.groupby("ticker").cumcount()+1
    fa["pct_AB"]=fa.groupby("ticker")["is_ab"].cumsum()/fa["qnum"]*100
    fa["valid_hist"]=fa["qnum"]>=12

    panel=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl"),"rb"))
    panel["time"]=pd.to_datetime(panel["time"]); panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    panel["hi52"]=panel.groupby("ticker")["Close"].transform(lambda x:x.rolling(252,min_periods=60).max())
    panel["dd52"]=(panel["Close"]/panel["hi52"]-1)*100
    panel["pe_z"]=((panel["PE"]-panel["PE_MA5Y"])/panel["PE_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["pb_z"]=((panel["PB"]-panel["PB_MA5Y"])/panel["PB_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["liqv"]=panel["Volume_3M_P50"]*panel["Close"]

    fin=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_v4_fin.pkl"),"rb"))
    fin["eff_release"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]).fillna(pd.to_datetime(fin["q_time"])+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fin=fin.sort_values(["ticker","eff_release"])

    panel=panel.sort_values("time")
    fa_a=fa.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","tier","pct_AB","valid_hist","MktCap"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fa_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    fin_a=fin.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","PEG","NP_R","Revenue_YoY_P0"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fin_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")

    # DT5G state
    st=bq_query("SELECT s.time,s.state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live AS s ORDER BY s.time")
    st["time"]=pd.to_datetime(st["time"])
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel.sort_values("time"),st.sort_values("time"),on="time",direction="backward")
    panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)

    # quality gate + size class (cross-sectional MktCap tercile among quality names per day)
    panel["qok"]=(panel["pct_AB"]>=70)&(panel["valid_hist"])&(panel["tier"].isin(["A","B"]))&(panel["liqv"]>=5e9)
    panel["mc_pct"]=panel[panel["qok"]].groupby("time")["MktCap"].rank(pct=True)
    panel["mc_pct"]=panel["mc_pct"]  # NaN for non-qok rows
    panel["size_class"]=np.where(panel["mc_pct"]>=0.667,"BLUECHIP",
                          np.where(panel["mc_pct"].notna(),"SMALLMID",None))

    # two entry signals (quality gated)
    panel["sig_growth"]=panel["qok"]&(panel["NP_R"]>=0.20)&(panel["Revenue_YoY_P0"]>=0.20)
    panel["sig_value"]=panel["qok"]&((panel["pe_z"]<-1)|(panel["pb_z"]<-1)|(panel["dd52"]<-30))

    vni=bq_query("SELECT t.time,t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time>='2014-01-01' AND t.Close>100 ORDER BY t.time")
    vni["time"]=pd.to_datetime(vni["time"]); vni_s=vni.set_index("time")["Close"]
    def vni_fwd(d,H):
        i=vni_s.index.searchsorted(d); j=i+H
        return (vni_s.iloc[j]/vni_s.iloc[i]-1)*100 if i<len(vni_s) and j<len(vni_s) else np.nan

    # build events: fresh trigger of (growth OR value)
    events=[]
    for tk,g in panel.groupby("ticker"):
        g=g.reset_index(drop=True)
        sg=g["sig_growth"].values; sv=g["sig_value"].values; any_s=sg|sv
        cl=g["Close"].values; tm=g["time"].values
        for i in range(len(g)):
            if any_s[i] and (i==0 or not any_s[i-1]):
                ep=cl[i]
                if not np.isfinite(ep) or ep<=0: continue
                etype="BOTH" if (sg[i] and sv[i]) else ("GROWTH" if sg[i] else "VALUE_FEAR")
                end=min(i+FWD,len(g)-1)
                fwd=cl[i+1:end+1]; fwd=fwd[np.isfinite(fwd)]
                peak=(np.max(fwd)/ep-1)*100 if len(fwd) else np.nan
                r3y=(cl[end]/ep-1)*100 if np.isfinite(cl[end]) else np.nan
                events.append({"ticker":tk,"date":pd.Timestamp(tm[i]),"etype":etype,
                    "size":g["size_class"].values[i],"state":g["state"].values[i],
                    "MktCap_B":g["MktCap"].values[i]/1e9,"peak_3Y":peak,"r_3Y":r3y,
                    "fwd_days":(pd.Timestamp(tm[end])-pd.Timestamp(tm[i])).days,
                    "vni_3Y":vni_fwd(pd.Timestamp(tm[i]),min(FWD,end-i))})
    ev=pd.DataFrame(events)
    ev["exc_3Y"]=ev["r_3Y"]-ev["vni_3Y"]

    P("# QT v4.x — two multibagger archetypes (VALUE_FEAR vs GROWTH_BLUECHIP)")
    P("")
    P(f"events {len(ev):,} | tickers {ev['ticker'].nunique()} | {ev['date'].min().date()}→{ev['date'].max().date()}")
    P(f"(peak_3Y = max drawup within 3Y = the 'ăn bằng lần' opportunity; r_3Y = disciplined 3Y hold)")
    P("")

    def cell(g):
        n=len(g)
        return (f"{n:>5}{g['peak_3Y'].median():>+9.0f}%{g['r_3Y'].median():>+9.0f}%"
                f"{100*(g['peak_3Y']>=100).mean():>7.0f}%{100*(g['peak_3Y']>=200).mean():>7.0f}%"
                f"{100*(g['peak_3Y']>=400).mean():>7.0f}%{100*(g['exc_3Y']>0).mean():>8.0f}%")

    P("## Entry archetype × size class")
    P(f"{'cell':<26}{'N':>5}{'peakMed':>9}{'3YMed':>9}{'≥2x%':>7}{'≥3x%':>7}{'≥5x%':>7}{'beatVNI':>8}")
    P("-"*78)
    for et in ["GROWTH","VALUE_FEAR","BOTH"]:
        for sz in ["BLUECHIP","SMALLMID"]:
            g=ev[(ev["etype"]==et)&(ev["size"]==sz)]
            if len(g)<8: continue
            P(f"{et+' × '+sz:<26}"+cell(g))
    P("")
    P("## By size class only (all entries)")
    for sz in ["BLUECHIP","SMALLMID"]:
        g=ev[ev["size"]==sz]
        if len(g)>=8: P(f"{sz:<26}"+cell(g))
    P("")
    P("## VALUE_FEAR by entry STATE (does crisis/bear boost it?)")
    P(f"{'state':<26}{'N':>5}{'peakMed':>9}{'3YMed':>9}{'≥2x%':>7}{'≥3x%':>7}{'≥5x%':>7}{'beatVNI':>8}")
    vf=ev[ev["etype"].isin(["VALUE_FEAR","BOTH"])]
    for s in [1,2,3,4,5]:
        g=vf[vf["state"]==s]
        if len(g)>=8: P(f"{STATE[s]:<26}"+cell(g))
    P("")

    # face validity
    P("## Face validity — VCS / DGC / VNM entries caught by the filter")
    for tk in ["VCS","DGC","VNM"]:
        g=ev[ev["ticker"]==tk].sort_values("date")
        if len(g)==0: P(f"  {tk}: no events (panel price start limits)"); continue
        P(f"  {tk} ({len(g)} events):")
        for _,r in g.head(6).iterrows():
            P(f"    {r['date'].date()} {r['etype']:<10} {r['size'] or '?':<8} "
              f"MktCap={r['MktCap_B']:.0f}B  peak3Y={r['peak_3Y']:+.0f}%  hold3Y={r['r_3Y']:+.0f}%")
    P("")
    ev.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_events.csv"),index=False)
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_archetypes.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))
    P("Saved data/qt_v4x_archetypes.md + data/qt_v4x_events.csv")

if __name__=="__main__":
    main()

    panel["sig_value"]=panel["qok"]&((panel["pe_z"]<-1)|(panel["pb_z"]<-1)|(panel["dd52"]<-30))

    vni["time"]=pd.to_datetime(vni["time"]); vni_s=vni.set_index("time")["Close"]
    def vni_fwd(d,H):

        return (vni_s.iloc[j]/vni_s.iloc[i]-1)*100 if i<len(vni_s) and j<len(vni_s) else np.nan

                end=min(i+FWD,len(g)-1)
                fwd=cl[i+1:end+1]; fwd=fwd[np.isfinite(fwd)]
                peak=(np.max(fwd)/ep-1)*100 if len(fwd) else np.nan
                r3y=(cl[end]/ep-1)*100 if np.isfinite(cl[end]) else np.nan
                events.append({"ticker":tk,"date":pd.Timestamp(tm[i]),"etype":etype,
                    "size":g["size_class"].values[i],"state":g["state"].values[i],
                    "MktCap_B":g["MktCap"].values[i]/1e9,"peak_3Y":peak,"r_3Y":r3y,
                    "fwd_days":(pd.Timestamp(tm[end])-pd.Timestamp(tm[i])).days,
                    "vni_3Y":vni_fwd(pd.Timestamp(tm[i]),min(FWD,end-i))})
    ev=pd.DataFrame(events)
    ev["exc_3Y"]=ev["r_3Y"]-ev["vni_3Y"]

    P("# QT v4.x — two multibagger archetypes (VALUE_FEAR vs GROWTH_BLUECHIP)")
    P("")
    P(f"events {len(ev):,} | tickers {ev['ticker'].nunique()} | {ev['date'].min().date()}→{ev['date'].max().date()}")

              f"MktCap={r['MktCap_B']:.0f}B  peak3Y={r['peak_3Y']:+.0f}%  hold3Y={r['r_3Y']:+.0f}%")
    P("")
    ev.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_events.csv"),index=False)
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_archetypes.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
qt_v4x_archetypes.py — two multibagger archetypes (user insight 2026-05-29)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
User: entry condition must differ by company type.
  A) VALUE_FEAR  — quality intact but priced cheap/beaten/ignored (crisis, sector
     misunderstood, one-off incident scare). Pattern: VCS 2014, DGC 2015/2019.
     → needs CHEAP + fear (esp. CRISIS/BEAR state).
  B) GROWTH_BLUECHIP — established blue-chip STILL in strong-growth phase. Pattern:
     VNM 2005-2017 (~dozens×). → does NOT need cheap, just strong growth; exit when
     growth matures.

Tests, per (entry_type × size-class), at the STOCK level (event study, no portfolio):
  - 3Y point return + PEAK return within 3Y (captures "ăn bằng lần")
  - multibagger rates: peak ≥ +100% / +200% / +400% within 3Y
  - beat-VNINDEX
Hypothesis: GROWTH works for BLUECHIP (not cheap needed); VALUE_FEAR works for
SMALL/MID (cheap needed); GROWTH alone weak for small/mid.

Data: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl + fa_ratings_lh.csv (tier, MktCap) + qt_v4_fin.pkl + DT5G.
Caveat: panel prices start 2014 (VCS 2015-11, DGC 2018-12) → cannot capture the
original VCS-2014 / DGC-2015 entries; tests the archetype across 2016-2026.
Output: data/qt_v4x_archetypes.md
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile, pickle
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd

WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"
BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
STATE={1:"CRISIS",2:"BEAR",3:"NEUTRAL",4:"BULL",5:"EX-BULL"}
FWD=1260  # 5Y window for peak/multibagger (captures the real VCS/DGC/MWG runs)

def bq_query(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try:
        cmd=f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=200000'
        r=subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=600,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

def main():
    lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
    fa=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"fa_ratings_lh.csv"),parse_dates=["time","Release_Date"])
    fa=fa.sort_values(["ticker","quarter"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    fa["eff_release"]=fa["Release_Date"].fillna(fa["time"]+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fa["is_ab"]=fa["tier"].isin(["A","B"]).astype(int)
    fa["qnum"]=fa.groupby("ticker").cumcount()+1
    fa["pct_AB"]=fa.groupby("ticker")["is_ab"].cumsum()/fa["qnum"]*100
    fa["valid_hist"]=fa["qnum"]>=12

    panel=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl"),"rb"))
    panel["time"]=pd.to_datetime(panel["time"]); panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    panel["hi52"]=panel.groupby("ticker")["Close"].transform(lambda x:x.rolling(252,min_periods=60).max())
    panel["dd52"]=(panel["Close"]/panel["hi52"]-1)*100
    panel["pe_z"]=((panel["PE"]-panel["PE_MA5Y"])/panel["PE_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["pb_z"]=((panel["PB"]-panel["PB_MA5Y"])/panel["PB_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["liqv"]=panel["Volume_3M_P50"]*panel["Close"]

    fin=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_v4_fin.pkl"),"rb"))
    fin["eff_release"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]).fillna(pd.to_datetime(fin["q_time"])+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fin=fin.sort_values(["ticker","eff_release"])

    panel=panel.sort_values("time")
    fa_a=fa.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","tier","pct_AB","valid_hist","MktCap"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fa_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    fin_a=fin.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","PEG","NP_R","Revenue_YoY_P0"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fin_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")

    # DT5G state
    st=bq_query("SELECT s.time,s.state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live AS s ORDER BY s.time")
    st["time"]=pd.to_datetime(st["time"])
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel.sort_values("time"),st.sort_values("time"),on="time",direction="backward")
    panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)

    # quality gate + size class (cross-sectional MktCap tercile among quality names per day)
    panel["qok"]=(panel["pct_AB"]>=70)&(panel["valid_hist"])&(panel["tier"].isin(["A","B"]))&(panel["liqv"]>=5e9)
    panel["mc_pct"]=panel[panel["qok"]].groupby("time")["MktCap"].rank(pct=True)
    panel["mc_pct"]=panel["mc_pct"]  # NaN for non-qok rows
    panel["size_class"]=np.where(panel["mc_pct"]>=0.667,"BLUECHIP",
                          np.where(panel["mc_pct"].notna(),"SMALLMID",None))

    # two entry signals (quality gated)
    panel["sig_growth"]=panel["qok"]&(panel["NP_R"]>=0.20)&(panel["Revenue_YoY_P0"]>=0.20)
    panel["sig_value"]=panel["qok"]&((panel["pe_z"]<-1)|(panel["pb_z"]<-1)|(panel["dd52"]<-30))

    vni=bq_query("SELECT t.time,t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time>='2014-01-01' AND t.Close>100 ORDER BY t.time")
    vni["time"]=pd.to_datetime(vni["time"]); vni_s=vni.set_index("time")["Close"]
    def vni_fwd(d,H):
        i=vni_s.index.searchsorted(d); j=i+H
        return (vni_s.iloc[j]/vni_s.iloc[i]-1)*100 if i<len(vni_s) and j<len(vni_s) else np.nan

    # build events: fresh trigger of (growth OR value)
    events=[]
    for tk,g in panel.groupby("ticker"):
        g=g.reset_index(drop=True)
        sg=g["sig_growth"].values; sv=g["sig_value"].values; any_s=sg|sv
        cl=g["Close"].values; tm=g["time"].values
        for i in range(len(g)):
            if any_s[i] and (i==0 or not any_s[i-1]):
                ep=cl[i]
                if not np.isfinite(ep) or ep<=0: continue
                etype="BOTH" if (sg[i] and sv[i]) else ("GROWTH" if sg[i] else "VALUE_FEAR")
                end=min(i+FWD,len(g)-1)
                fwd=cl[i+1:end+1]; fwd=fwd[np.isfinite(fwd)]
                peak=(np.max(fwd)/ep-1)*100 if len(fwd) else np.nan
                r3y=(cl[end]/ep-1)*100 if np.isfinite(cl[end]) else np.nan
                events.append({"ticker":tk,"date":pd.Timestamp(tm[i]),"etype":etype,
                    "size":g["size_class"].values[i],"state":g["state"].values[i],
                    "pe_z_entry":g["pe_z"].values[i],
                    "MktCap_B":g["MktCap"].values[i]/1e9,"peak_pk":peak,"r_hold":r3y,
                    "fwd_days":(pd.Timestamp(tm[end])-pd.Timestamp(tm[i])).days,
                    "vni_h":vni_fwd(pd.Timestamp(tm[i]),min(FWD,end-i))})
    ev=pd.DataFrame(events)
    ev["exc"]=ev["r_hold"]-ev["vni_h"]

    P("# QT v4.x — two multibagger archetypes (VALUE_FEAR vs GROWTH_BLUECHIP)")
    P("")
    P(f"events {len(ev):,} | tickers {ev['ticker'].nunique()} | {ev['date'].min().date()}→{ev['date'].max().date()}")
    P(f"(peak_3Y = max drawup within 3Y = the 'ăn bằng lần' opportunity; r_3Y = disciplined 3Y hold)")
    P("")

    def cell(g):
        n=len(g)
        return (f"{n:>5}{g['peak_3Y'].median():>+9.0f}%{g['r_3Y'].median():>+9.0f}%"
                f"{100*(g['peak_3Y']>=100).mean():>7.0f}%{100*(g['peak_3Y']>=200).mean():>7.0f}%"
                f"{100*(g['peak_3Y']>=400).mean():>7.0f}%{100*(g['exc_3Y']>0).mean():>8.0f}%")

    P("## Entry archetype × size class")
    P(f"{'cell':<26}{'N':>5}{'peakMed':>9}{'3YMed':>9}{'≥2x%':>7}{'≥3x%':>7}{'≥5x%':>7}{'beatVNI':>8}")
    P("-"*78)
    for et in ["GROWTH","VALUE_FEAR","BOTH"]:
        for sz in ["BLUECHIP","SMALLMID"]:
            g=ev[(ev["etype"]==et)&(ev["size"]==sz)]
            if len(g)<8: continue
            P(f"{et+' × '+sz:<26}"+cell(g))
    P("")
    P("## By size class only (all entries)")
    for sz in ["BLUECHIP","SMALLMID"]:
        g=ev[ev["size"]==sz]
        if len(g)>=8: P(f"{sz:<26}"+cell(g))
    P("")
    P("## VALUE_FEAR by entry STATE (does crisis/bear boost it?)")
    P(f"{'state':<26}{'N':>5}{'peakMed':>9}{'3YMed':>9}{'≥2x%':>7}{'≥3x%':>7}{'≥5x%':>7}{'beatVNI':>8}")
    vf=ev[ev["etype"].isin(["VALUE_FEAR","BOTH"])]
    for s in [1,2,3,4,5]:
        g=vf[vf["state"]==s]
        if len(g)>=8: P(f"{STATE[s]:<26}"+cell(g))
    P("")

    # face validity
    P("## Face validity — VCS / DGC / VNM entries caught by the filter")
    for tk in ["VCS","DGC","VNM"]:
        g=ev[ev["ticker"]==tk].sort_values("date")
        if len(g)==0: P(f"  {tk}: no events (panel price start limits)"); continue
        P(f"  {tk} ({len(g)} events):")
        for _,r in g.head(6).iterrows():
            P(f"    {r['date'].date()} {r['etype']:<10} {r['size'] or '?':<8} "
              f"MktCap={r['MktCap_B']:.0f}B  peak3Y={r['peak_3Y']:+.0f}%  hold3Y={r['r_3Y']:+.0f}%")
    P("")
    ev.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_events.csv"),index=False)
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_archetypes.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))
    P("Saved data/qt_v4x_archetypes.md + data/qt_v4x_events.csv")

if __name__=="__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
qt_v4x_archetypes.py — two multibagger archetypes (user insight 2026-05-29)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
User: entry condition must differ by company type.
  A) VALUE_FEAR  — quality intact but priced cheap/beaten/ignored (crisis, sector
     misunderstood, one-off incident scare). Pattern: VCS 2014, DGC 2015/2019.
     → needs CHEAP + fear (esp. CRISIS/BEAR state).
  B) GROWTH_BLUECHIP — established blue-chip STILL in strong-growth phase. Pattern:
     VNM 2005-2017 (~dozens×). → does NOT need cheap, just strong growth; exit when
     growth matures.

Tests, per (entry_type × size-class), at the STOCK level (event study, no portfolio):
  - 3Y point return + PEAK return within 3Y (captures "ăn bằng lần")
  - multibagger rates: peak ≥ +100% / +200% / +400% within 3Y
  - beat-VNINDEX
Hypothesis: GROWTH works for BLUECHIP (not cheap needed); VALUE_FEAR works for
SMALL/MID (cheap needed); GROWTH alone weak for small/mid.

Data: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl + fa_ratings_lh.csv (tier, MktCap) + qt_v4_fin.pkl + DT5G.
Caveat: panel prices start 2014 (VCS 2015-11, DGC 2018-12) → cannot capture the
original VCS-2014 / DGC-2015 entries; tests the archetype across 2016-2026.
Output: data/qt_v4x_archetypes.md
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile, pickle
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd

WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"
BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
STATE={1:"CRISIS",2:"BEAR",3:"NEUTRAL",4:"BULL",5:"EX-BULL"}
FWD=1260  # 5Y window for peak/multibagger (captures the real VCS/DGC/MWG runs)

def bq_query(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try:
        cmd=f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=200000'
        r=subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=600,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

def main():
    lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
    fa=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"fa_ratings_lh.csv"),parse_dates=["time","Release_Date"])
    fa=fa.sort_values(["ticker","quarter"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    fa["eff_release"]=fa["Release_Date"].fillna(fa["time"]+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fa["is_ab"]=fa["tier"].isin(["A","B"]).astype(int)
    fa["qnum"]=fa.groupby("ticker").cumcount()+1
    fa["pct_AB"]=fa.groupby("ticker")["is_ab"].cumsum()/fa["qnum"]*100
    fa["valid_hist"]=fa["qnum"]>=12

    panel=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl"),"rb"))
    panel["time"]=pd.to_datetime(panel["time"]); panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    panel["hi52"]=panel.groupby("ticker")["Close"].transform(lambda x:x.rolling(252,min_periods=60).max())
    panel["dd52"]=(panel["Close"]/panel["hi52"]-1)*100
    panel["pe_z"]=((panel["PE"]-panel["PE_MA5Y"])/panel["PE_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["pb_z"]=((panel["PB"]-panel["PB_MA5Y"])/panel["PB_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["liqv"]=panel["Volume_3M_P50"]*panel["Close"]

    fin=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_v4_fin.pkl"),"rb"))
    fin["eff_release"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]).fillna(pd.to_datetime(fin["q_time"])+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fin=fin.sort_values(["ticker","eff_release"])

    panel=panel.sort_values("time")
    fa_a=fa.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","tier","pct_AB","valid_hist","MktCap"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fa_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    fin_a=fin.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","PEG","NP_R","Revenue_YoY_P0"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fin_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")

    # DT5G state
    st=bq_query("SELECT s.time,s.state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live AS s ORDER BY s.time")
    st["time"]=pd.to_datetime(st["time"])
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel.sort_values("time"),st.sort_values("time"),on="time",direction="backward")
    panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)

    # quality gate + size class (cross-sectional MktCap tercile among quality names per day)
    panel["qok"]=(panel["pct_AB"]>=70)&(panel["valid_hist"])&(panel["tier"].isin(["A","B"]))&(panel["liqv"]>=5e9)
    panel["mc_pct"]=panel[panel["qok"]].groupby("time")["MktCap"].rank(pct=True)
    panel["mc_pct"]=panel["mc_pct"]  # NaN for non-qok rows
    panel["size_class"]=np.where(panel["mc_pct"]>=0.667,"BLUECHIP",
                          np.where(panel["mc_pct"].notna(),"SMALLMID",None))

    # two entry signals (quality gated)
    panel["sig_growth"]=panel["qok"]&(panel["NP_R"]>=0.20)&(panel["Revenue_YoY_P0"]>=0.20)
    panel["sig_value"]=panel["qok"]&((panel["pe_z"]<-1)|(panel["pb_z"]<-1)|(panel["dd52"]<-30))

    vni=bq_query("SELECT t.time,t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time>='2014-01-01' AND t.Close>100 ORDER BY t.time")
    vni["time"]=pd.to_datetime(vni["time"]); vni_s=vni.set_index("time")["Close"]
    def vni_fwd(d,H):
        i=vni_s.index.searchsorted(d); j=i+H
        return (vni_s.iloc[j]/vni_s.iloc[i]-1)*100 if i<len(vni_s) and j<len(vni_s) else np.nan

    # build events: fresh trigger of (growth OR value)
    events=[]
    for tk,g in panel.groupby("ticker"):
        g=g.reset_index(drop=True)
        sg=g["sig_growth"].values; sv=g["sig_value"].values; any_s=sg|sv
        cl=g["Close"].values; tm=g["time"].values
        for i in range(len(g)):
            if any_s[i] and (i==0 or not any_s[i-1]):
                ep=cl[i]
                if not np.isfinite(ep) or ep<=0: continue
                etype="BOTH" if (sg[i] and sv[i]) else ("GROWTH" if sg[i] else "VALUE_FEAR")
                end=min(i+FWD,len(g)-1)
                fwd=cl[i+1:end+1]; fwd=fwd[np.isfinite(fwd)]
                peak=(np.max(fwd)/ep-1)*100 if len(fwd) else np.nan
                r3y=(cl[end]/ep-1)*100 if np.isfinite(cl[end]) else np.nan
                events.append({"ticker":tk,"date":pd.Timestamp(tm[i]),"etype":etype,
                    "size":g["size_class"].values[i],"state":g["state"].values[i],
                    "pe_z_entry":g["pe_z"].values[i],
                    "MktCap_B":g["MktCap"].values[i]/1e9,"peak_pk":peak,"r_hold":r3y,
                    "fwd_days":(pd.Timestamp(tm[end])-pd.Timestamp(tm[i])).days,
                    "vni_h":vni_fwd(pd.Timestamp(tm[i]),min(FWD,end-i))})
    ev=pd.DataFrame(events)
    ev["exc"]=ev["r_hold"]-ev["vni_h"]

    P("# QT v4.x — two multibagger archetypes (VALUE_FEAR vs GROWTH_BLUECHIP)")
    P("")
    P(f"events {len(ev):,} | tickers {ev['ticker'].nunique()} | {ev['date'].min().date()}→{ev['date'].max().date()}")
    P(f"(peak_pk = max drawup within 5Y = the 'ăn bằng lần' opportunity; r_hold = disciplined 5Y hold)")
    P("")

    def cell(g):
        n=len(g)
        return (f"{n:>5}{g['peak_pk'].median():>+9.0f}%{g['r_hold'].median():>+9.0f}%"
                f"{100*(g['peak_pk']>=100).mean():>7.0f}%{100*(g['peak_pk']>=200).mean():>7.0f}%"
                f"{100*(g['peak_pk']>=400).mean():>7.0f}%{100*(g['peak_pk']>=900).mean():>7.0f}%{100*(g['exc']>0).mean():>8.0f}%")

    P("## Entry archetype × size class (5Y peak/hold)")
    P(f"{'cell':<26}{'N':>5}{'peakMed':>9}{'5YMed':>9}{'≥2x%':>7}{'≥3x%':>7}{'≥5x%':>7}{'≥10x%':>7}{'beatVNI':>8}")
    P("-"*86)
    for et in ["GROWTH","VALUE_FEAR","BOTH"]:
        for sz in ["BLUECHIP","SMALLMID"]:
            g=ev[(ev["etype"]==et)&(ev["size"]==sz)]
            if len(g)<8: continue
            P(f"{et+' × '+sz:<26}"+cell(g))
    P("")
    P("## By size class only (all entries)")
    for sz in ["BLUECHIP","SMALLMID"]:
        g=ev[ev["size"]==sz]
        if len(g)>=8: P(f"{sz:<26}"+cell(g))
    P("")
    P("## VALUE_FEAR by entry STATE (does crisis/bear boost it?)")
    P(f"{'state':<26}{'N':>5}{'peakMed':>9}{'3YMed':>9}{'≥2x%':>7}{'≥3x%':>7}{'≥5x%':>7}{'beatVNI':>8}")
    vf=ev[ev["etype"].isin(["VALUE_FEAR","BOTH"])]
    for s in [1,2,3,4,5]:
        g=vf[vf["state"]==s]
        if len(g)>=8: P(f"{STATE[s]:<26}"+cell(g))
    P("")

    # face validity
    P("## Face validity — VCS / DGC / VNM entries caught by the filter")
    for tk in ["VCS","DGC","VNM"]:
        g=ev[ev["ticker"]==tk].sort_values("date")
        if len(g)==0: P(f"  {tk}: no events (panel price start limits)"); continue
        P(f"  {tk} ({len(g)} events):")
        for _,r in g.head(6).iterrows():
            P(f"    {r['date'].date()} {r['etype']:<10} {r['size'] or '?':<8} "
              f"MktCap={r['MktCap_B']:.0f}B  peak3Y={r['peak_3Y']:+.0f}%  hold3Y={r['r_3Y']:+.0f}%")
    P("")
    ev.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_events.csv"),index=False)
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_archetypes.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))
    P("Saved data/qt_v4x_archetypes.md + data/qt_v4x_events.csv")

if __name__=="__main__":
    main()

content.text:
Với cửa sổ **5 năm**, bức tranh rõ hơn hẳn và **xác nhận mạnh insight của bạn** — kể cả phần valuation:

## Archetype × quy mô (5Y peak / 5Y hold)

| Cell | N | peak | 5Y hold | ≥2x | ≥3x | ≥5x | beat VNI |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **BOTH × SMALLMID** | 19 | +174% | +91% | **63%** | **47%** | **26%** | 63% |
| VALUE_FEAR × SMALLMID | 347 | +49% | +9% | 38% | 19% | 3% | 33% |
| GROWTH × BLUECHIP | 22 | +68% | +27% | 36% | 9% | 0% | 27% |
| VALUE_FEAR × BLUECHIP | 152 | +78% | +30% | 26% | 8% | 1% | 27% |

→ Sweet spot **BOTH × small/mid** càng mạnh ở 5Y: **47% nhân ba, 26% nhân năm.**

## Valuation lúc entry — XÁC NHẬN chính xác ý bạn

| Archetype | median pe_z lúc vào |
|---|---|
| **GROWTH** | **+0.20 (ĐẮT, trên trung bình 5Y)** |
| VALUE_FEAR | −0.48 (rẻ) |
| BOTH | −1.16 (rất rẻ + đang tăng) |

→ **Growth names được mua ĐẮT (pe_z +0.20) và vẫn ăn** (GROWTH×BLUECHIP +27% 5Y). Đúng "định giá cao OK nếu tăng trưởng duy trì." Và điều này nói: **áp OVERVALUED exit (pe_z>2.5) lên nhóm growth sẽ cắt winner** — phải dùng **exit theo giảm tốc** như bạn nói.

## Face validity — các ví dụ của bạn được filter bắt

- **VTP 2023-04** VALUE_FEAR small-cap, pe_z −1.8 → **peak +554%, hold +244%** ✅✅✅ (đúng multibagger!)
- **MWG 2019-05** VALUE_FEAR → **peak +189%, hold +123%** ✅✅ (bắt được nhịp hồi MWG)
- VCS +110%, DGC +104% ✅
- **VNM = bẫy giá trị xác nhận**: blue-chip rẻ-ish, growth matured → peak chỉ +25%, hold âm. Đúng "qua tăng trưởng giá giảm."
- DGW/FRT: bị **quality gate loại** (không đủ ≥70% A/B qua ≥12Q — FRT/DGW từng có quý yếu). → gate hơi chặt, bỏ sót vài winner.

**Caveat:** không ô nào ≥10x — các 10-20x gốc (VCS-2014, DGC-2015, DGW) ở **ngoài cửa sổ data hoặc bị gate loại**; N ô BOTH chỉ 19. Nhưng VTP +554% / MWG +189% là validation thật, trong mẫu.

## 5Y horizon + growth examples (user insight 2026-05-29, FWD=1260 in qt_v4x_archetypes.py)
User: MWG/DGW/FRT/VTP in acceleration phase traded at HIGH valuation; while growth sustained, stock kept multibagging; when growth decelerates, multiple de-rates immediately → exit on DECELERATION not on high valuation.
- **5Y results sharpen the archetype**: BOTH×SMALLMID (cheap+growing small/mid) N=19, peak +174%/5Y-hold +91%, **≥2x 63% / ≥3x 47% / ≥5x 26%**, beat 63% — the VCS/DGC formula, stronger at 5Y. CRISIS entry best for VALUE_FEAR (peak +82%, ≥3x 21%).
- **Valuation-at-entry CONFIRMS user**: GROWTH median pe_z=+0.20 (EXPENSIVE, above own 5Y mean) yet still works (GROWTH×BLUECHIP +27% 5Y); VALUE_FEAR −0.48 (cheap); BOTH −1.16. → growth bought expensive is fine; **applying OVERVALUED exit (pe_z>2.5) to growth runners would cut winners** → exit must be archetype-conditional (OVERVALUED for value/mean-revert names; GROWTH-DECELERATION for growth names — de-rating follows decel).
- **Face validity (5Y peak)**: VTP 2023-04 VALUE_FEAR small-cap pe_z −1.8 → **peak +554% / hold +244%** ✅; MWG 2019-05 VALUE_FEAR → **+189%/+123%** ✅; VCS +110%, DGC +104% ✅; **VNM = value-trap confirmed** (cheap-ish blue-chip, matured growth → peak +25%, hold −5 to −17%); DGW/FRT EXCLUDED by quality gate (≥70%A/B≥12Q too strict — missed winners with quality dips).
- **DATA NOTE**: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl prices are CORRECT (verified MWG 11420→82400=7.2x matches BQ adj Close); an earlier false-alarm was a buggy ad-hoc set_index-unsorted lookup, NOT the data. Event-study scripts use sorted positional i+H indexing → valid.
- **Next**: test archetype-conditional EXIT (OVERVALUED for value vs growth-deceleration for growth); add a growth-deceleration exit (current GROWTH_BROKEN only catches −15% decline, misses decel). Caveat: ≥10x uncapturable (original VCS-2014/DGC-2015/DGW pre-data or gated); BOTH cell N=19 suggestive.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
---
name: qt-v4-eventstudy-2026
description: "QT v4 (Buffett) filter measured as per-signal event study (not portfolio) — long-horizon edge is real, VALUE>>GARP, OVERVALUED exit is gold"
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: 23c2ffe0-ced2-4d30-bcff-e0b6aa1c8435
---

# QT v4 (Buffett) filter — per-signal event study (2026-05-29)

User reframe (correct, fixes prior mistake): stop measuring FA/quality filters as portfolio NAV (capacity/cash/Sharpe/Calmar obscure the signal). Measure the QUALITY OF THE PICKS at the stock/event level — when to buy, long-horizon outcome, when to exit. Script: `qt_v4_eventstudy.py` (reuses backtest_qt_v4 signal defs + data: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl, fa_ratings_lh.csv, qt_v4_fin.pkl). Equal-weight per signal, unlimited capital, point-in-time fwd returns. Output: `data/qt_v4_eventstudy.md`, `data/qt_v4_events.csv`.

**QT v4 = Buffett quality-compounder filter**: universe ≥70% A/B tier (≥12Q hist), latest A/B, liq≥5B/d. Entry OR{VALUE: (pe_z<−1|pb_z<−1|dd52w<−30)&not-falling-knife; GARP: PEG∈(0,1]&NP_R≥20%&Rev_YoY≥20%&PE<25&>MA200}. Exit OR{FA_DEGRADE tier→C/D/E; OVERVALUED pe_z>2.5&pb_z>1.5; GROWTH_BROKEN 2Q NP&Rev<−15%}.

## Findings (628 entry events, 62 tickers, 2016→2026)
- **Edge is REAL but LONG-horizon** (confirms the whole session's thesis, now clean at stock level): fwd median/mean/win, excess-vs-VNINDEX: 3M +2.0%/−1.8exc/beat45% → 1Y +1.0%/−5.1exc/beat44% (LAGS index through 1Y) → 2Y +11.2%/−1.6exc (matches) → **3Y +30.4%/+52.0mean/win65%/+7.2pp exc/beat54% (BEATS index only at 3Y)**. The picks need ~3 years; portfolio-NAV sims (1-2Y, capacity-bound) structurally couldn't show this.
- **VALUE path >> GARP path**: VALUE 1Y +4.8%/2Y +15.0%; **GARP 1Y −8.9%/2Y +0.9%/beat-VNI only 24-27%** (drag). For a long-horizon quality filter, buy-cheap beats buy-growth. → drop/rework GARP.
- **Exit: OVERVALUED is GOLD, FA_DEGRADE exits too early.** OVERVALUED (n=116): median **+81.4%**, **96% win**, hold 561d — let winners run, sell when expensive (pure Buffett). FA_DEGRADE (n=217): median −2.3%/win44% (fires after damage). GROWTH_BROKEN (n=77): median −3.0%/win34% (defensive). Overall rule-exit (mean +27%, ~9mo hold) << hold-3Y (+52%) → **rules exit too early, cut compounders** (esp. FA_DEGRADE on a single-quarter tier slip).

## Actionable refinement hypotheses (for a QT v4.x — NOT yet validated)
(a) emphasize VALUE entry, drop GARP; (b) target ~3Y hold; (c) primary exit = OVERVALUED (winner harvest); (d) make FA_DEGRADE patient (require 2 consecutive degrades or price confirmation) to stop cutting compounders. Measure refinements the SAME WAY (per-signal event study, 3Y outcome + excess vs VNI), NOT portfolio NAV.

## Two-archetype refinement (user insight 2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_archetypes.py`)
User: entry must differ by company type — (A) VALUE_FEAR = quality priced cheap by crisis/sector-misunderstanding/incident (VCS 2014, DGC 2015/2019 → 10-20x); (B) GROWTH_BLUECHIP = blue-chip still in strong-growth phase, no cheap needed (VNM 2005-17 dozens×), exit when growth matures. Test (621 events, 70 tk, multibagger metric = peak drawup within 3Y):
- **Multibagger sweet spot = BOTH × SMALL/MID** (cheap/beaten AND still growing, small/mid): N=19, peak med +150%, 3Y +56%, **≥2x 63% / ≥3x 32% / ≥5x 11%**, beat 53% — exactly the VCS/DGC formula. Growth-alone OR value-alone each much weaker.
- **CRISIS/BEAR timing boosts VALUE_FEAR** (confirms user): CRISIS 3Y +26%/≥3x 16%, BEAR +24%/≥3x 14% vs NEUTRAL +5%/9%. Buy cheap quality in fear = best.
- **REFINES user on blue-chips**: GROWTH×BLUECHIP did NOT multibag in 2016-26 (≥5x 0%, 3Y +8%) — VN blue-chips now MATURE; VNM's dozens-× was pre-2017 (smaller/scaling, before data). **Cheap mature blue-chip = VALUE TRAP**: VNM 2018-20 all flagged VALUE_FEAR (looked cheap) but peak +25%/hold −5 to −23% — cheapness meaningless once growth matured. → for blue-chips require ACTIVE growth + exit on growth deceleration (missing exit: current GROWTH_BROKEN needs −15% decline, not deceleration). Face validity: VCS 2018-11 VALUE_FEAR→+95%✅, DGC 2022-11 BOTH→+42%✅.
- **QT v4.x direction**: golden signal = small/mid quality + cheap/beaten + still-growing, entered in CRISIS/BEAR; blue-chips need growth-not-cheapness + growth-decel exit; growth-alone weak. Caveats: BOTH cell N=19 (suggestive); 3Y window undercounts true multibaggers (VCS/DGC 10-20x run 4-8y); can't test pre-2017 VNM/VCS-2014/DGC-2015 (panel price start). Files: qt_v4x_archetypes.py, data/qt_v4x_events.csv.

## Caveats
Quality universe = 62 names with ≥12Q A/B history → mild survivorship (delisted/never-quality excluded by construction); edge is conditional on "already a quality name." 3Y horizon N=302 (entries ≤~2023). This is signal-quality (the right altitude for a long-term FILTER), distinct from deployable-portfolio (separate question — would need capital/position sizing, where prior sims showed capacity binds).

aiTitle: Review fundamental analysis for stock selection systems

content.text:
Đã lưu memory (kèm ghi chú rõ về false-alarm data để không lặp lại).

## Trạng thái hiện tại — hướng QT v4 đang RẤT có triển vọng

Insight của bạn đã được validate gần như trọn vẹn, và công thức multibagger đang thành hình rõ:

**Công thức "ăn bằng lần" (đã có bằng chứng + ví dụ thật):**
> **Small/mid + chất lượng tốt + bị định giá rẻ/sợ hãi + VẪN đang tăng trưởng, vào trong CRISIS/BEAR** → 47% nhân ba, 26% nhân năm. Ví dụ sống: VTP +554%, MWG +189%, VCS +110%, DGC +104%.

**Hai quy tắc entry phân biệt (validated):**
1. **Small/mid**: cần rẻ + tăng trưởng (BOTH) → multibagger
2. **Blue-chip**: cần **tăng trưởng đang mạnh, KHÔNG cần rẻ** (growth bought expensive pe_z +0.20 vẫn ăn); blue-chip rẻ + hết growth = **bẫy** (VNM)

**Quy tắc exit phải theo archetype (insight mới nhất của bạn — chưa test, là bước tiếp):**
- VALUE/mean-revert names → bán khi **đắt** (OVERVALUED, +81%/96% win đã đo)
- GROWTH names → bán khi **giảm tốc** (vì multiple de-rate ngay); KHÔNG bán vì đắt (sẽ cắt MWG/VTP sớm)

**Bước tiếp tự nhiên:** test **exit theo archetype** — so sánh: (a) OVERVALUED exit vs (b) growth-deceleration exit (growth_rate quý này < quý trước, hoặc tụt khỏi ngưỡng) cho nhóm GROWTH, xem cái nào giữ được winner lâu hơn / realized return cao hơn. Đồng thời thêm **growth-deceleration exit** mà QT v4 hiện thiếu (GROWTH_BROKEN chỉ bắt suy giảm −15%, không bắt giảm tốc từ +30% xuống +5%).

Đây là lần đầu trong cả phiên có một **hướng tiến thật, validate được bằng dữ liệu + ví dụ thực tế** — và nó đến từ việc reframe đúng (đo pick, không đo portfolio) cộng các insight thị trường của bạn. Bạn muốn tôi test exit-theo-archetype luôn không?

content: bạn test luôn đi

message.content: bạn test luôn đi

content.text:
Rồi — tôi test **exit theo archetype** ngay. Thiết kế: với mỗi entry event, đi tới trước tìm ngày đầu tiên từng quy tắc exit kích hoạt, đo **realized return + hold + capture ratio** (bắt được bao nhiêu % của đỉnh 5Y). So sánh các chiến lược exit, tách theo archetype.

Định nghĩa exit:
- **OVERVALUED**: pe_z>2.5 & pb_z>1.5 (bán khi đắt — hợp value names)
- **GROWTH_DECEL** (mới, QT v4 đang thiếu): NP_R<10% & Rev_YoY<10% (tăng trưởng tụt khỏi ngưỡng, *trước* khi suy giảm −15%) — hợp growth names
- **FA_DEGRADE**: tier→C/D/E
- **ARCHETYPE**: value→OVERVALUED+FA; growth→DECEL+FA

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
qt_v4x_exits.py — archetype-conditional EXIT test (user insight 2026-05-29)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Per-position event study (no portfolio). For each QT v4.x entry, find when each
exit rule fires and measure realized return + hold + CAPTURE RATIO (realized /
5Y-peak) — how much of the available run the exit harvests.

User insight: growth runners trade expensive while growing (OVERVALUED would cut
them early); they should exit on DECELERATION (multiple de-rates after). Value
names mean-revert and should exit on OVERVALUED. So exit must be archetype-conditional.

Exit rules (point-in-time, as-of fundamentals):
  OVERVALUED  : pe_z>2.5 AND pb_z>1.5
  DECEL       : NP_R<10% AND Rev_YoY<10% (growth fell below threshold — pre -15% decline)
  FA_DEGRADE  : tier → C/D/E
  GROWTH_BROKEN: NP_R<-15% AND Rev_YoY<-15% (original QT v4)

Strategies:
  HOLD_5Y      : hold to 5Y/data-end (ceiling reference)
  OVERVALUED   : exit on OVERVALUED|FA (else hold)
  DECEL        : exit on DECEL|FA (growth/both entries) (else hold)
  QTV4_ANY     : exit on OVERVALUED|FA|GROWTH_BROKEN (original)
  ARCHETYPE    : VALUE→OVERVALUED|FA ; GROWTH/BOTH→DECEL|FA
Output: data/qt_v4x_exits.md
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile, pickle
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd

WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"
BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
FWD=1260

def bq_query(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try:
        cmd=f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=200000'
        r=subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=600,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

def main():
    lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
    fa=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"fa_ratings_lh.csv"),parse_dates=["time","Release_Date"])
    fa=fa.sort_values(["ticker","quarter"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    fa["eff_release"]=fa["Release_Date"].fillna(fa["time"]+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fa["is_ab"]=fa["tier"].isin(["A","B"]).astype(int)
    fa["qnum"]=fa.groupby("ticker").cumcount()+1
    fa["pct_AB"]=fa.groupby("ticker")["is_ab"].cumsum()/fa["qnum"]*100
    fa["valid_hist"]=fa["qnum"]>=12

    panel=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl"),"rb"))
    panel["time"]=pd.to_datetime(panel["time"]); panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    panel["hi52"]=panel.groupby("ticker")["Close"].transform(lambda x:x.rolling(252,min_periods=60).max())
    panel["dd52"]=(panel["Close"]/panel["hi52"]-1)*100
    panel["pe_z"]=((panel["PE"]-panel["PE_MA5Y"])/panel["PE_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["pb_z"]=((panel["PB"]-panel["PB_MA5Y"])/panel["PB_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["liqv"]=panel["Volume_3M_P50"]*panel["Close"]

    fin=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_v4_fin.pkl"),"rb"))
    fin["eff_release"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]).fillna(pd.to_datetime(fin["q_time"])+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fin=fin.sort_values(["ticker","eff_release"])

    panel=panel.sort_values("time")
    fa_a=fa.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","tier","pct_AB","valid_hist","MktCap"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fa_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    fin_a=fin.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","PEG","NP_R","Revenue_YoY_P0"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fin_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)

    # entry signals
    qok=(panel["pct_AB"]>=70)&(panel["valid_hist"])&(panel["tier"].isin(["A","B"]))&(panel["liqv"]>=5e9)
    panel["sig_g"]=qok&(panel["NP_R"]>=0.20)&(panel["Revenue_YoY_P0"]>=0.20)
    panel["sig_v"]=qok&((panel["pe_z"]<-1)|(panel["pb_z"]<-1)|(panel["dd52"]<-30))
    # exit flags
    panel["x_ovr"]=(panel["pe_z"]>2.5)&(panel["pb_z"]>1.5)
    panel["x_decel"]=(panel["NP_R"]<0.10)&(panel["Revenue_YoY_P0"]<0.10)
    panel["x_fa"]=panel["tier"].isin(["C","D","E"])
    panel["x_gb"]=(panel["NP_R"]<-0.15)&(panel["Revenue_YoY_P0"]<-0.15)

    # events + per-strategy exits
    rows=[]
    for tk,g in panel.groupby("ticker"):
        g=g.reset_index(drop=True)
        sg=g["sig_g"].values; sv=g["sig_v"].values; anys=sg|sv
        cl=g["Close"].values
        xovr=g["x_ovr"].values; xdec=g["x_decel"].values; xfa=g["x_fa"].values; xgb=g["x_gb"].values
        n=len(g)
        for i in range(n):
            if not (anys[i] and (i==0 or not anys[i-1])): continue
            ep=cl[i]
            if not np.isfinite(ep) or ep<=0: continue
            et="BOTH" if (sg[i] and sv[i]) else ("GROWTH" if sg[i] else "VALUE_FEAR")
            end=min(i+FWD,n-1)
            fwd=cl[i+1:end+1]; fwd=fwd[np.isfinite(fwd)]
            peak=(np.max(fwd)/ep-1)*100 if len(fwd) else 0.0
            def first_exit(*flagarrs):
                comb=np.zeros(end-i,dtype=bool)
                for fl in flagarrs: comb|=fl[i+1:end+1]
                idx=np.argmax(comb) if comb.any() else None
                if idx is None: return end, (cl[end]/ep-1)*100
                j=i+1+idx
                return j,(cl[j]/ep-1)*100
            # strategies
            ovr_j,ovr_r=first_exit(xovr,xfa)
            dec_j,dec_r=first_exit(xdec,xfa)
            any_j,any_r=first_exit(xovr,xfa,xgb)
            hold_r=(cl[end]/ep-1)*100
            if et=="VALUE_FEAR": arch_r=ovr_r; arch_j=ovr_j
            else: arch_r=dec_r; arch_j=dec_j
            rows.append({"ticker":tk,"etype":et,"peak":peak,
                "HOLD_5Y":hold_r,"OVERVALUED":ovr_r,"DECEL":dec_r,"QTV4_ANY":any_r,"ARCHETYPE":arch_r,
                "hold_arch_d":int((arch_j-i)),"hold_ovr_d":int(ovr_j-i),"hold_dec_d":int(dec_j-i)})
    ev=pd.DataFrame(rows)

    P("# QT v4.x — archetype-conditional EXIT test (per-position, 5Y window)")
    P("")
    P(f"events {len(ev):,} | GROWTH+BOTH={int(ev['etype'].isin(['GROWTH','BOTH']).sum())} VALUE_FEAR={int((ev['etype']=='VALUE_FEAR').sum())}")
    P("Capture = realized exit return / 5Y peak (winners only, peak>20%). Higher = harvests more of the run.")
    P("")
    STR=["HOLD_5Y","OVERVALUED","DECEL","QTV4_ANY","ARCHETYPE"]

    def block(sub,label):
        P(f"## {label}  (N={len(sub)})")
        P(f"{'strategy':<12}{'med ret':>9}{'mean':>9}{'win%':>7}{'med capture':>13}")
        P("-"*50)
        win=sub[sub["peak"]>20]
        for s in STR:
            r=sub[s].dropna()
            cap=(win[s]/win["peak"]).replace([np.inf,-np.inf],np.nan).dropna()
            P(f"{s:<12}{r.median():>+8.1f}%{r.mean():>+8.1f}%{(r>0).mean()*100:>6.0f}%{cap.median()*100:>12.0f}%")
        P("")

    block(ev,"ALL entries")
    block(ev[ev["etype"]=="VALUE_FEAR"],"VALUE_FEAR entries (expect OVERVALUED best)")
    block(ev[ev["etype"].isin(["GROWTH","BOTH"])],"GROWTH+BOTH entries (expect DECEL > OVERVALUED)")
    P("## Median hold days by exit (GROWTH+BOTH)")
    gb=ev[ev["etype"].isin(["GROWTH","BOTH"])]
    P(f"  OVERVALUED {gb['hold_ovr_d'].median():.0f}d | DECEL {gb['hold_dec_d'].median():.0f}d | ARCHETYPE {gb['hold_arch_d'].median():.0f}d")
    P("")
    P("Read: for GROWTH+BOTH, if DECEL median ret/capture > OVERVALUED, exiting on")
    P("deceleration (not on high valuation) harvests more — confirms user's thesis.")
    P("ARCHETYPE (value→OVR, growth→DECEL) vs QTV4_ANY shows if conditional beats one-size.")
    P("")
    ev.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_exits.csv"),index=False)
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_exits.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))
    P("Saved data/qt_v4x_exits.md")

if __name__=="__main__":
    main()

content.text:
Kết quả này **đảo ngược kỳ vọng** — và là một phát hiện quan trọng, rất "Buffett".

## Mọi quy tắc exit đều THUA việc chỉ GIỮ

**Tất cả entries (N=621):**

| Strategy | median | mean | win% | capture (đỉnh) |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **HOLD_5Y** | **+14.1%** | **+44.2%** | 58% | **40%** |
| OVERVALUED | +0.5% | +18.0% | 51% | 21% |
| DECEL | −0.3% | +1.6% | 44% | 0% |
| QTV4_ANY (gốc) | −0.6% | +12.4% | 46% | 5% |
| ARCHETYPE | +1.0% | +16.3% | 51% | 17% |

**GROWTH+BOTH (test trực tiếp giả thuyết của bạn):**

| Strategy | mean | capture | hold |
|---|---|---|---|
| **HOLD_5Y** | **+41.1%** | **35%** | — |
| OVERVALUED | +14.4% | 7% | 256d |
| DECEL | +5.6% | 7% | 126d |

## Diễn giải trung thực

1. **HOLD đè bẹp mọi exit rule** (mean +44% vs tốt nhất +18%). Cho một bộ lọc quality dài hạn, **bán theo quy tắc = phá hủy giá trị** — cắt mất compounder giữa chừng.

2. **Giả thuyết "DECEL > OVERVALUED cho growth" KHÔNG đúng** — DECEL còn TỆ HƠN (mean +5.6% vs +14.4%) và thoát sớm hơn (126d vs 256d). Lý do: growth quý lumpy, một quý <10% là bị đá ra **trước khi** run thật bắt đầu lại. Exit theo decel quá nhạy.

3. **Hòa giải với phát hiện trước** ("OVERVALUED +81%/96% win"): con số đó là **ảo giác lựa chọn** — chỉ những winner mới *chạm tới* overvalued, nên subset đó đẹp; nhưng *áp* quy tắc lên tất cả thì nó thua hold (vì đa số thoát bằng FA_DEGRADE sớm, lock lỗ nhỏ).

4. **Bài học sâu nhất, đúng tinh thần Buffett**: edge của bộ lọc quality đến từ **giữ các compounder**, và bất kỳ exit sớm nào cũng cắt cụt cái đuôi phải (winner x5 bù cho nhiều kẻ thua). Lợi nhuận bất đối xứng → giữ thắng.

→ **Câu trả lời cho "khi nào thoát": gần như là ĐỪNG thoát theo các rule này.** "Our favorite holding period is forever."

**Một ngoại lệ đáng test tiếp:** loại exit duy nhất *có thể* thắng hold là **trailing-stop từ đỉnh** (không cắt sớm, chỉ chốt sau khi đã chạy lớn rồi đảo chiều) — nó khóa winner mà không truncate compounder. Các rule fundamental đều thua; trailing-from-peak là ứng viên còn lại.

## Archetype-conditional EXIT test (2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_exits.py`) — HOLD beats ALL exit rules
Per-position, 5Y window, realized return + capture ratio (realized/5Y-peak). Strategies exit on OVERVALUED|FA / DECEL(NP_R&Rev<10%)|FA / QTV4_ANY / ARCHETYPE (value→OVR, growth→DECEL) vs HOLD_5Y.
- **ALL (621): HOLD_5Y crushes every rule** — median +14.1%/mean +44.2%/capture 40% vs OVERVALUED +0.5%/+18%/21%, DECEL −0.3%/+1.6%/0%, QTV4_ANY −0.6%/+12.4%/5%, ARCHETYPE +1.0%/+16.3%/17%.
- **GROWTH+BOTH (122): user's "DECEL>OVERVALUED" NOT confirmed — DECEL is WORST** (mean +5.6% vs OVR +14.4% vs HOLD +41.1%); DECEL exits too early (126d vs OVR 256d) because quarterly growth is lumpy (one <10% quarter ejects before the run). 
- **Reconciles the earlier "OVERVALUED +81%/96%win"**: that was SELECTION illusion (only winners ever reach overvalued); applied to all positions, rule-exits lose to hold (most exit early via FA_DEGRADE, locking small losses).
- **VERDICT: for a quality-compounder filter, rule-based exits DESTROY value — HOLD wins** (right-skew: a few multibaggers compound; any early exit truncates the right tail; losses bounded at −100% but winners unbounded → asymmetry favors holding). Most Buffett-consistent result: "favorite holding period is forever." Answer to "when to exit" = essentially DON'T (on these rules).
- **Only remaining exit candidate worth testing: trailing-stop-from-peak** (doesn't cut early, only locks a big run after reversal — preserves compounders while capping round-trips). All fundamental-trigger exits lose to hold. Files: qt_v4x_exits.py, data/qt_v4x_exits.{md,csv}.

## Caveats
