---
name: qt-v4-eventstudy-2026
description: "QT v4 (Buffett) filter measured as per-signal event study (not portfolio) — long-horizon edge is real, VALUE>>GARP, OVERVALUED exit is gold"
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: 23c2ffe0-ced2-4d30-bcff-e0b6aa1c8435
---

# QT v4 (Buffett) filter — per-signal event study (2026-05-29)

User reframe (correct, fixes prior mistake): stop measuring FA/quality filters as portfolio NAV (capacity/cash/Sharpe/Calmar obscure the signal). Measure the QUALITY OF THE PICKS at the stock/event level — when to buy, long-horizon outcome, when to exit. Script: `qt_v4_eventstudy.py` (reuses backtest_qt_v4 signal defs + data: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl, fa_ratings_lh.csv, qt_v4_fin.pkl). Equal-weight per signal, unlimited capital, point-in-time fwd returns. Output: `data/qt_v4_eventstudy.md`, `data/qt_v4_events.csv`.

**QT v4 = Buffett quality-compounder filter**: universe ≥70% A/B tier (≥12Q hist), latest A/B, liq≥5B/d. Entry OR{VALUE: (pe_z<−1|pb_z<−1|dd52w<−30)&not-falling-knife; GARP: PEG∈(0,1]&NP_R≥20%&Rev_YoY≥20%&PE<25&>MA200}. Exit OR{FA_DEGRADE tier→C/D/E; OVERVALUED pe_z>2.5&pb_z>1.5; GROWTH_BROKEN 2Q NP&Rev<−15%}.

## Findings (628 entry events, 62 tickers, 2016→2026)
- **Edge is REAL but LONG-horizon** (confirms the whole session's thesis, now clean at stock level): fwd median/mean/win, excess-vs-VNINDEX: 3M +2.0%/−1.8exc/beat45% → 1Y +1.0%/−5.1exc/beat44% (LAGS index through 1Y) → 2Y +11.2%/−1.6exc (matches) → **3Y +30.4%/+52.0mean/win65%/+7.2pp exc/beat54% (BEATS index only at 3Y)**. The picks need ~3 years; portfolio-NAV sims (1-2Y, capacity-bound) structurally couldn't show this.
- **VALUE path >> GARP path**: VALUE 1Y +4.8%/2Y +15.0%; **GARP 1Y −8.9%/2Y +0.9%/beat-VNI only 24-27%** (drag). For a long-horizon quality filter, buy-cheap beats buy-growth. → drop/rework GARP.
- **Exit: OVERVALUED is GOLD, FA_DEGRADE exits too early.** OVERVALUED (n=116): median **+81.4%**, **96% win**, hold 561d — let winners run, sell when expensive (pure Buffett). FA_DEGRADE (n=217): median −2.3%/win44% (fires after damage). GROWTH_BROKEN (n=77): median −3.0%/win34% (defensive). Overall rule-exit (mean +27%, ~9mo hold) << hold-3Y (+52%) → **rules exit too early, cut compounders** (esp. FA_DEGRADE on a single-quarter tier slip).

## Actionable refinement hypotheses (for a QT v4.x — NOT yet validated)
(a) emphasize VALUE entry, drop GARP; (b) target ~3Y hold; (c) primary exit = OVERVALUED (winner harvest); (d) make FA_DEGRADE patient (require 2 consecutive degrades or price confirmation) to stop cutting compounders. Measure refinements the SAME WAY (per-signal event study, 3Y outcome + excess vs VNI), NOT portfolio NAV.

## Two-archetype refinement (user insight 2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_archetypes.py`)
User: entry must differ by company type — (A) VALUE_FEAR = quality priced cheap by crisis/sector-misunderstanding/incident (VCS 2014, DGC 2015/2019 → 10-20x); (B) GROWTH_BLUECHIP = blue-chip still in strong-growth phase, no cheap needed (VNM 2005-17 dozens×), exit when growth matures. Test (621 events, 70 tk, multibagger metric = peak drawup within 3Y):
- **Multibagger sweet spot = BOTH × SMALL/MID** (cheap/beaten AND still growing, small/mid): N=19, peak med +150%, 3Y +56%, **≥2x 63% / ≥3x 32% / ≥5x 11%**, beat 53% — exactly the VCS/DGC formula. Growth-alone OR value-alone each much weaker.
- **CRISIS/BEAR timing boosts VALUE_FEAR** (confirms user): CRISIS 3Y +26%/≥3x 16%, BEAR +24%/≥3x 14% vs NEUTRAL +5%/9%. Buy cheap quality in fear = best.
- **REFINES user on blue-chips**: GROWTH×BLUECHIP did NOT multibag in 2016-26 (≥5x 0%, 3Y +8%) — VN blue-chips now MATURE; VNM's dozens-× was pre-2017 (smaller/scaling, before data). **Cheap mature blue-chip = VALUE TRAP**: VNM 2018-20 all flagged VALUE_FEAR (looked cheap) but peak +25%/hold −5 to −23% — cheapness meaningless once growth matured. → for blue-chips require ACTIVE growth + exit on growth deceleration (missing exit: current GROWTH_BROKEN needs −15% decline, not deceleration). Face validity: VCS 2018-11 VALUE_FEAR→+95%✅, DGC 2022-11 BOTH→+42%✅.
- **QT v4.x direction**: golden signal = small/mid quality + cheap/beaten + still-growing, entered in CRISIS/BEAR; blue-chips need growth-not-cheapness + growth-decel exit; growth-alone weak. Caveats: BOTH cell N=19 (suggestive); 3Y window undercounts true multibaggers (VCS/DGC 10-20x run 4-8y); can't test pre-2017 VNM/VCS-2014/DGC-2015 (panel price start). Files: qt_v4x_archetypes.py, data/qt_v4x_events.csv.

## 5Y horizon + growth examples (user insight 2026-05-29, FWD=1260 in qt_v4x_archetypes.py)
User: MWG/DGW/FRT/VTP in acceleration phase traded at HIGH valuation; while growth sustained, stock kept multibagging; when growth decelerates, multiple de-rates immediately → exit on DECELERATION not on high valuation.
- **5Y results sharpen the archetype**: BOTH×SMALLMID (cheap+growing small/mid) N=19, peak +174%/5Y-hold +91%, **≥2x 63% / ≥3x 47% / ≥5x 26%**, beat 63% — the VCS/DGC formula, stronger at 5Y. CRISIS entry best for VALUE_FEAR (peak +82%, ≥3x 21%).
- **Valuation-at-entry CONFIRMS user**: GROWTH median pe_z=+0.20 (EXPENSIVE, above own 5Y mean) yet still works (GROWTH×BLUECHIP +27% 5Y); VALUE_FEAR −0.48 (cheap); BOTH −1.16. → growth bought expensive is fine; **applying OVERVALUED exit (pe_z>2.5) to growth runners would cut winners** → exit must be archetype-conditional (OVERVALUED for value/mean-revert names; GROWTH-DECELERATION for growth names — de-rating follows decel).
- **Face validity (5Y peak)**: VTP 2023-04 VALUE_FEAR small-cap pe_z −1.8 → **peak +554% / hold +244%** ✅; MWG 2019-05 VALUE_FEAR → **+189%/+123%** ✅; VCS +110%, DGC +104% ✅; **VNM = value-trap confirmed** (cheap-ish blue-chip, matured growth → peak +25%, hold −5 to −17%); DGW/FRT EXCLUDED by quality gate (≥70%A/B≥12Q too strict — missed winners with quality dips).
- **DATA NOTE**: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl prices are CORRECT (verified MWG 11420→82400=7.2x matches BQ adj Close); an earlier false-alarm was a buggy ad-hoc set_index-unsorted lookup, NOT the data. Event-study scripts use sorted positional i+H indexing → valid.
- **Next**: test archetype-conditional EXIT (OVERVALUED for value vs growth-deceleration for growth); add a growth-deceleration exit (current GROWTH_BROKEN only catches −15% decline, misses decel). Caveat: ≥10x uncapturable (original VCS-2014/DGC-2015/DGW pre-data or gated); BOTH cell N=19 suggestive.

## Caveats
Quality universe = 62 names with ≥12Q A/B history → mild survivorship (delisted/never-quality excluded by construction); edge is conditional on "already a quality name." 3Y horizon N=302 (entries ≤~2023). This is signal-quality (the right altitude for a long-term FILTER), distinct from deployable-portfolio (separate question — would need capital/position sizing, where prior sims showed capacity binds).

## Trạng thái hướng QT v4 — giờ đã thành một bức tranh mạch lạc, validate được

Qua việc reframe đúng (đo pick, không đo portfolio) + các insight thị trường của bạn, ta đã dựng được:

**ENTRY** (validated + ví dụ thật):
- Small/mid + rẻ/sợ-hãi + **vẫn tăng trưởng** (BOTH), vào **crisis/bear** = multibagger (≥3x 47%, ≥5x 26%) — VTP +554%, MWG +189%
- Blue-chip: cần **growth đang mạnh**, không cần rẻ (growth mua đắt pe_z +0.2 vẫn ăn); blue-chip rẻ + hết growth = bẫy (VNM)

**OUTCOME**: edge là **dài hạn** (3Y+ mới beat index); đuôi multibagger nằm ở BOTH×small/mid

**EXIT** (kết quả hôm nay, đúng tinh thần Buffett nhất):
- **Đừng thoát theo rule fundamental** — HOLD đè bẹp tất cả (mean +44% vs +18%); DECEL/OVERVALUED/FA đều cắt cụt compounder
- Lợi nhuận bất đối xứng → giữ thắng; "favorite holding period is forever"

**Một câu hỏi exit còn mở:** **trailing-stop từ đỉnh** — loại exit duy nhất có thể thắng hold vì nó không cắt sớm, chỉ khóa winner sau khi đã chạy lớn rồi đảo chiều. Đây là thứ đáng test tiếp để xem có cải thiện được trên "hold mãi mãi" không (giảm round-trip của những con rớt từ đỉnh như VNM/DGC-2022 mà vẫn giữ được VTP/MWG).

Bạn muốn tôi test **trailing-stop-from-peak** (vài mức, ví dụ −25%/−35%/−50% từ đỉnh) so với HOLD luôn không? Đó sẽ khép lại trọn vẹn câu hỏi exit.

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
qt_v4x_trailing.py — trailing-stop-from-peak exit vs HOLD (per-position, 5Y)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Prior test: all FUNDAMENTAL-trigger exits (OVERVALUED/DECEL/FA) lose to HOLD
because they cut compounders early. Trailing-stop is the remaining candidate:
it does NOT cut early — only locks a run AFTER a drawdown from the running peak,
so it preserves multibaggers (VTP/MWG) while avoiding round-trips (VNM/DGC-2022).

Per event: walk daily from entry; running_peak = cummax(Close); exit when
Close ≤ running_peak·(1−stop). Variants:
  HOLD_5Y          : hold to 5Y/data-end
  TS25/TS35/TS50   : trailing stop 25/35/50% from peak (Close-based)
  TS35_act20       : 35% trail, but only ACTIVE after peak first exceeds +20%
Metrics: median/mean realized return, win%, capture (realized/5Y-peak, winners),
median hold. By archetype. Face validity on VTP/MWG vs VNM/DGC.
Output: data/qt_v4x_trailing.md
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, pickle
import numpy as np, pandas as pd

WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
FWD=1260

def main():
    lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
    fa=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"fa_ratings_lh.csv"),parse_dates=["time","Release_Date"])
    fa=fa.sort_values(["ticker","quarter"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    fa["eff_release"]=fa["Release_Date"].fillna(fa["time"]+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fa["is_ab"]=fa["tier"].isin(["A","B"]).astype(int)
    fa["qnum"]=fa.groupby("ticker").cumcount()+1
    fa["pct_AB"]=fa.groupby("ticker")["is_ab"].cumsum()/fa["qnum"]*100
    fa["valid_hist"]=fa["qnum"]>=12

    panel=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl"),"rb"))
    panel["time"]=pd.to_datetime(panel["time"]); panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    panel["hi52"]=panel.groupby("ticker")["Close"].transform(lambda x:x.rolling(252,min_periods=60).max())
    panel["dd52"]=(panel["Close"]/panel["hi52"]-1)*100
    panel["pe_z"]=((panel["PE"]-panel["PE_MA5Y"])/panel["PE_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["pb_z"]=((panel["PB"]-panel["PB_MA5Y"])/panel["PB_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["liqv"]=panel["Volume_3M_P50"]*panel["Close"]
    fin=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_v4_fin.pkl"),"rb"))
    fin["eff_release"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]).fillna(pd.to_datetime(fin["q_time"])+pd.Timedelta(days=60))

    panel=panel.sort_values("time")
    fa_a=fa.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","tier","pct_AB","valid_hist"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fa_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    fin_a=fin.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","NP_R","Revenue_YoY_P0"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fin_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)

    qok=(panel["pct_AB"]>=70)&(panel["valid_hist"])&(panel["tier"].isin(["A","B"]))&(panel["liqv"]>=5e9)
    panel["sig_g"]=qok&(panel["NP_R"]>=0.20)&(panel["Revenue_YoY_P0"]>=0.20)
    panel["sig_v"]=qok&((panel["pe_z"]<-1)|(panel["pb_z"]<-1)|(panel["dd52"]<-30))

    def ts_exit(seg, stop, act=0.0):
        """seg = Close[entry..end]; return realized return %. act=activate trail after +act peak."""
        ep=seg[0]; runmax=np.maximum.accumulate(seg)
        thresh=runmax*(1-stop)
        active=(runmax>=ep*(1+act))
        trig=(seg<=thresh)&active; trig[0]=False
        idx=np.argmax(trig) if trig.any() else None
        px=seg[idx] if idx is not None else seg[-1]
        return (px/ep-1)*100, (idx if idx is not None else len(seg)-1)

    rows=[]
    for tk,g in panel.groupby("ticker"):
        g=g.reset_index(drop=True)
        sg=g["sig_g"].values; sv=g["sig_v"].values; anys=sg|sv; cl=g["Close"].values; n=len(g)
        for i in range(n):
            if not (anys[i] and (i==0 or not anys[i-1])): continue
            ep=cl[i]
            if not np.isfinite(ep) or ep<=0: continue
            et="BOTH" if (sg[i] and sv[i]) else ("GROWTH" if sg[i] else "VALUE_FEAR")
            end=min(i+FWD,n-1); seg=cl[i:end+1]
            seg=np.where(np.isfinite(seg),seg,np.nan)
            if np.isnan(seg).any():  # ffill within segment
                seg=pd.Series(seg).ffill().values
            peak=(np.max(seg[1:])/ep-1)*100 if len(seg)>1 else 0.0
            r={"ticker":tk,"date":g["time"].values[i],"etype":et,"peak":peak,
               "HOLD_5Y":(seg[-1]/ep-1)*100}
            for nm,st,ac in [("TS25",0.25,0),("TS35",0.35,0),("TS50",0.50,0),("TS35_act20",0.35,0.20)]:
                rr,hd=ts_exit(seg,st,ac); r[nm]=rr;
                if nm=="TS35": r["hold_ts35_d"]=hd
            rows.append(r)
    ev=pd.DataFrame(rows)
    STR=["HOLD_5Y","TS25","TS35","TS50","TS35_act20"]

    P("# QT v4.x — trailing-stop-from-peak vs HOLD (per-position, 5Y window)")
    P("")
    P(f"events {len(ev):,} | GROWTH+BOTH={int(ev['etype'].isin(['GROWTH','BOTH']).sum())} VALUE_FEAR={int((ev['etype']=='VALUE_FEAR').sum())}")
    P("Capture = realized / 5Y-peak (winners, peak>20%). Higher = harvests more of the run.")
    P("")
    def block(sub,label):
        P(f"## {label} (N={len(sub)})")
        P(f"{'strategy':<13}{'med ret':>9}{'mean':>9}{'win%':>7}{'capture':>9}")
        P("-"*47)
        win=sub[sub["peak"]>20]
        for s in STR:
            r=sub[s].dropna(); cap=(win[s]/win["peak"]).replace([np.inf,-np.inf],np.nan).dropna()
            P(f"{s:<13}{r.median():>+8.1f}%{r.mean():>+8.1f}%{(r>0).mean()*100:>6.0f}%{cap.median()*100:>8.0f}%")
        P("")
    block(ev,"ALL entries")
    block(ev[ev["etype"]=="VALUE_FEAR"],"VALUE_FEAR")
    block(ev[ev["etype"].isin(["GROWTH","BOTH"])],"GROWTH+BOTH")

    P("## Face validity — TS35 vs HOLD on key names (best entry per name)")
    P(f"{'ticker':<7}{'etype':<11}{'peak':>8}{'HOLD':>9}{'TS35':>9}{'TS25':>9}")
    for tk in ["VTP","MWG","VCS","DGC","VNM"]:
        g=ev[ev["ticker"]==tk]
        if len(g)==0: P(f"  {tk}: none"); continue
        r=g.loc[g["peak"].idxmax()]
        P(f"{tk:<7}{r['etype']:<11}{r['peak']:>+7.0f}%{r['HOLD_5Y']:>+8.0f}%{r['TS35']:>+8.0f}%{r['TS25']:>+8.0f}%")
    P("")
    P("Read: trailing-stop WINS if it keeps multibaggers (VTP/MWG TS≈peak) while")
    P("cutting round-trips (VNM/DGC TS>HOLD). Best stop = highest mean+capture vs HOLD.")
    P("")
    ev.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_trailing.csv"),index=False)
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_trailing.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))
    P("Saved data/qt_v4x_trailing.md")

if __name__=="__main__":
    main()

because they cut compounders early. Trailing-stop is the remaining candidate:
it does NOT cut early — only locks a run AFTER a drawdown from the running peak,
so it preserves multibaggers (VTP/MWG) while avoiding round-trips (VNM/DGC-2022).

Per event: walk daily from entry; running_peak = cummax(Close); exit when
Close ≤ running_peak·(1−stop). Variants:
  HOLD_5Y          : hold to 5Y/data-end
  TS25/TS35/TS50   : trailing stop 25/35/50% from peak (Close-based)
  TS35_act20       : 35% trail, but only ACTIVE after peak first exceeds +20%
Metrics: median/mean realized return, win%, capture (realized/5Y-peak, winners),
median hold. By archetype. Face validity on VTP/MWG vs VNM/DGC.
Output: data/qt_v4x_trailing.md

try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")

content.text:
Kết quả rõ và khép lại trọn vẹn câu hỏi exit.

## Trailing-stop vs HOLD

**Tất cả (N=621):**
| Strategy | median | mean | win% | capture |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **HOLD_5Y** | **+14.1%** | **+44.2%** | 58% | 40% |
| TS25 | −6.1% | +10.3% | 39% | 2% |
| TS35 | −4.1% | +18.0% | 44% | 13% |
| TS50 | −0.8% | +25.8% | 48% | 31% |
| **TS35_act20** (kích hoạt sau +20%) | +8.0% | +31.4% | 56% | 26% |

**GROWTH+BOTH:** HOLD +41.1% vẫn thắng tất cả (TS35_act20 chỉ +20.7%).

## Face validity — lộ ra CHÍNH XÁC vì sao

| Ticker | peak | HOLD | TS35 |
|---|---|---|---|
| VTP | +554% | +244% | **+316%** ✅ (khóa lời trước round-trip) |
| DGC | +104% | −14% | **+25%** ✅ (tránh round-trip) |
| **MWG** | +189% | +123% | **−4%** ❌❌ (bị đá ra ở nhịp giảm COVID giữa run) |
| VNM | +34% | −16% | −13% (≈) |

## Kết luận trung thực — HOLD vẫn thắng, exit question khép lại

1. **Không trailing-stop nào thắng HOLD tổng thể** (mean +44% vs tốt nhất +31%; HOLD thắng cả median lẫn mean). 
2. **Stop chặt (25/35%) rất tệ** (cắt sớm, median âm). **Kích hoạt-sau-khi-lãi (act20) tốt hơn hẳn** — gần bằng HOLD, drawdown thấp hơn.
3. **Vì sao**: trailing giúp các con đỉnh-rồi-đảo mượt (VTP, DGC) nhưng **phá hủy con biến động có drawdown giữa run rồi hồi (MWG bị đá ở COVID)**. Bất đối xứng: cắt nhầm **một** MWG tốn hơn tránh được **nhiều** VNM.
4. → Xuyên suốt MỌI test exit (fundamental rules + trailing): **với bộ lọc quality dài hạn, exit tối ưu = GIỮ, đừng dùng rule.** Cực kỳ nhất quán với Buffett.

**Ngoại lệ thực dụng duy nhất:** nếu bạn cần *dễ chịu về đường đi* (không chịu nổi round-trip kiểu VNM/DGC trả lại lời), **TS35_act20** là overlay ít-tệ-nhất — gần bằng HOLD về mean, drawdown/vị thế thấp hơn. Nhưng đó là **đánh đổi sở thích (return vs path-comfort), không phải edge.** Tối đa hóa lợi nhuận → HOLD.

*(Caveat: đây là per-position vốn-vô-hạn; trong portfolio giới hạn slot, stop-out để giải phóng vốn tái đầu tư có thể đổi cục diện — nhưng đó là quản lý danh mục, phần bạn đã chủ ý gác lại.)*

- Fundamental-trigger exits all lose to hold. Files: qt_v4x_exits.py, data/qt_v4x_exits.{md,csv}.

## Trailing-stop-from-peak test (2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_trailing.py`) — HOLD STILL WINS; exit question CLOSED
Per-position 5Y. ALL(621): HOLD mean +44.2%/med +14.1%/win58%/cap40% beats TS25 (+10.3%), TS35 (+18.0%), TS50 (+25.8%), and best **TS35_act20** (activate trail only after +20% gain) +31.4%/med +8.0%/win56%/cap26%. **No trailing stop beats pure HOLD on mean OR median.** Tight stops (25/35%) cut early (median negative); activation-after-gain is much better but still < HOLD. GROWTH+BOTH: HOLD +41% > all trailing (worst for trailing — volatile, gets stopped). 
- **Face validity (why)**: TS35 helped smooth toppers (VTP +316% vs HOLD +244%; DGC +25% vs −14%) but DESTROYED MWG (−4% vs +123% — stopped on COVID mid-run drawdown before the real run). Asymmetry: cutting ONE MWG costs more than avoiding several VNM round-trips.
- **DEFINITIVE EXIT VERDICT (all rules tested)**: for a quality-compounder long-term filter, optimal exit = HOLD / don't use exit rules. Maximally Buffett-consistent. Pragmatic exception: if path-comfort matters (can't stomach VNM/DGC give-backs), TS35_act20 ≈ HOLD mean with lower per-position drawdown — a preference trade (return vs path), NOT an edge. Caveat: per-position unlimited-capital; in a slot-limited portfolio, stop-out-to-redeploy could differ (= portfolio mgmt, deliberately set aside). Files: qt_v4x_trailing.py, data/qt_v4x_trailing.{md,csv}.

## Trailing-stop-from-peak test (2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_trailing.py`) — HOLD STILL WINS; exit question CLOSED
Per-position 5Y. ALL(621): HOLD mean +44.2%/med +14.1%/win58%/cap40% beats TS25 (+10.3%), TS35 (+18.0%), TS50 (+25.8%), and best **TS35_act20** (activate trail only after +20% gain) +31.4%/med +8.0%/win56%/cap26%. **No trailing stop beats pure HOLD on mean OR median.** Tight stops (25/35%) cut early (median negative); activation-after-gain is much better but still < HOLD. GROWTH+BOTH: HOLD +41% > all trailing (worst for trailing — volatile, gets stopped). 
- **Face validity (why)**: TS35 helped smooth toppers (VTP +316% vs HOLD +244%; DGC +25% vs −14%) but DESTROYED MWG (−4% vs +123% — stopped on COVID mid-run drawdown before the real run). Asymmetry: cutting ONE MWG costs more than avoiding several VNM round-trips.
- **DEFINITIVE EXIT VERDICT (all rules tested)**: for a quality-compounder long-term filter, optimal exit = HOLD / don't use exit rules. Maximally Buffett-consistent. Pragmatic exception: if path-comfort matters (can't stomach VNM/DGC give-backs), TS35_act20 ≈ HOLD mean with lower per-position drawdown — a preference trade (return vs path), NOT an edge. Caveat: per-position unlimited-capital; in a slot-limited portfolio, stop-out-to-redeploy could differ (= portfolio mgmt, deliberately set aside). ---
name: qt-v4-eventstudy-2026
description: "QT v4 (Buffett) filter measured as per-signal event study (not portfolio) — long-horizon edge is real, VALUE>>GARP, OVERVALUED exit is gold"
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: 23c2ffe0-ced2-4d30-bcff-e0b6aa1c8435
---

# QT v4 (Buffett) filter — per-signal event study (2026-05-29)

User reframe (correct, fixes prior mistake): stop measuring FA/quality filters as portfolio NAV (capacity/cash/Sharpe/Calmar obscure the signal). Measure the QUALITY OF THE PICKS at the stock/event level — when to buy, long-horizon outcome, when to exit. Script: `qt_v4_eventstudy.py` (reuses backtest_qt_v4 signal defs + data: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl, fa_ratings_lh.csv, qt_v4_fin.pkl). Equal-weight per signal, unlimited capital, point-in-time fwd returns. Output: `data/qt_v4_eventstudy.md`, `data/qt_v4_events.csv`.

**QT v4 = Buffett quality-compounder filter**: universe ≥70% A/B tier (≥12Q hist), latest A/B, liq≥5B/d. Entry OR{VALUE: (pe_z<−1|pb_z<−1|dd52w<−30)&not-falling-knife; GARP: PEG∈(0,1]&NP_R≥20%&Rev_YoY≥20%&PE<25&>MA200}. Exit OR{FA_DEGRADE tier→C/D/E; OVERVALUED pe_z>2.5&pb_z>1.5; GROWTH_BROKEN 2Q NP&Rev<−15%}.

## Findings (628 entry events, 62 tickers, 2016→2026)
- **Edge is REAL but LONG-horizon** (confirms the whole session's thesis, now clean at stock level): fwd median/mean/win, excess-vs-VNINDEX: 3M +2.0%/−1.8exc/beat45% → 1Y +1.0%/−5.1exc/beat44% (LAGS index through 1Y) → 2Y +11.2%/−1.6exc (matches) → **3Y +30.4%/+52.0mean/win65%/+7.2pp exc/beat54% (BEATS index only at 3Y)**. The picks need ~3 years; portfolio-NAV sims (1-2Y, capacity-bound) structurally couldn't show this.
- **VALUE path >> GARP path**: VALUE 1Y +4.8%/2Y +15.0%; **GARP 1Y −8.9%/2Y +0.9%/beat-VNI only 24-27%** (drag). For a long-horizon quality filter, buy-cheap beats buy-growth. → drop/rework GARP.
- **Exit: OVERVALUED is GOLD, FA_DEGRADE exits too early.** OVERVALUED (n=116): median **+81.4%**, **96% win**, hold 561d — let winners run, sell when expensive (pure Buffett). FA_DEGRADE (n=217): median −2.3%/win44% (fires after damage). GROWTH_BROKEN (n=77): median −3.0%/win34% (defensive). Overall rule-exit (mean +27%, ~9mo hold) << hold-3Y (+52%) → **rules exit too early, cut compounders** (esp. FA_DEGRADE on a single-quarter tier slip).

## Actionable refinement hypotheses (for a QT v4.x — NOT yet validated)
(a) emphasize VALUE entry, drop GARP; (b) target ~3Y hold; (c) primary exit = OVERVALUED (winner harvest); (d) make FA_DEGRADE patient (require 2 consecutive degrades or price confirmation) to stop cutting compounders. Measure refinements the SAME WAY (per-signal event study, 3Y outcome + excess vs VNI), NOT portfolio NAV.

## Two-archetype refinement (user insight 2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_archetypes.py`)
User: entry must differ by company type — (A) VALUE_FEAR = quality priced cheap by crisis/sector-misunderstanding/incident (VCS 2014, DGC 2015/2019 → 10-20x); (B) GROWTH_BLUECHIP = blue-chip still in strong-growth phase, no cheap needed (VNM 2005-17 dozens×), exit when growth matures. Test (621 events, 70 tk, multibagger metric = peak drawup within 3Y):
- **Multibagger sweet spot = BOTH × SMALL/MID** (cheap/beaten AND still growing, small/mid): N=19, peak med +150%, 3Y +56%, **≥2x 63% / ≥3x 32% / ≥5x 11%**, beat 53% — exactly the VCS/DGC formula. Growth-alone OR value-alone each much weaker.
- **CRISIS/BEAR timing boosts VALUE_FEAR** (confirms user): CRISIS 3Y +26%/≥3x 16%, BEAR +24%/≥3x 14% vs NEUTRAL +5%/9%. Buy cheap quality in fear = best.
- **REFINES user on blue-chips**: GROWTH×BLUECHIP did NOT multibag in 2016-26 (≥5x 0%, 3Y +8%) — VN blue-chips now MATURE; VNM's dozens-× was pre-2017 (smaller/scaling, before data). **Cheap mature blue-chip = VALUE TRAP**: VNM 2018-20 all flagged VALUE_FEAR (looked cheap) but peak +25%/hold −5 to −23% — cheapness meaningless once growth matured. → for blue-chips require ACTIVE growth + exit on growth deceleration (missing exit: current GROWTH_BROKEN needs −15% decline, not deceleration). Face validity: VCS 2018-11 VALUE_FEAR→+95%✅, DGC 2022-11 BOTH→+42%✅.
- **QT v4.x direction**: golden signal = small/mid quality + cheap/beaten + still-growing, entered in CRISIS/BEAR; blue-chips need growth-not-cheapness + growth-decel exit; growth-alone weak. Caveats: BOTH cell N=19 (suggestive); 3Y window undercounts true multibaggers (VCS/DGC 10-20x run 4-8y); can't test pre-2017 VNM/VCS-2014/DGC-2015 (panel price start). Files: qt_v4x_archetypes.py, data/qt_v4x_events.csv.

## 5Y horizon + growth examples (user insight 2026-05-29, FWD=1260 in qt_v4x_archetypes.py)
User: MWG/DGW/FRT/VTP in acceleration phase traded at HIGH valuation; while growth sustained, stock kept multibagging; when growth decelerates, multiple de-rates immediately → exit on DECELERATION not on high valuation.
- **5Y results sharpen the archetype**: BOTH×SMALLMID (cheap+growing small/mid) N=19, peak +174%/5Y-hold +91%, **≥2x 63% / ≥3x 47% / ≥5x 26%**, beat 63% — the VCS/DGC formula, stronger at 5Y. CRISIS entry best for VALUE_FEAR (peak +82%, ≥3x 21%).
- **Valuation-at-entry CONFIRMS user**: GROWTH median pe_z=+0.20 (EXPENSIVE, above own 5Y mean) yet still works (GROWTH×BLUECHIP +27% 5Y); VALUE_FEAR −0.48 (cheap); BOTH −1.16. → growth bought expensive is fine; **applying OVERVALUED exit (pe_z>2.5) to growth runners would cut winners** → exit must be archetype-conditional (OVERVALUED for value/mean-revert names; GROWTH-DECELERATION for growth names — de-rating follows decel).
- **Face validity (5Y peak)**: VTP 2023-04 VALUE_FEAR small-cap pe_z −1.8 → **peak +554% / hold +244%** ✅; MWG 2019-05 VALUE_FEAR → **+189%/+123%** ✅; VCS +110%, DGC +104% ✅; **VNM = value-trap confirmed** (cheap-ish blue-chip, matured growth → peak +25%, hold −5 to −17%); DGW/FRT EXCLUDED by quality gate (≥70%A/B≥12Q too strict — missed winners with quality dips).
- **DATA NOTE**: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl prices are CORRECT (verified MWG 11420→82400=7.2x matches BQ adj Close); an earlier false-alarm was a buggy ad-hoc set_index-unsorted lookup, NOT the data. Event-study scripts use sorted positional i+H indexing → valid.
- **Next**: test archetype-conditional EXIT (OVERVALUED for value vs growth-deceleration for growth); add a growth-deceleration exit (current GROWTH_BROKEN only catches −15% decline, misses decel). Caveat: ≥10x uncapturable (original VCS-2014/DGC-2015/DGW pre-data or gated); BOTH cell N=19 suggestive.

## Archetype-conditional EXIT test (2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_exits.py`) — HOLD beats ALL exit rules
Per-position, 5Y window, realized return + capture ratio (realized/5Y-peak). Strategies exit on OVERVALUED|FA / DECEL(NP_R&Rev<10%)|FA / QTV4_ANY / ARCHETYPE (value→OVR, growth→DECEL) vs HOLD_5Y.
- **ALL (621): HOLD_5Y crushes every rule** — median +14.1%/mean +44.2%/capture 40% vs OVERVALUED +0.5%/+18%/21%, DECEL −0.3%/+1.6%/0%, QTV4_ANY −0.6%/+12.4%/5%, ARCHETYPE +1.0%/+16.3%/17%.
- **GROWTH+BOTH (122): user's "DECEL>OVERVALUED" NOT confirmed — DECEL is WORST** (mean +5.6% vs OVR +14.4% vs HOLD +41.1%); DECEL exits too early (126d vs OVR 256d) because quarterly growth is lumpy (one <10% quarter ejects before the run). 
- **Reconciles the earlier "OVERVALUED +81%/96%win"**: that was SELECTION illusion (only winners ever reach overvalued); applied to all positions, rule-exits lose to hold (most exit early via FA_DEGRADE, locking small losses).
- **VERDICT: for a quality-compounder filter, rule-based exits DESTROY value — HOLD wins** (right-skew: a few multibaggers compound; any early exit truncates the right tail; losses bounded at −100% but winners unbounded → asymmetry favors holding). Most Buffett-consistent result: "favorite holding period is forever." Answer to "when to exit" = essentially DON'T (on these rules).
- **Only remaining exit candidate worth testing: trailing-stop-from-peak** (doesn't cut early, only locks a big run after reversal — preserves compounders while capping round-trips). All fundamental-trigger exits lose to hold. Files: qt_v4x_exits.py, data/qt_v4x_exits.{md,csv}.

## Caveats
Quality universe = 62 names with ≥12Q A/B history → mild survivorship (delisted/never-quality excluded by construction); edge is conditional on "already a quality name." 3Y horizon N=302 (entries ≤~2023). This is signal-quality (the right altitude for a long-term FILTER), distinct from deployable-portfolio (separate question — would need capital/position sizing, where prior sims showed capacity binds).

## Toàn cảnh QT v4.x — giờ đã là một framework hoàn chỉnh, validate đủ 3 mặt

Đây là tổng hợp tất cả những gì ta đã chứng minh được qua thread này (đo per-signal, đúng bản chất "bộ lọc DN tốt để đầu tư dài hạn"):

**🎯 ENTRY — vào lúc nào (validated + ví dụ thật):**
- **Công thức multibagger**: small/mid + chất lượng + **rẻ/bị sợ hãi + VẪN tăng trưởng** (BOTH), vào **CRISIS/BEAR** → ≥3x 47%, ≥5x 26%. Sống: VTP +554%, MWG +189%, VCS +110%, DGC +104%
- **Blue-chip**: cần **growth đang mạnh** (mua đắt pe_z +0.2 vẫn ăn), KHÔNG cần rẻ; blue-chip rẻ + hết growth = **bẫy** (VNM)
- Growth-một-mình hoặc value-một-mình đều yếu hơn giao của cả hai

**📈 OUTCOME — kết quả dài hạn:**
- Edge **dài hạn**: lag index tới 1Y, hòa 2Y, **vượt index ở 3Y+** (+7.2pp); đuôi multibagger ở BOTH×small/mid
- Đo càng dài (5Y) đuôi càng rõ

**🚪 EXIT — khi nào thoát (đã test cạn kiệt):**
- **GIỮ là tối ưu.** Mọi rule — OVERVALUED, DECEL, FA_DEGRADE, trailing-stop — đều **thua HOLD** (mean +44% vs ≤+31%)
- Lý do: lợi nhuận bất đối xứng; cắt nhầm một MWG/VTP tốn hơn tránh được nhiều VNM
- Ngoại lệ thực dụng: cần *dễ chịu đường đi* → TS35_act20 (≈hold mean, DD thấp hơn) — đánh đổi sở thích, không phải edge

## Ý nghĩa lớn

Sau cả một hành trình dài (FA-alpha hunt thất bại → reframe QT v4 thành công), kết quả hội tụ về một triết lý **nhất quán và đúng Buffett**:

> Lọc DN chất lượng tốt → **mua khi thị trường sợ hãi định giá rẻ (crisis/bear) hoặc blue-chip còn tăng trưởng mạnh → GIỮ DÀI HẠN, đừng bán theo tín hiệu.** Edge nằm ở chọn đúng + kiên nhẫn, không nằm ở timing exit.

Đây là một nền móng vững cho một **sleeve đầu tư dài hạn** tách biệt với book momentum (V4/V5). Tất cả script (`qt_v4_eventstudy.py`, `qt_v4x_archetypes.py`, `qt_v4x_exits.py`, `qt_v4x_trailing.py`) + kết quả + lý do đã nằm trong memory `qt_v4_eventstudy_2026.md`.

Bước tiếp khả dĩ khi bạn muốn: **chuyển từ "đo pick" sang "dựng sleeve thực tế"** — equal-weight, low-turnover, state-aware accumulation (nặng tay crisis/bear), giữ dài; đo theo cách bạn muốn (kết quả per-pick tổng hợp, không Sharpe/Calmar). Nhưng framework nhận thức thì đã hoàn chỉnh rồi.

content.text:
Rồi — dựng sleeve thực tế. Tôi sẽ làm đúng triết lý đã chứng minh, và **đo theo cách tôn trọng mục tiêu dài hạn** (wealth/CAGR/vs-VNINDEX + hành vi tích lũy + đóng góp từng mã), không tối ưu Sharpe.

**Thiết kế sleeve:**
- **Holdings**: top quality archetype picks (ưu tiên BOTH > VALUE_FEAR-trong-crisis/bear > GROWTH-bluechip), equal-weight new-money
- **Hold dài, low-turnover**: KHÔNG bán theo rule (đã chứng minh hold thắng); chỉ bỏ khi tier→E; để winner chạy (không rebalance ép xuống)
- **State-aware accumulation (DT5G)**: equity mục tiêu theo state — CRISIS 100% / BEAR 95% / NEUTRAL 80% / BULL 65% / EX-BULL 50% → tự động giữ dry powder lúc đắt, dồn tiền lúc crisis/bear
- So với **FULL** (luôn 100%, không breathe theo state) để cô lập giá trị của tích lũy-theo-state, và **VNINDEX**

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
qt_v4x_sleeve.py — realistic long-horizon QUALITY sleeve (user spec 2026-05-29)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Builds the actual investment sleeve from the validated QT v4.x findings:
  - Universe = QT v4.x quality archetype picks (priority: BOTH > VALUE_FEAR in
    CRISIS/BEAR > VALUE_FEAR other > GROWTH-bluechip).
  - HOLD LONG, low turnover: never sell on rules (hold beats all exits); drop a
    name only if FA tier → E. Let winners run (no forced down-rebalance).
  - State-aware accumulation (DT5G): target equity exposure by state breathes the
    cash buffer — heavy in CRISIS/BEAR (deploy dry powder into cheap quality),
    light in BULL/EX-BULL (raise dry powder). Names don't churn; only equity/cash %.
  - Equal-weight new-money per name; positions ride after.

Measured for the LONG-TERM GOAL (not Sharpe-obsessed): wealth multiple, CAGR,
MaxDD (context), vs VNINDEX, avg equity%, turnover, top contributors.
Variants: SLEEVE_STATE (this), SLEEVE_FULL ([REDACTED] 100%, no state breathing), VNI.
Output: data/qt_v4x_sleeve.md + data/qt_v4x_sleeve_nav.csv
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile, pickle
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd

WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"
BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
N_MAX=25; TC=0.0025
TEQ={1:1.00,2:0.95,3:0.80,4:0.65,5:0.50}   # state-aware target equity
PRIORITY={"BOTH":3,"VALUE_FEAR":2,"GROWTH":1}

def bq_query(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try:
        cmd=f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=200000'
        r=subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=600,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

def main():
    lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
    fa=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"fa_ratings_lh.csv"),parse_dates=["time","Release_Date"])
    fa=fa.sort_values(["ticker","quarter"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    fa["eff_release"]=fa["Release_Date"].fillna(fa["time"]+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fa["is_ab"]=fa["tier"].isin(["A","B"]).astype(int)
    fa["qnum"]=fa.groupby("ticker").cumcount()+1
    fa["pct_AB"]=fa.groupby("ticker")["is_ab"].cumsum()/fa["qnum"]*100
    fa["valid_hist"]=fa["qnum"]>=12

    panel=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl"),"rb"))
    panel["time"]=pd.to_datetime(panel["time"]); panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    panel["hi52"]=panel.groupby("ticker")["Close"].transform(lambda x:x.rolling(252,min_periods=60).max())
    panel["dd52"]=(panel["Close"]/panel["hi52"]-1)*100
    panel["pe_z"]=((panel["PE"]-panel["PE_MA5Y"])/panel["PE_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["pb_z"]=((panel["PB"]-panel["PB_MA5Y"])/panel["PB_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["liqv"]=panel["Volume_3M_P50"]*panel["Close"]
    fin=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_v4_fin.pkl"),"rb"))
    fin["eff_release"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]).fillna(pd.to_datetime(fin["q_time"])+pd.Timedelta(days=60))

    panel=panel.sort_values("time")
    fa_a=fa.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","tier","pct_AB","valid_hist","MktCap"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fa_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    fin_a=fin.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","NP_R","Revenue_YoY_P0"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fin_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)

    qok=(panel["pct_AB"]>=70)&(panel["valid_hist"])&(panel["tier"].isin(["A","B"]))&(panel["liqv"]>=5e9)
    sig_g=qok&(panel["NP_R"]>=0.20)&(panel["Revenue_YoY_P0"]>=0.20)
    sig_v=qok&((panel["pe_z"]<-1)|(panel["pb_z"]<-1)|(panel["dd52"]<-30))
    panel["mc_pct"]=panel[qok].groupby("time")["MktCap"].rank(pct=True)
    panel["entry"]=sig_g|sig_v
    panel["etype"]=np.where(sig_g&sig_v,"BOTH",np.where(sig_g,"GROWTH","VALUE_FEAR"))
    panel["is_E"]=panel["tier"].eq("E")
    # GROWTH entry only counts for blue-chips (validated: growth-smallmid weak)
    panel.loc[(panel["etype"]=="GROWTH")&(panel["mc_pct"]<0.667),"entry"]=False

    # DT5G state daily
    st=bq_query("SELECT s.time,s.state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live AS s ORDER BY s.time")
    st["time"]=pd.to_datetime(st["time"]); st=st.set_index("time")["state"]

    # pivots
    px=panel.pivot_table(index="time",columns="ticker",values="Close",aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
    didx=px.index
    entry_tk={}; etype_tk={}; isE={}
    for d,g in panel.groupby("time"):
        e=g[g["entry"]]
        entry_tk[d]=dict(zip(e["ticker"],e["etype"]))
        isE[d]=set(g[g["is_E"]]["ticker"])
    st_ff=st.reindex(didx).ffill()

    # monthly grid
    me=pd.Series(didx).groupby([didx.year,didx.month]).max().values
    rebal=pd.DatetimeIndex(sorted(me)); rebal=rebal[(rebal>=pd.Timestamp("2014-06-01"))&(rebal<=pd.Timestamp("2026-05-15"))]

    def price(d,t):
        s=px.loc[:d,t] if t in px.columns else pd.Series(dtype=float); s=s.dropna()
        return s.iloc[-1] if len(s) else np.nan

    def run(state_aware):
        cash=1.0; sh={}; hist=[]; turn_tot=0; eq_sum=0
        for d in rebal:
            s=st_ff.get(d); s=int(s) if pd.notna(s) else 3
            # drop tier-E names (hard floor)
            for t in [t for t in list(sh) if t in isE.get(d,set())]:
                p=price(d,t)
                if pd.notna(p): cash+=sh[t]*p*(1-TC); turn_tot+=sh[t]*p
                del sh[t]
            eq=sum(v*price(d,t) for t,v in sh.items() if pd.notna(price(d,t)))
            nav=cash+eq
            teq=TEQ[s] if state_aware else 1.0
            target_eq=teq*nav
            # candidate new names (entry this month, not held), priority order
            cands=[(t,et) for t,et in entry_tk.get(d,{}).items() if t not in sh and t in px.columns and pd.notna(price(d,t))]
            cands.sort(key=lambda x:-PRIORITY.get(x[1],0))
            slice_sz=nav/N_MAX
            if eq < target_eq-1e-9:  # DEPLOY
                budget=target_eq-eq
                # 1) new names
                for t,et in cands:
                    if len(sh)>=N_MAX or budget<slice_sz*0.5: break
                    buy=min(slice_sz,budget,cash)
                    if buy<1e-4: continue
                    p=price(d,t); sh[t]=sh.get(t,0)+buy/p; cash-=buy; budget-=buy; turn_tot+=buy
                # 2) crisis/bear: top up existing equally with remaining budget (accumulate)
                if state_aware and s in (1,2) and budget>1e-4 and sh:
                    per=budget/len(sh)
                    for t in list(sh):
                        p=price(d,t)
                        if pd.isna(p): continue
                        buy=min(per,cash)
                        if buy<1e-4: continue
                        sh[t]+=buy/p; cash-=buy; turn_tot+=buy
            elif eq > target_eq+1e-9:  # TRIM proportionally (raise dry powder)
                excess=eq-target_eq; frac=excess/eq
                for t in list(sh):
                    p=price(d,t)
                    if pd.isna(p): continue
                    seld=sh[t]*frac; cash+=seld*p*(1-TC); sh[t]-=seld; turn_tot+=seld*p
            eq=sum(v*price(d,t) for t,v in sh.items() if pd.notna(price(d,t)))
            nav=cash+eq; eq_sum+=eq/nav if nav>0 else 0
            hist.append({"date":d,"nav":nav,"eq_pct":eq/nav if nav>0 else 0,"n":len(sh),"state":s})
        h=pd.DataFrame(hist).set_index("date")
        return h, turn_tot/(len(rebal)), eq_sum/len(rebal)

    h_state,turn_s,eqavg_s=run(True)
    h_full,turn_f,eqavg_f=run(False)
    vni=bq_query("SELECT t.time,t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time>='2014-01-01' AND t.Close>100 ORDER BY t.time")
    vni["time"]=pd.to_datetime(vni["time"]); vni_s=vni.set_index("time")["Close"].reindex(didx).ffill()
    vni_m=vni_s.reindex(rebal).ffill(); vni_m=vni_m/vni_m.iloc[0]

    def met(nav):
        s=nav.dropna(); rets=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
        cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1
        dd=((s-s.cummax())/s.cummax()).min()
        return cagr*100, dd*100, s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0]

    P("# QT v4.x — realistic long-horizon QUALITY sleeve")
    P("")
    P(f"N_MAX={N_MAX} | TC={TC:.2%} | hold-long (sell only tier→E) | state-aware target equity {TEQ}")
    P(f"{rebal[0].date()}→{rebal[-1].date()} monthly")
    P("")
    P(f"{'variant':<14}{'CAGR':>8}{'MaxDD':>9}{'Wealth':>9}{'avg eq%':>9}{'mo turn':>9}")
    P("-"*58)
    for nm,h,ta,ea in [("SLEEVE_STATE",h_state,turn_s,eqavg_s),("SLEEVE_FULL",h_full,turn_f,eqavg_f)]:
        c,dd,w=met(h["nav"]); P(f"{nm:<14}{c:>+7.2f}%{dd:>+8.2f}%{w:>+9.2f}{ea*100:>8.0f}%{ta*100:>8.1f}%")
    c,dd,w=met(vni_m); P(f"{'VNINDEX':<14}{c:>+7.2f}%{dd:>+8.2f}%{w:>+9.2f}")
    P("")
    P(f"holdings over time (STATE): start {h_state['n'].iloc[0]}, median {int(h_state['n'].median())}, max {h_state['n'].max()}")
    P(f"equity% by state (STATE): "+", ".join(f"{ {1:'CRI',2:'BEA',3:'NEU',4:'BUL',5:'EXB'}[s] }={h_state[h_state['state']==s]['eq_pct'].mean()*100:.0f}%" for s in [1,2,3,4,5] if (h_state['state']==s).any()))
    P("")
    # period breakdown
    P("## Sub-periods (wealth growth)")
    for lo,hi,lab in [("2014-06-01","2020-04-30","2014-COVID"),("2020-04-30","2022-12-31","2020-22 bull+bear"),
                      ("2022-12-31","2026-05-15","2023-26 OOS")]:
        row=f"  {lab:<18}"
        for nm,h in [("STATE",h_state),("FULL",h_full),("VNI",vni_m.to_frame("nav"))]:
            s=h["nav"] if "nav" in h else h
            seg=s[(s.index>=lo)&(s.index<=hi)]
            if len(seg)>2: row+=f"{nm} {(seg.iloc[-1]/seg.iloc[0]-1)*100:+6.0f}%  "
        P(row)
    P("")
    pd.DataFrame({"STATE":h_state["nav"],"FULL":h_full["nav"],"VNI":vni_m,
                  "eq_pct":h_state["eq_pct"],"n":h_state["n"],"state":h_state["state"]}).to_csv(
                  os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_sleeve_nav.csv"))
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_sleeve.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))
    P("Saved data/qt_v4x_sleeve.md + data/qt_v4x_sleeve_nav.csv")

if __name__=="__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
qt_v4x_sleeve.py — realistic long-horizon QUALITY sleeve (user spec 2026-05-29)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Builds the actual investment sleeve from the validated QT v4.x findings:
  - Universe = QT v4.x quality archetype picks (priority: BOTH > VALUE_FEAR in
    CRISIS/BEAR > VALUE_FEAR other > GROWTH-bluechip).
  - HOLD LONG, low turnover: never sell on rules (hold beats all exits); drop a
    name only if FA tier → E. Let winners run (no forced down-rebalance).
  - State-aware accumulation (DT5G): target equity exposure by state breathes the
    cash buffer — heavy in CRISIS/BEAR (deploy dry powder into cheap quality),
    light in BULL/EX-BULL (raise dry powder). Names don't churn; only equity/cash %.
  - Equal-weight new-money per name; positions ride after.

Measured for the LONG-TERM GOAL (not Sharpe-obsessed): wealth multiple, CAGR,
MaxDD (context), vs VNINDEX, avg equity%, turnover, top contributors.
Variants: SLEEVE_STATE (this), SLEEVE_FULL ([REDACTED] 100%, no state breathing), VNI.
Output: data/qt_v4x_sleeve.md + data/qt_v4x_sleeve_nav.csv
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile, pickle
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd

WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"
BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
N_MAX=25; TC=0.0025
TEQ={1:1.00,2:0.95,3:0.80,4:0.65,5:0.50}   # state-aware target equity
PRIORITY={"BOTH":3,"VALUE_FEAR":2,"GROWTH":1}

def bq_query(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try:
        cmd=f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=200000'
        r=subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=600,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

def main():
    lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
    fa=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"fa_ratings_lh.csv"),parse_dates=["time","Release_Date"])
    fa=fa.sort_values(["ticker","quarter"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    fa["eff_release"]=fa["Release_Date"].fillna(fa["time"]+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fa["is_ab"]=fa["tier"].isin(["A","B"]).astype(int)
    fa["qnum"]=fa.groupby("ticker").cumcount()+1
    fa["pct_AB"]=fa.groupby("ticker")["is_ab"].cumsum()/fa["qnum"]*100
    fa["valid_hist"]=fa["qnum"]>=12

    panel=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl"),"rb"))
    panel["time"]=pd.to_datetime(panel["time"]); panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    panel["hi52"]=panel.groupby("ticker")["Close"].transform(lambda x:x.rolling(252,min_periods=60).max())
    panel["dd52"]=(panel["Close"]/panel["hi52"]-1)*100
    panel["pe_z"]=((panel["PE"]-panel["PE_MA5Y"])/panel["PE_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["pb_z"]=((panel["PB"]-panel["PB_MA5Y"])/panel["PB_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["liqv"]=panel["Volume_3M_P50"]*panel["Close"]
    fin=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_v4_fin.pkl"),"rb"))
    fin["eff_release"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]).fillna(pd.to_datetime(fin["q_time"])+pd.Timedelta(days=60))

    panel=panel.sort_values("time")
    fa_a=fa.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","tier","pct_AB","valid_hist","MktCap"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fa_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    fin_a=fin.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","NP_R","Revenue_YoY_P0"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fin_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)

    qok=(panel["pct_AB"]>=70)&(panel["valid_hist"])&(panel["tier"].isin(["A","B"]))&(panel["liqv"]>=5e9)
    sig_g=qok&(panel["NP_R"]>=0.20)&(panel["Revenue_YoY_P0"]>=0.20)
    sig_v=qok&((panel["pe_z"]<-1)|(panel["pb_z"]<-1)|(panel["dd52"]<-30))
    panel["mc_pct"]=panel[qok].groupby("time")["MktCap"].rank(pct=True)
    panel["entry"]=sig_g|sig_v
    panel["etype"]=np.where(sig_g&sig_v,"BOTH",np.where(sig_g,"GROWTH","VALUE_FEAR"))
    panel["is_E"]=panel["tier"].eq("E")
    # GROWTH entry only counts for blue-chips (validated: growth-smallmid weak)
    panel.loc[(panel["etype"]=="GROWTH")&(panel["mc_pct"]<0.667),"entry"]=False

    # DT5G state daily
    st=bq_query("SELECT s.time,s.state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live AS s ORDER BY s.time")
    st["time"]=pd.to_datetime(st["time"]); st=st.set_index("time")["state"]

    # pivots
    px=panel.pivot_table(index="time",columns="ticker",values="Close",aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
    didx=px.index
    entry_tk={}; etype_tk={}; isE={}
    for d,g in panel.groupby("time"):
        e=g[g["entry"]]
        entry_tk[d]=dict(zip(e["ticker"],e["etype"]))
        isE[d]=set(g[g["is_E"]]["ticker"])
    st_ff=st.reindex(didx).ffill()

    # monthly grid
    me=pd.Series(didx).groupby([didx.year,didx.month]).max().values
    rebal=pd.DatetimeIndex(sorted(me)); rebal=rebal[(rebal>=pd.Timestamp("2014-06-01"))&(rebal<=pd.Timestamp("2026-05-15"))]

    def price(d,t):
        s=px.loc[:d,t] if t in px.columns else pd.Series(dtype=float); s=s.dropna()
        return s.iloc[-1] if len(s) else np.nan

    def run(state_aware):
        cash=1.0; sh={}; hist=[]; turn_tot=0; eq_sum=0
        for d in rebal:
            s=st_ff.get(d); s=int(s) if pd.notna(s) else 3
            # drop tier-E names (hard floor)
            for t in [t for t in list(sh) if t in isE.get(d,set())]:
                p=price(d,t)
                if pd.notna(p): cash+=sh[t]*p*(1-TC); turn_tot+=sh[t]*p
                del sh[t]
            eq=sum(v*price(d,t) for t,v in sh.items() if pd.notna(price(d,t)))
            nav=cash+eq
            teq=TEQ[s] if state_aware else 1.0
            target_eq=teq*nav
            # candidate new names (entry this month, not held), priority order
            cands=[(t,et) for t,et in entry_tk.get(d,{}).items() if t not in sh and t in px.columns and pd.notna(price(d,t))]
            cands.sort(key=lambda x:-PRIORITY.get(x[1],0))
            slice_sz=nav/N_MAX
            if eq < target_eq-1e-9:  # DEPLOY
                budget=target_eq-eq
                # 1) new names
                for t,et in cands:
                    if len(sh)>=N_MAX or budget<slice_sz*0.5: break
                    buy=min(slice_sz,budget,cash)
                    if buy<1e-4: continue
                    p=price(d,t); sh[t]=sh.get(t,0)+buy/p; cash-=buy; budget-=buy; turn_tot+=buy
                # 2) crisis/bear: top up existing equally with remaining budget (accumulate)
                if state_aware and s in (1,2) and budget>1e-4 and sh:
                    per=budget/len(sh)
                    for t in list(sh):
                        p=price(d,t)
                        if pd.isna(p): continue
                        buy=min(per,cash)
                        if buy<1e-4: continue
                        sh[t]+=buy/p; cash-=buy; turn_tot+=buy
            elif eq > target_eq+1e-9:  # TRIM proportionally (raise dry powder)
                excess=eq-target_eq; frac=excess/eq
                for t in list(sh):
                    p=price(d,t)
                    if pd.isna(p): continue
                    seld=sh[t]*frac; cash+=seld*p*(1-TC); sh[t]-=seld; turn_tot+=seld*p
            eq=sum(v*price(d,t) for t,v in sh.items() if pd.notna(price(d,t)))
            nav=cash+eq; eq_sum+=eq/nav if nav>0 else 0
            hist.append({"date":d,"nav":nav,"eq_pct":eq/nav if nav>0 else 0,"n":len(sh),"state":s})
        h=pd.DataFrame(hist).set_index("date")
        return h, turn_tot/(len(rebal)), eq_sum/len(rebal)

    h_state,turn_s,eqavg_s=run(True)
    h_full,turn_f,eqavg_f=run(False)
    vni=bq_query("SELECT t.time,t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time>='2014-01-01' AND t.Close>100 ORDER BY t.time")
    vni["time"]=pd.to_datetime(vni["time"]); vni_s=vni.set_index("time")["Close"].reindex(didx).ffill()
    vni_m=vni_s.reindex(rebal).ffill(); vni_m=vni_m/vni_m.iloc[0]

    def met(nav):
        s=nav.dropna(); rets=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
        cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1
        dd=((s-s.cummax())/s.cummax()).min()
        return cagr*100, dd*100, s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0]

    P("# QT v4.x — realistic long-horizon QUALITY sleeve")
    P("")
    P(f"N_MAX={N_MAX} | TC={TC:.2%} | hold-long (sell only tier→E) | state-aware target equity {TEQ}")
    P(f"{rebal[0].date()}→{rebal[-1].date()} monthly")
    P("")
    P(f"{'variant':<14}{'CAGR':>8}{'MaxDD':>9}{'Wealth':>9}{'avg eq%':>9}{'mo turn':>9}")
    P("-"*58)
    for nm,h,ta,ea in [("SLEEVE_STATE",h_state,turn_s,eqavg_s),("SLEEVE_FULL",h_full,turn_f,eqavg_f)]:
        c,dd,w=met(h["nav"]); P(f"{nm:<14}{c:>+7.2f}%{dd:>+8.2f}%{w:>+9.2f}{ea*100:>8.0f}%{ta*100:>8.1f}%")
    c,dd,w=met(vni_m); P(f"{'VNINDEX':<14}{c:>+7.2f}%{dd:>+8.2f}%{w:>+9.2f}")
    P("")
    P(f"holdings over time (STATE): start {h_state['n'].iloc[0]}, median {int(h_state['n'].median())}, max {h_state['n'].max()}")
    P(f"equity% by state (STATE): "+", ".join(f"{ {1:'CRI',2:'BEA',3:'NEU',4:'BUL',5:'EXB'}[s] }={h_state[h_state['state']==s]['eq_pct'].mean()*100:.0f}%" for s in [1,2,3,4,5] if (h_state['state']==s).any()))
    P("")
    # period breakdown
    P("## Sub-periods (wealth growth)")
    for lo,hi,lab in [("2014-06-01","2020-04-30","2014-COVID"),("2020-04-30","2022-12-31","2020-22 bull+bear"),
                      ("2022-12-31","2026-05-15","2023-26 OOS")]:
        row=f"  {lab:<18}"
        for nm,h in [("STATE",h_state),("FULL",h_full),("VNI",vni_m.to_frame("nav"))]:
            s=h["nav"] if "nav" in h else h
            seg=s[(s.index>=lo)&(s.index<=hi)]
            if len(seg)>2: row+=f"{nm} {(seg.iloc[-1]/seg.iloc[0]-1)*100:+6.0f}%  "
        P(row)
    P("")
    pd.DataFrame({"STATE":h_state["nav"],"FULL":h_full["nav"],"VNI":vni_m,
                  "eq_pct":h_state["eq_pct"],"n":h_state["n"],"state":h_state["state"]}).to_csv(
                  os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_sleeve_nav.csv"))
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_sleeve.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))
    P("Saved data/qt_v4x_sleeve.md + data/qt_v4x_sleeve_nav.csv")

    main()

# QT v4.x — realistic long-horizon QUALITY sleeve

N_MAX=25 | TC=0.25% | hold-long (sell only tier→E) | state-aware target equity {1: 1.0, 2: 0.95, 3: 0.8, 4: 0.65, 5: 0.5}
2014-06-30→2026-05-15 monthly

variant           CAGR    MaxDD   Wealth  avg eq%  mo turn
----------------------------------------------------------
SLEEVE_STATE    +5.93%  -59.23%    +1.98      63%     6.8%
SLEEVE_FULL     +8.53%  -40.22%    +2.64      69%     0.7%
VNINDEX        +10.64%  -43.59%    +3.32

holdings over time (STATE): start 0, median 15, max 25
equity% by state (STATE): CRI=87%, BEA=80%, NEU=54%, BUL=63%, EXB=50%

## Sub-periods (wealth growth)
  2014-COVID        STATE    -12%  FULL     -6%  VNI    +33%  
  2020-22 bull+bear STATE    +32%  FULL    +70%  VNI    +16%  
  2023-26 OOS       STATE    +36%  FULL    +35%  VNI    +73%

content.text:
Sleeve backtest xong — và kết quả **không tốt**, tôi nói thẳng:

| Variant | CAGR | MaxDD | Wealth | avg eq% | turn/mo |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| SLEEVE_STATE | +5.93% | **−59.2%** | 1.98 | 63% | 6.8% |
| SLEEVE_FULL | +8.53% | −40.2% | 2.64 | 69% | 0.7% |
| VNINDEX | **+10.64%** | −43.6% | 3.32 |

## Hai vấn đề, chẩn đoán rõ

**1. State-aware accumulation THẤT BẠI** (5.93% + DD −59%, tệ hơn cả FULL). Hai cơ chế phản tác dụng:
- **Cash drag ở NEUTRAL** (state thống trị): target 80% nhưng thực tế chỉ giữ 54% equity (thiếu tín hiệu để deploy) → bỏ lỡ bull 2016-2019 (2014-COVID: STATE −12% vs VNI **+33%**)
- **Averaging-down trong crisis kéo dài**: "nặng tay crisis/bear" + top-up existing → mua thêm khi giá còn rơi (2022 smallcap VN rớt 60-70%) → khuếch đại DD lên −59%

**2. Ngay cả FULL sleeve cũng lag VNINDEX** (8.53% vs 10.64%) — nhất quán với mọi phát hiện trước: **quality long-only ≈/< index trong thị trường VN bull-heavy** (VIC/large-cap dẫn dắt, quality smallmid lag).

## Vì sao edge ở pick KHÔNG chuyển thành sleeve thắng index

Event-study cho thấy pick tốt (3Y +30%, VTP +554%, mean 5Y +44%). Nhưng sleeve cơ học lag vì:
- **Pha loãng**: VTP +554% bị hòa tan trong 25 slot equal-weight cùng nhiều pick tầm thường
- **Index là rào cao**: VNI 10.64%/12y; beat long-only bằng một subset quality là rất khó
- **Quality lag trong bull** (đã đo nhiều lần)

## Kết luận trung thực

**QT v4.x KHÔNG nên là một sleeve cơ học diversified 25-mã** — ở dạng đó nó thua index, và state-timing tiền làm tệ hơn (đúng bài học exit: *đừng time, cứ giữ* — ở đây time-cash cũng phản tác dụng).

**Giá trị thật của QT v4.x là một bộ SINH Ý TƯỞNG tập trung**: nó nhận diện đúng các multibagger (VTP/MWG/DGC/VCS qua công thức BOTH×small/mid×crisis-bear). Một nhà đầu tư **tập trung** chọn lọc trong các tín hiệu đó và giữ dài sẽ ăn lớn; một sleeve cơ học dàn trải thì pha loãng về mức index.

Lưu memory:

input.old_string: ## Caveats
input.new_string:
## Realistic sleeve build (2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_sleeve.py`) — mechanical sleeve LAGS index; use as idea-generator
Equal-weight (N_MAX=25), hold-long (sell only tier→E), state-aware target equity {CRI 1.0/BEA .95/NEU .80/BUL .65/EXB .50}, monthly. Results (2014-26): SLEEVE_STATE CAGR 5.93%/DD **−59.2%**/wealth 1.98; SLEEVE_FULL 8.53%/−40.2%/2.64; VNINDEX 10.64%/−43.6%/3.32. **Both lag VNI; STATE worse than FULL.**
- **State-aware accumulation FAILED**: (a) cash drag — NEUTRAL (dominant state) realized only 54% equity (too few signals to hit 80% target) → missed 2016-19 bull (2014-COVID: STATE −12% vs VNI +33%); (b) averaging-down via crisis top-up amplified DD to −59% when 2022 smallcap crash deepened (sleeve holds volatile smallmid quality). Lesson extends the exit finding: don't time cash either — timing hurt (like rule-exits hurt).
- **Even FULL quality sleeve lags VNI** (8.53 vs 10.64) — consistent w/ whole session: quality long-only ≈/< bull-heavy VN index (VIC/large-cap led; quality smallmid lags in bull).
- **Pick-edge doesn't translate to mechanical sleeve**: event-study showed great picks (3Y +30%, VTP +554%, 5Y mean +44%) but 25-slot equal-weight DILUTES multibaggers among mediocre picks; index is a high bar; quality lags bull.
- **VERDICT: QT v4.x = focused IDEA-GENERATOR, NOT a mechanical diversified sleeve.** It correctly identifies multibaggers (BOTH×smallmid×crisis/bear → VTP/MWG/DGC/VCS); a CONCENTRATED investor selecting among its signals + holding long captures the edge; a diversified mechanical book dilutes to ~index. Do NOT state-time the cash (hurt). Files: qt_v4x_sleeve.py, data/qt_v4x_sleeve.{md,csv}.

## Caveats

toolUseResult.originalFile:
---
name: qt-v4-eventstudy-2026
description: "QT v4 (Buffett) filter measured as per-signal event study (not portfolio) — long-horizon edge is real, VALUE>>GARP, OVERVALUED exit is gold"
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: 23c2ffe0-ced2-4d30-bcff-e0b6aa1c8435
---

# QT v4 (Buffett) filter — per-signal event study (2026-05-29)

User reframe (correct, fixes prior mistake): stop measuring FA/quality filters as portfolio NAV (capacity/cash/Sharpe/Calmar obscure the signal). Measure the QUALITY OF THE PICKS at the stock/event level — when to buy, long-horizon outcome, when to exit. Script: `qt_v4_eventstudy.py` (reuses backtest_qt_v4 signal defs + data: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl, fa_ratings_lh.csv, qt_v4_fin.pkl). Equal-weight per signal, unlimited capital, point-in-time fwd returns. Output: `data/qt_v4_eventstudy.md`, `data/qt_v4_events.csv`.

**QT v4 = Buffett quality-compounder filter**: universe ≥70% A/B tier (≥12Q hist), latest A/B, liq≥5B/d. Entry OR{VALUE: (pe_z<−1|pb_z<−1|dd52w<−30)&not-falling-knife; GARP: PEG∈(0,1]&NP_R≥20%&Rev_YoY≥20%&PE<25&>MA200}. Exit OR{FA_DEGRADE tier→C/D/E; OVERVALUED pe_z>2.5&pb_z>1.5; GROWTH_BROKEN 2Q NP&Rev<−15%}.

## Findings (628 entry events, 62 tickers, 2016→2026)
- **Edge is REAL but LONG-horizon** (confirms the whole session's thesis, now clean at stock level): fwd median/mean/win, excess-vs-VNINDEX: 3M +2.0%/−1.8exc/beat45% → 1Y +1.0%/−5.1exc/beat44% (LAGS index through 1Y) → 2Y +11.2%/−1.6exc (matches) → **3Y +30.4%/+52.0mean/win65%/+7.2pp exc/beat54% (BEATS index only at 3Y)**. The picks need ~3 years; portfolio-NAV sims (1-2Y, capacity-bound) structurally couldn't show this.
- **VALUE path >> GARP path**: VALUE 1Y +4.8%/2Y +15.0%; **GARP 1Y −8.9%/2Y +0.9%/beat-VNI only 24-27%** (drag). For a long-horizon quality filter, buy-cheap beats buy-growth. → drop/rework GARP.
- **Exit: OVERVALUED is GOLD, FA_DEGRADE exits too early.** OVERVALUED (n=116): median **+81.4%**, **96% win**, hold 561d — let winners run, sell when expensive (pure Buffett). FA_DEGRADE (n=217): median −2.3%/win44% (fires after damage). GROWTH_BROKEN (n=77): median −3.0%/win34% (defensive). Overall rule-exit (mean +27%, ~9mo hold) << hold-3Y (+52%) → **rules exit too early, cut compounders** (esp. FA_DEGRADE on a single-quarter tier slip).

## Actionable refinement hypotheses (for a QT v4.x — NOT yet validated)
(a) emphasize VALUE entry, drop GARP; (b) target ~3Y hold; (c) primary exit = OVERVALUED (winner harvest); (d) make FA_DEGRADE patient (require 2 consecutive degrades or price confirmation) to stop cutting compounders. Measure refinements the SAME WAY (per-signal event study, 3Y outcome + excess vs VNI), NOT portfolio NAV.

## Two-archetype refinement (user insight 2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_archetypes.py`)
User: entry must differ by company type — (A) VALUE_FEAR = quality priced cheap by crisis/sector-misunderstanding/incident (VCS 2014, DGC 2015/2019 → 10-20x); (B) GROWTH_BLUECHIP = blue-chip still in strong-growth phase, no cheap needed (VNM 2005-17 dozens×), exit when growth matures. Test (621 events, 70 tk, multibagger metric = peak drawup within 3Y):
- **Multibagger sweet spot = BOTH × SMALL/MID** (cheap/beaten AND still growing, small/mid): N=19, peak med +150%, 3Y +56%, **≥2x 63% / ≥3x 32% / ≥5x 11%**, beat 53% — exactly the VCS/DGC formula. Growth-alone OR value-alone each much weaker.
- **CRISIS/BEAR timing boosts VALUE_FEAR** (confirms user): CRISIS 3Y +26%/≥3x 16%, BEAR +24%/≥3x 14% vs NEUTRAL +5%/9%. Buy cheap quality in fear = best.
- **REFINES user on blue-chips**: GROWTH×BLUECHIP did NOT multibag in 2016-26 (≥5x 0%, 3Y +8%) — VN blue-chips now MATURE; VNM's dozens-× was pre-2017 (smaller/scaling, before data). **Cheap mature blue-chip = VALUE TRAP**: VNM 2018-20 all flagged VALUE_FEAR (looked cheap) but peak +25%/hold −5 to −23% — cheapness meaningless once growth matured. → for blue-chips require ACTIVE growth + exit on growth deceleration (missing exit: current GROWTH_BROKEN needs −15% decline, not deceleration). Face validity: VCS 2018-11 VALUE_FEAR→+95%✅, DGC 2022-11 BOTH→+42%✅.
- **QT v4.x direction**: golden signal = small/mid quality + cheap/beaten + still-growing, entered in CRISIS/BEAR; blue-chips need growth-not-cheapness + growth-decel exit; growth-alone weak. Caveats: BOTH cell N=19 (suggestive); 3Y window undercounts true multibaggers (VCS/DGC 10-20x run 4-8y); can't test pre-2017 VNM/VCS-2014/DGC-2015 (panel price start). Files: qt_v4x_archetypes.py, data/qt_v4x_events.csv.

## 5Y horizon + growth examples (user insight 2026-05-29, FWD=1260 in qt_v4x_archetypes.py)
User: MWG/DGW/FRT/VTP in acceleration phase traded at HIGH valuation; while growth sustained, stock kept multibagging; when growth decelerates, multiple de-rates immediately → exit on DECELERATION not on high valuation.
- **5Y results sharpen the archetype**: BOTH×SMALLMID (cheap+growing small/mid) N=19, peak +174%/5Y-hold +91%, **≥2x 63% / ≥3x 47% / ≥5x 26%**, beat 63% — the VCS/DGC formula, stronger at 5Y. CRISIS entry best for VALUE_FEAR (peak +82%, ≥3x 21%).
- **Valuation-at-entry CONFIRMS user**: GROWTH median pe_z=+0.20 (EXPENSIVE, above own 5Y mean) yet still works (GROWTH×BLUECHIP +27% 5Y); VALUE_FEAR −0.48 (cheap); BOTH −1.16. → growth bought expensive is fine; **applying OVERVALUED exit (pe_z>2.5) to growth runners would cut winners** → exit must be archetype-conditional (OVERVALUED for value/mean-revert names; GROWTH-DECELERATION for growth names — de-rating follows decel).
- **Face validity (5Y peak)**: VTP 2023-04 VALUE_FEAR small-cap pe_z −1.8 → **peak +554% / hold +244%** ✅; MWG 2019-05 VALUE_FEAR → **+189%/+123%** ✅; VCS +110%, DGC +104% ✅; **VNM = value-trap confirmed** (cheap-ish blue-chip, matured growth → peak +25%, hold −5 to −17%); DGW/FRT EXCLUDED by quality gate (≥70%A/B≥12Q too strict — missed winners with quality dips).
- **DATA NOTE**: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl prices are CORRECT (verified MWG 11420→82400=7.2x matches BQ adj Close); an earlier false-alarm was a buggy ad-hoc set_index-unsorted lookup, NOT the data. Event-study scripts use sorted positional i+H indexing → valid.
- **Next**: test archetype-conditional EXIT (OVERVALUED for value vs growth-deceleration for growth); add a growth-deceleration exit (current GROWTH_BROKEN only catches −15% decline, misses decel). Caveat: ≥10x uncapturable (original VCS-2014/DGC-2015/DGW pre-data or gated); BOTH cell N=19 suggestive.

## Archetype-conditional EXIT test (2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_exits.py`) — HOLD beats ALL exit rules
Per-position, 5Y window, realized return + capture ratio (realized/5Y-peak). Strategies exit on OVERVALUED|FA / DECEL(NP_R&Rev<10%)|FA / QTV4_ANY / ARCHETYPE (value→OVR, growth→DECEL) vs HOLD_5Y.
- **ALL (621): HOLD_5Y crushes every rule** — median +14.1%/mean +44.2%/capture 40% vs OVERVALUED +0.5%/+18%/21%, DECEL −0.3%/+1.6%/0%, QTV4_ANY −0.6%/+12.4%/5%, ARCHETYPE +1.0%/+16.3%/17%.
- **GROWTH+BOTH (122): user's "DECEL>OVERVALUED" NOT confirmed — DECEL is WORST** (mean +5.6% vs OVR +14.4% vs HOLD +41.1%); DECEL exits too early (126d vs OVR 256d) because quarterly growth is lumpy (one <10% quarter ejects before the run). 
- **Reconciles the earlier "OVERVALUED +81%/96%win"**: that was SELECTION illusion (only winners ever reach overvalued); applied to all positions, rule-exits lose to hold (most exit early via FA_DEGRADE, locking small losses).
- **VERDICT: for a quality-compounder filter, rule-based exits DESTROY value — HOLD wins** (right-skew: a few multibaggers compound; any early exit truncates the right tail; losses bounded at −100% but winners unbounded → asymmetry favors holding). Most Buffett-consistent result: "favorite holding period is forever." Answer to "when to exit" = essentially DON'T (on these rules).
- Fundamental-trigger exits all lose to hold. Files: qt_v4x_exits.py, data/qt_v4x_exits.{md,csv}.

## Trailing-stop-from-peak test (2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_trailing.py`) — HOLD STILL WINS; exit question CLOSED
Per-position 5Y. ALL(621): HOLD mean +44.2%/med +14.1%/win58%/cap40% beats TS25 (+10.3%), TS35 (+18.0%), TS50 (+25.8%), and best **TS35_act20** (activate trail only after +20% gain) +31.4%/med +8.0%/win56%/cap26%. **No trailing stop beats pure HOLD on mean OR median.** Tight stops (25/35%) cut early (median negative); activation-after-gain is much better but still < HOLD. GROWTH+BOTH: HOLD +41% > all trailing (worst for trailing — volatile, gets stopped). 
- **Face validity (why)**: TS35 helped smooth toppers (VTP +316% vs HOLD +244%; DGC +25% vs −14%) but DESTROYED MWG (−4% vs +123% — stopped on COVID mid-run drawdown before the real run). Asymmetry: cutting ONE MWG costs more than avoiding several VNM round-trips.
- **DEFINITIVE EXIT VERDICT (all rules tested)**: for a quality-compounder long-term filter, optimal exit = HOLD / don't use exit rules. Maximally Buffett-consistent. Pragmatic exception: if path-comfort matters (can't stomach VNM/DGC give-backs), TS35_act20 ≈ HOLD mean with lower per-position drawdown — a preference trade (return vs path), NOT an edge. Caveat: per-position unlimited-capital; in a slot-limited portfolio, stop-out-to-redeploy could differ (= portfolio mgmt, deliberately set aside). Files: qt_v4x_trailing.py, data/qt_v4x_trailing.{md,csv}.

## Caveats
Quality universe = 62 names with ≥12Q A/B history → mild survivorship (delisted/never-quality excluded by construction); edge is conditional on "already a quality name." 3Y horizon N=302 (entries ≤~2023). This is signal-quality (the right altitude for a long-term FILTER), distinct from deployable-portfolio (separate question — would need capital/position sizing, where prior sims showed capacity binds).

content.text:
Đã lưu memory. Để tôi khép lại honest và chỉ ra đường đi đúng mà chính kết quả này gợi ra.

## Tổng kết toàn bộ hành trình QT v4

Chúng ta đã đi một vòng đầy đủ và trung thực:

| Tầng | Kết quả |
|---|---|
| **Entry** (pick nào) | ✅ Công thức multibagger rõ: small/mid + rẻ/sợ-hãi + đang-tăng-trưởng, vào crisis/bear (VTP +554%, MWG +189%) |
| **Outcome** (dài hạn) | ✅ Edge thật ở 3Y+ (beat index); đuôi multibagger ở BOTH×small/mid |
| **Exit** (khi nào bán) | ✅ GIỮ thắng mọi rule (kể cả trailing) — đừng bán theo tín hiệu |
| **Sleeve cơ học** (dựng portfolio) | ❌ Lag index; state-timing cash phản tác dụng (−59% DD) |

## Bài học mấu chốt (và nó nhất quán)

QT v4.x **giỏi nhận diện cổ phiếu tốt** nhưng **dạng sleeve cơ học dàn trải thì pha loãng edge về mức index**. Đây không phải thất bại của bộ lọc — mà là bản chất: **multibagger edge cần TẬP TRUNG, không phải dàn trải 25 mã**. Và **đừng time tiền theo state** (giống đừng time exit — cứ giữ).

## Đường đi đúng mà kết quả này chỉ ra

Chẩn đoán nói rõ: *pha loãng giết edge*. → Test logic tiếp theo: **phiên bản TẬP TRUNG** — chỉ giữ **5-8 pick ưu tiên cao nhất** (BOTH × small/mid × crisis/bear), equal-weight, hold dài, **không state-time cash** (full-invested, low turnover). Đây là kiểm chứng trực tiếp giả thuyết "concentration bắt được multibagger mà diversification làm loãng."

Nếu phiên bản tập trung **vẫn lag** → kết luận dứt khoát QT v4.x chỉ là idea-generator cho người chọn lọc thủ công. Nếu nó **vượt index** → ta có một sleeve tập trung đáng deploy.

Tôi đã chạy rất nhiều trong phiên này — bạn muốn tôi test luôn phiên bản **tập trung 5-8 mã** (bước cuối logic của thread), hay dừng ở đây để bạn ngẫm? Cả hai đều hợp lý; framework nhận thức thì đã trọn vẹn và nằm đủ trong memory.

Vì 5 mã rất nhạy với "chọn 5 nào", tôi test **TOP5 / TOP8 / TOP12** (xem xu hướng theo độ tập trung) + ưu tiên đúng công thức (BOTH > value-trong-crisis/bear > rẻ hơn), và in ra **5 mã thực tế nó chọn + đóng góp** để minh bạch.

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
qt_v4x_concentrated.py — concentrated QT v4.x sleeve (5/8/12 names)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Diagnosis from qt_v4x_sleeve.py: a 25-name mechanical sleeve dilutes the
multibagger edge to ~index. Test whether CONCENTRATION captures it.

Spec (per the validated lessons):
  - Hold up to N names; fill free slots with highest-PRIORITY fresh signals.
  - PRIORITY: BOTH > VALUE_FEAR-in-CRISIS/BEAR > VALUE_FEAR > GROWTH-bluechip;
    tie-break cheaper (lower pe_z).
  - HOLD LONG: never sell on rules; drop only if FA tier → E. Let winners ride
    (equal-weight NEW money only; no forced down-rebalance) → low turnover.
  - NO state cash-timing (timing hurt in v1 sleeve) → deploy ~fully when signals exist.
Variants: TOP5 / TOP8 / TOP12 / FULL25 / VNINDEX. Report wealth/CAGR/MaxDD/vsVNI +
the actual TOP5 holdings & per-name contribution (transparency; concentration=luck-sensitive).
Output: data/qt_v4x_concentrated.md
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile, pickle
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd

WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"
BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
TC=0.0025
PRI={"BOTH":3,"VALUE_FEAR":2,"GROWTH":1}

def bq_query(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try:
        cmd=f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=200000'
        r=subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=600,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

def main():
    lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
    fa=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"fa_ratings_lh.csv"),parse_dates=["time","Release_Date"])
    fa=fa.sort_values(["ticker","quarter"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    fa["eff_release"]=fa["Release_Date"].fillna(fa["time"]+pd.Timedelta(days=60))
    fa["is_ab"]=fa["tier"].isin(["A","B"]).astype(int)
    fa["qnum"]=fa.groupby("ticker").cumcount()+1
    fa["pct_AB"]=fa.groupby("ticker")["is_ab"].cumsum()/fa["qnum"]*100
    fa["valid_hist"]=fa["qnum"]>=12

    panel=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl"),"rb"))
    panel["time"]=pd.to_datetime(panel["time"]); panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    panel["hi52"]=panel.groupby("ticker")["Close"].transform(lambda x:x.rolling(252,min_periods=60).max())
    panel["dd52"]=(panel["Close"]/panel["hi52"]-1)*100
    panel["pe_z"]=((panel["PE"]-panel["PE_MA5Y"])/panel["PE_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["pb_z"]=((panel["PB"]-panel["PB_MA5Y"])/panel["PB_SD5Y"].replace(0,np.nan)).clip(-10,10)
    panel["liqv"]=panel["Volume_3M_P50"]*panel["Close"]
    fin=pickle.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"qt_v4_fin.pkl"),"rb"))
    fin["eff_release"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]).fillna(pd.to_datetime(fin["q_time"])+pd.Timedelta(days=60))

    panel=panel.sort_values("time")
    fa_a=fa.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","tier","pct_AB","valid_hist","MktCap"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fa_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    fin_a=fin.sort_values("eff_release")[["ticker","eff_release","NP_R","Revenue_YoY_P0"]].rename(columns={"eff_release":"time"})
    panel=pd.merge_asof(panel,fin_a,on="time",by="ticker",direction="backward")
    panel=panel.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)

    qok=(panel["pct_AB"]>=70)&(panel["valid_hist"])&(panel["tier"].isin(["A","B"]))&(panel["liqv"]>=5e9)
    sig_g=qok&(panel["NP_R"]>=0.20)&(panel["Revenue_YoY_P0"]>=0.20)
    sig_v=qok&((panel["pe_z"]<-1)|(panel["pb_z"]<-1)|(panel["dd52"]<-30))
    panel["mc_pct"]=panel[qok].groupby("time")["MktCap"].rank(pct=True)
    panel["entry"]=sig_g|sig_v
    panel["etype"]=np.where(sig_g&sig_v,"BOTH",np.where(sig_g,"GROWTH","VALUE_FEAR"))
    panel.loc[(panel["etype"]=="GROWTH")&(panel["mc_pct"]<0.667),"entry"]=False  # growth=bluechip only
    panel["is_E"]=panel["tier"].eq("E")

    st=bq_query("SELECT s.time,s.state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live AS s ORDER BY s.time")
    st["time"]=pd.to_datetime(st["time"]); st=st.set_index("time")["state"]

    px=panel.pivot_table(index="time",columns="ticker",values="Close",aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill()
    didx=px.index; st_ff=st.reindex(didx).ffill()
    # per-month fresh entries with score
    ent_by_m={}
    panel["fresh"]=panel.groupby("ticker")["entry"].transform(lambda x:x&~x.shift(1,fill_value=False))
    for d,g in panel.groupby("time"):
        e=g[g["fresh"]]
        if len(e)==0: ent_by_m[d]=[]; continue
        s=int(st_ff.get(d,3)) if pd.notna(st_ff.get(d,np.nan)) else 3
        rows=[]
        for _,r in e.iterrows():
            score=PRI.get(r["etype"],0)*10+(3 if s in(1,2) else 0)+(-r["pe_z"] if pd.notna(r["pe_z"]) else 0)
            rows.append((r["ticker"],r["etype"],score))
        rows.sort(key=lambda x:-x[2]); ent_by_m[d]=rows
    isE_by_m={d:set(g[g["is_E"]]["ticker"]) for d,g in panel.groupby("time")}

    me=pd.Series(didx).groupby([didx.year,didx.month]).max().values
    rebal=pd.DatetimeIndex(sorted(me)); rebal=rebal[(rebal>=pd.Timestamp("2014-06-01"))&(rebal<=pd.Timestamp("2026-05-15"))]
    def price(d,t):
        s=px.loc[:d,t] if t in px.columns else pd.Series(dtype=float); s=s.dropna()
        return s.iloc[-1] if len(s) else np.nan

    def run(N,track=False):
        cash=1.0; sh={}; hist=[]; cost={}; realized={}
        for d in rebal:
            for t in [t for t in list(sh) if t in isE_by_m.get(d,set())]:
                p=price(d,t)
                if pd.notna(p): cash+=sh[t]*p*(1-TC)
                del sh[t]
            eq=sum(v*price(d,t) for t,v in sh.items() if pd.notna(price(d,t))); nav=cash+eq
            free=N-len(sh)
            if free>0:
                cand=[(t,et) for t,et,_ in ent_by_m.get(d,[]) if t not in sh and t in px.columns and pd.notna(price(d,t))]
                slice_sz=nav/N
                for t,et in cand[:free]:
                    buy=min(slice_sz,cash)
                    if buy<1e-4: break
                    p=price(d,t); sh[t]=sh.get(t,0)+buy/p; cash-=buy
                    if track: cost[t]=cost.get(t,0)+buy
            eq=sum(v*price(d,t) for t,v in sh.items() if pd.notna(price(d,t))); nav=cash+eq
            hist.append({"date":d,"nav":nav,"n":len(sh),"cash_pct":cash/nav if nav>0 else 0})
        h=pd.DataFrame(hist).set_index("date")
        # contributions: final value of each ever-held name (approx via last holding)
        contrib=None
        if track:
            last=rebal[-1]; val={t:sh.get(t,0)*price(last,t) for t in cost}
            contrib=pd.DataFrame({"invested":cost,"final_val":val}).fillna(0)
            contrib["net"]=contrib["final_val"]-contrib["invested"]
        return h,contrib

    res={}
    for N in [5,8,12,25]:
        h,c=run(N,track=(N==5)); res[N]=(h,c)
    vni=bq_query("SELECT t.time,t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time>='2014-01-01' AND t.Close>100 ORDER BY t.time")
    vni["time"]=pd.to_datetime(vni["time"]); vni_m=vni.set_index("time")["Close"].reindex(didx).ffill().reindex(rebal).ffill()
    vni_m=vni_m/vni_m.iloc[0]
    def met(nav):
        s=nav.dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
        return ((s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1)*100, (((s-s.cummax())/s.cummax()).min())*100, s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0]

    P("# QT v4.x — CONCENTRATED sleeve (does concentration capture the multibagger edge?)")
    P("")
    P(f"hold-long, drop only tier→E, no state cash-timing, equal-wt new money, TC {TC:.2%} | {rebal[0].date()}→{rebal[-1].date()}")
    P("")
    P(f"{'variant':<12}{'CAGR':>8}{'MaxDD':>9}{'Wealth':>9}{'vsVNI':>8}{'avg cash%':>10}")
    P("-"*55)
    cv,_,_=met(vni_m)
    for N in [5,8,12,25]:
        h,_=res[N]; c,dd,w=met(h["nav"])
        P(f"{'TOP'+str(N):<12}{c:>+7.2f}%{dd:>+8.2f}%{w:>+9.2f}{c-cv:>+7.2f}{h['cash_pct'].mean()*100:>9.0f}%")
    P(f"{'VNINDEX':<12}{cv:>+7.2f}%{met(vni_m)[1]:>+8.2f}%{met(vni_m)[2]:>+9.2f}")
    P("")
    # TOP5 transparency
    h5,c5=res[5]
    P("## TOP5 — actual picks & net contribution (invested vs final value, terminal)")
    if c5 is not None:
        c5=c5.sort_values("net",ascending=False)
        P(f"  {'ticker':<8}{'invested':>10}{'final_val':>11}{'net':>10}")
        for t,r in c5.head(12).iterrows():
            P(f"  {t:<8}{r['invested']:>10.3f}{r['final_val']:>11.3f}{r['net']:>+10.3f}")
        P(f"  ... {len(c5)} names ever held; top winner {c5.index[0]} net {c5['net'].iloc[0]:+.2f}, worst {c5.index[-1]} {c5['net'].iloc[-1]:+.2f}")
    P("")
    P("Read: if TOP5 >> TOP25 and beats VNI → concentration captures multibaggers (edge real,")
    P("dilution was the killer). If TOP5 ≈ or < TOP25 / noisy → edge not robustly harvestable.")
    P("")
    pd.DataFrame({f"TOP{N}":res[N][0]["nav"] for N in [5,8,12,25]}|{"VNI":vni_m}).to_csv(
        os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_concentrated_nav.csv"))
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","qt_v4x_concentrated.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))
    P("Saved data/qt_v4x_concentrated.md")

if __name__=="__main__":
    main()

Test này lộ ra một **lỗi thiết kế** quan trọng: TOP5 chỉ **giữ đúng 5 mã trong suốt 12 năm** (HPG/GAS/DXG/VNM/VCS — vintage 2014-2015) và **không bao giờ xoay vòng** vào VTP/MWG/DGC sau này, vì quy tắc "hold-forever, chỉ bỏ khi tier→E" → slot lấp đầy sớm rồi kẹt. Cộng **cash drag khổng lồ** (44-77% — không đủ tín hiệu mới để lấp slot vì slot bị khóa). → Đây **không phải test công bằng** cho câu hỏi concentration.

Với book ít slot, *phải có xoay vòng* để bắt multibagger mới. Tôi sửa: **hold tối đa ~3 năm/vị thế** (đúng horizon edge đã validate) rồi giải phóng slot → xoay vào tín hiệu ưu tiên cao mới. Chạy lại.
