for t in DEMO:
    route=get(uni,t,"route") or ("BANK" if t in bank.index else "?")
    verdict=get(uni,t,"verdict") or ""; action=get(uni,t,"action") or ""
    engine=get(eng,t,"engine") or "-"; cm="◆" if (t in eng.index and bool(eng.loc[t,"machine"])) else ""
    roic=get(eng,t,"roic5y",lambda v:f"{v:.0f}%") ; ag=get(eng,t,"asset_cagr",lambda v:f"{v*100:+.0f}%")
    m,mdet=moat(t); mt=MOAT_TYPE.get(t,"")
    mcyc=get(mc,t,"cycle") or "n/a"; mpct=get(mc,t,"GPM_pctile",lambda v:f"{v:.2f}")
    run=get(sat,t,"runway") or "n/a"; tam=get(sat,t,"tag") or ""
    ev="SPECIAL_SIT" if t in ("DGC","PAT") else ""
    P(f"━━ {t}  [{route}]  {verdict} {('→ '+action) if action else ''}")
    if route=="BANK":
        P(f"   Bank: NPL{bank.loc[t,'NPL']*100:.2f}% cov{bank.loc[t,'coverage']*100:.0f}% gate={bank.loc[t,'gate']} | MOAT {m} [{mt}]")
    else:
        P(f"   Engine: {engine}{cm}  (ROIC {roic}, asset-growth {ag})")
        P(f"   Moat:   {m} [{mt}] {mdet}")
        P(f"   Margin-cycle: {mcyc} (GPM pctile {mpct})   Runway/TAM: {run} [{tam}]")
    if ev: P(f"   EVENT: {ev}")
    P("")
    cards.append({"ticker":t,"route":route,"verdict":verdict,"engine":f"{engine}{cm}","moat":m,"moat_type":mt,

pd.DataFrame(cards).to_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","dna_cards.csv"),index=False)

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
dna_card.py — self-contained per-ticker "investment DNA card" (8 dims, 100% coverage)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Drop in ANY ticker → full profile across every dimension built this session.
Computes all dims ON THE FLY from BQ (ICB-fallback router → works for any ticker,
not just the quality universe). Banks pull real NPL/CAR from cached vnstock (bank_lens_v3).
Dims: ROUTE(ICB) · VALUATION(multi-lens) · ENGINE(runway×ROIC) · CASH◆ · MOAT ·
      MARGIN-CYCLE · RUNWAY/TAM · EVENT.
Usage: edit DEMO list (or pass tickers). Output: data/dna_cards.md + .csv
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"; BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
W=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
COMMODITY_MAP={"DRI":"rubber","PHR":"rubber","DPR":"rubber","GVR":"rubber","TRC":"rubber","HRC":"rubber",
 "HPG":"iron_ore","HSG":"iron_ore","NKG":"iron_ore","SMC":"iron_ore","POM":"iron_ore","DCM":"urea","DPM":"urea",
 "DDV":"dap","LAS":"dap","DGC":"dap","CSV":"dap"}
MOAT_TYPE={"VCS":"TECH+BRAND(global TM)","DGC":"SCALE+vert-integ","BMP":"BRAND(pipes S/Central)","VNM":"BRAND(dairy)",
 "DRC":"NONE(commodity tire)","CSM":"NONE(commodity tire)","DHC":"LOCATION(South paper)","HPG":"SCALE+cost(steel)",
 "FPT":"TECH(software export)","MWG":"SCALE+exec(retail)","FRT":"network/exec(pharma)","QTP":"none(fixed utility)",
 "PNJ":"BRAND(jewelry)","SCS":"infra-monopoly(cargo)","NCT":"infra(cargo)","SAB":"BRAND(beer)","MCH":"BRAND(consumer)",
 "DHG":"BRAND(pharma)","DPR":"land-bank(rubber)","ACB":"bank-franchise","MBB":"bank-CASA-franchise","VCB":"bank-premier"}
EXPORT={"DGC","VCS","FMC","VHC","ANV","MPC","TNG","MSH","STK","TCM","PTB","GIL","FPT","DRC","CSM"}
STRUCTURAL={"HPG","HSG","NKG"}
EVENTS={"DGC":"mine suspended + chairman prosecuted (Q1/26); moat intact, swing=mine-access+sulfur",
        "PAT":"DGC-group apatite arm, same event"}
DEMO=["VCS","DGC","DRC","DHC","BMP","QTP","HPG","FRT","VNM","MWG","PNJ","SCS","FMC","ACB","MBB","DPR","CSM","DHG","NKG","DCM"]

def bq(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try: r=subprocess.run(f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=2000000',capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=400,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

tks="','".join(DEMO)
# A) latest snapshot
snap=bq(f"""WITH L AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.time) mx FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.PB IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.ticker),
H AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.Close) hi FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.time>=DATE_SUB(DATE '2026-05-29',INTERVAL 365 DAY) GROUP BY t.ticker)
SELECT t.ticker,CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) sec,t.ICB_Code, ROUND(t.PE,1) PE,
 ROUND((t.PE-t.PE_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y,0),2) pe_z, ROUND((t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0),2) pb_z, t.PB,
 ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0,t.NP_P4)-1,3) np_yoy, ROUND(t.ROE5Y*100,1) roe5y, ROUND(t.ROIC5Y*100,1) roic5y,
 ROUND(t.GPM_P0*100,1) gpm_now, ROUND(t.Close/NULLIF(h.hi,0)-1,2) dd, ROUND(t.Volume_3M_P50*t.Close/1e9,1) liqB
FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN L ON L.ticker=t.ticker AND L.mx=t.time JOIN H h ON h.ticker=t.ticker""").set_index("ticker")
# B) quarterly series
q=bq(f"""SELECT t.ticker,t.time,t.NP_P0,t.CF_OA_P0,t.totalAsset_P0,t.Cash_P0,t.OShares,t.Revenue_P0,t.GPM_P0
FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.time>='2011-01-01' ORDER BY t.ticker,t.time""")
q["time"]=pd.to_datetime(q["time"])
try: bank=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","bank_lens_v3.csv")).set_index("ticker")
except Exception: bank=pd.DataFrame()
comm={}
for c in set(COMMODITY_MAP.values()):
    try:
        d=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data",f"{c}_monthly.csv")); d.columns=["m","p"]
        d["pct"]=d["p"].rolling(60,min_periods=24).apply(lambda x:(x.iloc[-1]>=x).mean())
        comm[c]=float(d["pct"].iloc[-1])
    except Exception: comm[c]=np.nan

def cagr(a,b,y): return (a/b)**(1/y)-1 if (pd.notna(a) and pd.notna(b) and a>0 and b>0) else np.nan
def series(t):
    g=q[q["ticker"]==t].sort_values("time")
    out={}
    np_=g["NP_P0"]; cfo=g["CF_OA_P0"]
    ttm_np=np_.rolling(4).sum(); ttm_cfo=cfo.rolling(4).sum()
    rat=(ttm_cfo/ttm_np).where(ttm_np>0); rec=rat.dropna().tail(8)
    out["cfo_np_med"]=rec.median() if len(rec)>=4 else np.nan
    out["pct_ge1"]=(rec>=1).mean() if len(rec)>=4 else np.nan
    ta=g["totalAsset_P0"].dropna(); ta=ta[ta>0]
    out["asset_cagr"]=cagr(ta.iloc[-1],ta.iloc[max(0,len(ta)-17)],min(4,len(ta)-1)) if len(ta)>=12 else np.nan
    cash=g["Cash_P0"].dropna(); out["cash_grow"]=(cash.iloc[-1]>cash.iloc[max(0,len(cash)-9)]) if len(cash)>=4 else False
    osh=g["OShares"].dropna(); out["dilut"]=(osh.iloc[-1]/osh.iloc[max(0,len(osh)-13)]-1) if len(osh)>=8 else np.nan
    rev=g["Revenue_P0"].rolling(4).sum().dropna()
    out["rev_rec"]=cagr(rev.iloc[-1],rev.iloc[-13],3) if len(rev)>=13 else np.nan
    out["rev_pri"]=cagr(rev.iloc[-13],rev.iloc[-25],3) if len(rev)>=25 else np.nan
    gpm=g["GPM_P0"].dropna(); out["gpm_pct"]=(gpm<=gpm.iloc[-1]).mean() if len(gpm)>=12 else np.nan
    return out

def fmtp(v,suf="%",mul=100,sign=True):
    if pd.isna(v): return "n/a"
    return (f"{v*mul:+.0f}{suf}" if sign else f"{v*mul:.0f}{suf}")

lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
P("# Investment DNA cards — self-contained, 100% coverage (8 dims)")
P("ROUTE(ICB)·VALUATION·ENGINE(runway×ROIC)·CASH◆·MOAT·MARGIN-CYCLE·RUNWAY/TAM·EVENT")
P("")
cards=[]
for t in DEMO:
    if t not in snap.index: P(f"━━ {t}: no data\n"); continue
    s=snap.loc[t]; ser=series(t); sec=s["sec"]
    route="BANK" if sec==8 and (bank.empty or t in bank.index or s["ICB_Code"]==8355) else ("CYCLICAL" if t in COMMODITY_MAP else "COMPOUNDER")
    if s["ICB_Code"]==8355: route="BANK"
    # MOAT
    gpm=s["gpm_now"]; roe=s["roe5y"]
    moat="STRONG" if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18 and pd.notna(gpm) and gpm>=25) else ("WEAK/commodity" if (pd.notna(gpm) and gpm<15) or (pd.notna(roe) and roe<10) else "MODERATE")
    mt=MOAT_TYPE.get(t,"")
    # MARGIN-CYCLE
    gp=ser["gpm_pct"]; mcyc=("MARGIN_BOTTOM" if gp<=0.25 else "MARGIN_PEAK" if gp>=0.75 else "MID") if pd.notna(gp) else "n/a"
    # RUNWAY/TAM
    rr,rp=ser["rev_rec"],ser["rev_pri"]; accel=(rr-rp) if (pd.notna(rr) and pd.notna(rp)) else np.nan
    if pd.isna(rr): run="n/a"
    elif rr>=0.20: run="CAPTURING"
    elif rr>=0.15 and (pd.isna(accel) or accel>=-0.05): run="DURABLE"
    elif pd.notna(rp) and rp>=0.15 and pd.notna(accel) and accel<=-0.10: run="SATURATING"
    elif rr<0.08 and (pd.isna(rp) or rp<0.08): run="MATURE/FLAT"
    else: run="MODERATE"
    tam="EXPORT" if t in EXPORT else ("STRUCTURAL" if t in STRUCTURAL else "DOMESTIC")
    if route=="BANK" and not bank.empty and t in bank.index:
        b=bank.loc[t]
        P(f"━━ {t} [BANK]  gate={b['gate']}")
        P(f"   Asset-quality: NPL {b['NPL']*100:.2f}% cov {b['coverage']*100:.0f}% CAR {(b['CAR']*100 if pd.notna(b['CAR']) else float('nan')):.0f}% | ROE {b['ROE']*100:.0f}% PB {b['PB']:.2f}")
        P(f"   Moat: {moat} [{mt}]   Runway/TAM: {run} [{tam}]")
        cards.append({"ticker":t,"route":"BANK","gate":b["gate"],"moat":moat,"runway":run}); P(""); continue
    # ENGINE
    machine=(pd.notna(ser["pct_ge1"]) and ser["pct_ge1"]>=0.6 and pd.notna(ser["cfo_np_med"]) and ser["cfo_np_med"]>=1 and ser["cash_grow"])
    runway_ok=(pd.notna(ser["asset_cagr"]) and ser["asset_cagr"]>0.03); roic_ok=(pd.notna(s["roic5y"]) and s["roic5y"]>=12)
    engine="COMPOUNDER" if (roic_ok and runway_ok) else ("YIELD" if (machine and not runway_ok) else ("LOWROIC_GROWTH" if (runway_ok and not roic_ok) else ("CASH_COW" if machine else "-")))
    # VALUATION (compounder lens)
    peg=(s["PE"]/(s["np_yoy"]*100)) if (pd.notna(s["np_yoy"]) and s["np_yoy"]>0 and s["PE"]>0) else np.nan
    hist=(s["pe_z"]<-1) or (s["pb_z"]<-1); pegc=(0<peg<=1) if pd.notna(peg) else False; absc=(s["PE"]<10) or (s["PB"]<1.2)

    verdict=("VALUE_TRAP→event_check" if (trap and (hist or absc)) else "CHEAP_QUALITY" if nl>=2 else "CHEAP_1lens" if nl==1 else "NOT_CHEAP")
    cyc=f"  | commodity {COMMODITY_MAP[t]} pctile {comm.get(COMMODITY_MAP[t],float('nan')):.2f}" if route=="CYCLICAL" else ""
    P(f"━━ {t} [{route}]  {verdict}  (PE{s['PE']} pe_z{s['pe_z']:+.1f} PEG{peg:.2f} dd{fmtp(s['dd'])}){cyc}")

    P(f"   Moat:   {moat} [{mt}]  (GPM {fmtp(gpm,'%',1,False)}, ROE {fmtp(roe,'%',1,False)})")
    P(f"   Margin-cycle: {mcyc} (GPM pctile {gp:.2f})" if pd.notna(gp) else f"   Margin-cycle: n/a")
    P(f"   Runway/TAM:   {run} [{tam}]  (rev CAGR {fmtp(rr)} vs prior {fmtp(rp)})")
    if t in EVENTS: P(f"   EVENT: {EVENTS[t]}")
    P("")
    cards.append({"ticker":t,"route":route,"verdict":verdict,"engine":f"{engine}{'◆' if machine else ''}","moat":moat,"moat_type":mt,"margin_cycle":mcyc,"runway":run,"tam":tam,"roic":s["roic5y"],"event":EVENTS.get(t,"")})
pd.DataFrame(cards).to_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","dna_cards.csv"),index=False)
P(f"[{len(cards)} cards | route coverage 100% via ICB-fallback]")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
dna_card.py — self-contained per-ticker "investment DNA card" (8 dims, 100% coverage)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Drop in ANY ticker → full profile across every dimension built this session.
Computes all dims ON THE FLY from BQ (ICB-fallback router → works for any ticker,
not just the quality universe). Banks pull real NPL/CAR from cached vnstock (bank_lens_v3).
Dims: ROUTE(ICB) · VALUATION(multi-lens) · ENGINE(runway×ROIC) · CASH◆ · MOAT ·
      MARGIN-CYCLE · RUNWAY/TAM · EVENT.
Usage: edit DEMO list (or pass tickers). Output: data/dna_cards.md + .csv
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"; BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
W=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
COMMODITY_MAP={"DRI":"rubber","PHR":"rubber","DPR":"rubber","GVR":"rubber","TRC":"rubber","HRC":"rubber",
 "HPG":"iron_ore","HSG":"iron_ore","NKG":"iron_ore","SMC":"iron_ore","POM":"iron_ore","DCM":"urea","DPM":"urea",
 "DDV":"dap","LAS":"dap","DGC":"dap","CSV":"dap"}
MOAT_TYPE={"VCS":"TECH+BRAND(global TM)","DGC":"SCALE+vert-integ","BMP":"BRAND(pipes S/Central)","VNM":"BRAND(dairy)",
 "DRC":"NONE(commodity tire)","CSM":"NONE(commodity tire)","DHC":"LOCATION(South paper)","HPG":"SCALE+cost(steel)",
 "FPT":"TECH(software export)","MWG":"SCALE+exec(retail)","FRT":"network/exec(pharma)","QTP":"none(fixed utility)",
 "PNJ":"BRAND(jewelry)","SCS":"infra-monopoly(cargo)","NCT":"infra(cargo)","SAB":"BRAND(beer)","MCH":"BRAND(consumer)",
 "DHG":"BRAND(pharma)","DPR":"land-bank(rubber)","ACB":"bank-franchise","MBB":"bank-CASA-franchise","VCB":"bank-premier"}
EXPORT={"DGC","VCS","FMC","VHC","ANV","MPC","TNG","MSH","STK","TCM","PTB","GIL","FPT","DRC","CSM"}
STRUCTURAL={"HPG","HSG","NKG"}
EVENTS={"DGC":"mine suspended + chairman prosecuted (Q1/26); moat intact, swing=mine-access+sulfur",
        "PAT":"DGC-group apatite arm, same event"}
DEMO=["VCS","DGC","DRC","DHC","BMP","QTP","HPG","FRT","VNM","MWG","PNJ","SCS","FMC","ACB","MBB","DPR","CSM","DHG","NKG","DCM"]

def bq(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try: r=subprocess.run(f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=2000000',capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=400,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

tks="','".join(DEMO)
# A) latest snapshot
snap=bq(f"""WITH lt AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.time) mx FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.PB IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.ticker),
hiw AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.Close) hi FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.time>=DATE_SUB(DATE '2026-05-29',INTERVAL 365 DAY) GROUP BY t.ticker)
SELECT t.ticker,CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) sec,t.ICB_Code, ROUND(t.PE,1) PE,
 ROUND((t.PE-t.PE_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y,0),2) pe_z, ROUND((t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0),2) pb_z, t.PB,
 ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0,t.NP_P4)-1,3) np_yoy, ROUND(t.ROE5Y*100,1) roe5y, ROUND(t.ROIC5Y*100,1) roic5y,
 ROUND(t.GPM_P0*100,1) gpm_now, ROUND(t.Close/NULLIF(hiw.hi,0)-1,2) dd, ROUND(t.Volume_3M_P50*t.Close/1e9,1) liqB
FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN lt ON lt.ticker=t.ticker AND lt.mx=t.time JOIN hiw ON hiw.ticker=t.ticker""").set_index("ticker")
# B) quarterly series
q=bq(f"""SELECT t.ticker,t.time,t.NP_P0,t.CF_OA_P0,t.totalAsset_P0,t.Cash_P0,t.OShares,t.Revenue_P0,t.GPM_P0
FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.time>='2011-01-01' ORDER BY t.ticker,t.time""")
q["time"]=pd.to_datetime(q["time"])
try: bank=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","bank_lens_v3.csv")).set_index("ticker")
except Exception: bank=pd.DataFrame()
comm={}
for c in set(COMMODITY_MAP.values()):
    try:
        d=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data",f"{c}_monthly.csv")); d.columns=["m","p"]
        d["pct"]=d["p"].rolling(60,min_periods=24).apply(lambda x:(x.iloc[-1]>=x).mean())
        comm[c]=float(d["pct"].iloc[-1])
    except Exception: comm[c]=np.nan

def cagr(a,b,y): return (a/b)**(1/y)-1 if (pd.notna(a) and pd.notna(b) and a>0 and b>0) else np.nan
def series(t):
    g=q[q["ticker"]==t].sort_values("time")
    out={}
    np_=g["NP_P0"]; cfo=g["CF_OA_P0"]
    ttm_np=np_.rolling(4).sum(); ttm_cfo=cfo.rolling(4).sum()
    rat=(ttm_cfo/ttm_np).where(ttm_np>0); rec=rat.dropna().tail(8)
    out["cfo_np_med"]=rec.median() if len(rec)>=4 else np.nan
    out["pct_ge1"]=(rec>=1).mean() if len(rec)>=4 else np.nan
    ta=g["totalAsset_P0"].dropna(); ta=ta[ta>0]
    out["asset_cagr"]=cagr(ta.iloc[-1],ta.iloc[max(0,len(ta)-17)],min(4,len(ta)-1)) if len(ta)>=12 else np.nan
    cash=g["Cash_P0"].dropna(); out["cash_grow"]=(cash.iloc[-1]>cash.iloc[max(0,len(cash)-9)]) if len(cash)>=4 else False
    osh=g["OShares"].dropna(); out["dilut"]=(osh.iloc[-1]/osh.iloc[max(0,len(osh)-13)]-1) if len(osh)>=8 else np.nan
    rev=g["Revenue_P0"].rolling(4).sum().dropna()
    out["rev_rec"]=cagr(rev.iloc[-1],rev.iloc[-13],3) if len(rev)>=13 else np.nan
    out["rev_pri"]=cagr(rev.iloc[-13],rev.iloc[-25],3) if len(rev)>=25 else np.nan
    gpm=g["GPM_P0"].dropna(); out["gpm_pct"]=(gpm<=gpm.iloc[-1]).mean() if len(gpm)>=12 else np.nan
    return out

def fmtp(v,suf="%",mul=100,sign=True):
    if pd.isna(v): return "n/a"
    return (f"{v*mul:+.0f}{suf}" if sign else f"{v*mul:.0f}{suf}")

lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
P("# Investment DNA cards — self-contained, 100% coverage (8 dims)")
P("ROUTE(ICB)·VALUATION·ENGINE(runway×ROIC)·CASH◆·MOAT·MARGIN-CYCLE·RUNWAY/TAM·EVENT")
P("")
cards=[]
for t in DEMO:
    if t not in snap.index: P(f"━━ {t}: no data\n"); continue
    s=snap.loc[t]; ser=series(t); sec=s["sec"]
    route="BANK" if sec==8 and (bank.empty or t in bank.index or s["ICB_Code"]==8355) else ("CYCLICAL" if t in COMMODITY_MAP else "COMPOUNDER")
    if s["ICB_Code"]==8355: route="BANK"
    # MOAT
    gpm=s["gpm_now"]; roe=s["roe5y"]
    moat="STRONG" if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18 and pd.notna(gpm) and gpm>=25) else ("WEAK/commodity" if (pd.notna(gpm) and gpm<15) or (pd.notna(roe) and roe<10) else "MODERATE")
    mt=MOAT_TYPE.get(t,"")
    # MARGIN-CYCLE
    gp=ser["gpm_pct"]; mcyc=("MARGIN_BOTTOM" if gp<=0.25 else "MARGIN_PEAK" if gp>=0.75 else "MID") if pd.notna(gp) else "n/a"
    # RUNWAY/TAM
    rr,rp=ser["rev_rec"],ser["rev_pri"]; accel=(rr-rp) if (pd.notna(rr) and pd.notna(rp)) else np.nan
    if pd.isna(rr): run="n/a"
    elif rr>=0.20: run="CAPTURING"
    elif rr>=0.15 and (pd.isna(accel) or accel>=-0.05): run="DURABLE"
    elif pd.notna(rp) and rp>=0.15 and pd.notna(accel) and accel<=-0.10: run="SATURATING"
    elif rr<0.08 and (pd.isna(rp) or rp<0.08): run="MATURE/FLAT"
    else: run="MODERATE"
    tam="EXPORT" if t in EXPORT else ("STRUCTURAL" if t in STRUCTURAL else "DOMESTIC")
    if route=="BANK" and not bank.empty and t in bank.index:
        b=bank.loc[t]
        P(f"━━ {t} [BANK]  gate={b['gate']}")
        P(f"   Asset-quality: NPL {b['NPL']*100:.2f}% cov {b['coverage']*100:.0f}% CAR {(b['CAR']*100 if pd.notna(b['CAR']) else float('nan')):.0f}% | ROE {b['ROE']*100:.0f}% PB {b['PB']:.2f}")
        P(f"   Moat: {moat} [{mt}]   Runway/TAM: {run} [{tam}]")
        cards.append({"ticker":t,"route":"BANK","gate":b["gate"],"moat":moat,"runway":run}); P(""); continue
    # ENGINE
    machine=(pd.notna(ser["pct_ge1"]) and ser["pct_ge1"]>=0.6 and pd.notna(ser["cfo_np_med"]) and ser["cfo_np_med"]>=1 and ser["cash_grow"])
    runway_ok=(pd.notna(ser["asset_cagr"]) and ser["asset_cagr"]>0.03); roic_ok=(pd.notna(s["roic5y"]) and s["roic5y"]>=12)
    engine="COMPOUNDER" if (roic_ok and runway_ok) else ("YIELD" if (machine and not runway_ok) else ("LOWROIC_GROWTH" if (runway_ok and not roic_ok) else ("CASH_COW" if machine else "-")))
    # VALUATION (compounder lens)
    peg=(s["PE"]/(s["np_yoy"]*100)) if (pd.notna(s["np_yoy"]) and s["np_yoy"]>0 and s["PE"]>0) else np.nan
    hist=(s["pe_z"]<-1) or (s["pb_z"]<-1); pegc=(0<peg<=1) if pd.notna(peg) else False; absc=(s["PE"]<10) or (s["PB"]<1.2)
    trap=(pd.notna(s["np_yoy"]) and s["np_yoy"]<-0.15); nl=sum([hist,pegc,absc])
    verdict=("VALUE_TRAP→event_check" if (trap and (hist or absc)) else "CHEAP_QUALITY" if nl>=2 else "CHEAP_1lens" if nl==1 else "NOT_CHEAP")
    cyc=f"  | commodity {COMMODITY_MAP[t]} pctile {comm.get(COMMODITY_MAP[t],float('nan')):.2f}" if route=="CYCLICAL" else ""
    P(f"━━ {t} [{route}]  {verdict}  (PE{s['PE']} pe_z{s['pe_z']:+.1f} PEG{peg:.2f} dd{fmtp(s['dd'])}){cyc}")
    P(f"   Engine: {engine}{'◆' if machine else ''}  (ROIC {fmtp(s['roic5y'],'%',1,False)}, asset-growth {fmtp(ser['asset_cagr'])}, dilut3y {fmtp(ser['dilut'])})")
    P(f"   Moat:   {moat} [{mt}]  (GPM {fmtp(gpm,'%',1,False)}, ROE {fmtp(roe,'%',1,False)})")
    P(f"   Margin-cycle: {mcyc} (GPM pctile {gp:.2f})" if pd.notna(gp) else f"   Margin-cycle: n/a")
    P(f"   Runway/TAM:   {run} [{tam}]  (rev CAGR {fmtp(rr)} vs prior {fmtp(rp)})")
    if t in EVENTS: P(f"   EVENT: {EVENTS[t]}")
    P("")
    cards.append({"ticker":t,"route":route,"verdict":verdict,"engine":f"{engine}{'◆' if machine else ''}","moat":moat,"moat_type":mt,"margin_cycle":mcyc,"runway":run,"tam":tam,"roic":s["roic5y"],"event":EVENTS.get(t,"")})
pd.DataFrame(cards).to_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","dna_cards.csv"),index=False)
P(f"[{len(cards)} cards | route coverage 100% via ICB-fallback]")
with open(os.path.join(W,"data","dna_cards.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
P("Saved data/dna_cards.{md,csv}")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
dna_card.py — self-contained per-ticker "investment DNA card" (8 dims, 100% coverage)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Drop in ANY ticker → full profile across every dimension built this session.
Computes all dims ON THE FLY from BQ (ICB-fallback router → works for any ticker,
not just the quality universe). Banks pull real NPL/CAR from cached vnstock (bank_lens_v3).
Dims: ROUTE(ICB) · VALUATION(multi-lens) · ENGINE(runway×ROIC) · CASH◆ · MOAT ·
      MARGIN-CYCLE · RUNWAY/TAM · EVENT.
Usage: edit DEMO list (or pass tickers). Output: data/dna_cards.md + .csv
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"; BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
W=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
COMMODITY_MAP={"DRI":"rubber","PHR":"rubber","DPR":"rubber","GVR":"rubber","TRC":"rubber","HRC":"rubber",
 "HPG":"iron_ore","HSG":"iron_ore","NKG":"iron_ore","SMC":"iron_ore","POM":"iron_ore","DCM":"urea","DPM":"urea",
 "DDV":"dap","LAS":"dap","DGC":"dap","CSV":"dap"}
MOAT_TYPE={"VCS":"TECH+BRAND(global TM)","DGC":"SCALE+vert-integ","BMP":"BRAND(pipes S/Central)","VNM":"BRAND(dairy)",
 "DRC":"NONE(commodity tire)","CSM":"NONE(commodity tire)","DHC":"LOCATION(South paper)","HPG":"SCALE+cost(steel)",
 "FPT":"TECH(software export)","MWG":"SCALE+exec(retail)","FRT":"network/exec(pharma)","QTP":"none(fixed utility)",
 "PNJ":"BRAND(jewelry)","SCS":"infra-monopoly(cargo)","NCT":"infra(cargo)","SAB":"BRAND(beer)","MCH":"BRAND(consumer)",
 "DHG":"BRAND(pharma)","DPR":"land-bank(rubber)","ACB":"bank-franchise","MBB":"bank-CASA-franchise","VCB":"bank-premier"}
EXPORT={"DGC","VCS","FMC","VHC","ANV","MPC","TNG","MSH","STK","TCM","PTB","GIL","FPT","DRC","CSM"}
STRUCTURAL={"HPG","HSG","NKG"}
EVENTS={"DGC":"mine suspended + chairman prosecuted (Q1/26); moat intact, swing=mine-access+sulfur",
        "PAT":"DGC-group apatite arm, same event"}
DEMO=["VCS","DGC","DRC","DHC","BMP","QTP","HPG","FRT","VNM","MWG","PNJ","SCS","FMC","ACB","MBB","DPR","CSM","DHG","NKG","DCM"]

def bq(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try: r=subprocess.run(f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=2000000',capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=400,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

tks="','".join(DEMO)
# A) latest snapshot
snap=bq(f"""WITH lt AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.time) mx FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.PB IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.ticker),
hiw AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.Close) hi FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.time>=DATE_SUB(DATE '2026-05-29',INTERVAL 365 DAY) GROUP BY t.ticker)
SELECT t.ticker,CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) sec,t.ICB_Code, ROUND(t.PE,1) PE,
 ROUND((t.PE-t.PE_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y,0),2) pe_z, ROUND((t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0),2) pb_z, t.PB,
 ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0,t.NP_P4)-1,3) np_yoy, ROUND(t.ROE5Y*100,1) roe5y, ROUND(t.ROIC5Y*100,1) roic5y,
 ROUND(t.Close/NULLIF(hiw.hi,0)-1,2) dd, ROUND(t.Volume_3M_P50*t.Close/1e9,1) liqB
FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN lt ON lt.ticker=t.ticker AND lt.mx=t.time JOIN hiw ON hiw.ticker=t.ticker""").set_index("ticker")
# B) quarterly series
q=bq(f"""SELECT t.ticker,t.time,t.NP_P0,t.CF_OA_P0,t.totalAsset_P0,t.Cash_P0,t.OShares,t.Revenue_P0,t.GPM_P0
FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.time>='2011-01-01' ORDER BY t.ticker,t.time""")
q["time"]=pd.to_datetime(q["time"])
try: bank=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","bank_lens_v3.csv")).set_index("ticker")
except Exception: bank=pd.DataFrame()
comm={}
for c in set(COMMODITY_MAP.values()):
    try:
        d=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data",f"{c}_monthly.csv")); d.columns=["m","p"]
        d["pct"]=d["p"].rolling(60,min_periods=24).apply(lambda x:(x.iloc[-1]>=x).mean())
        comm[c]=float(d["pct"].iloc[-1])
    except Exception: comm[c]=np.nan

def cagr(a,b,y): return (a/b)**(1/y)-1 if (pd.notna(a) and pd.notna(b) and a>0 and b>0) else np.nan
def series(t):
    g=q[q["ticker"]==t].sort_values("time")
    out={}
    np_=g["NP_P0"]; cfo=g["CF_OA_P0"]
    ttm_np=np_.rolling(4).sum(); ttm_cfo=cfo.rolling(4).sum()
    rat=(ttm_cfo/ttm_np).where(ttm_np>0); rec=rat.dropna().tail(8)
    out["cfo_np_med"]=rec.median() if len(rec)>=4 else np.nan
    out["pct_ge1"]=(rec>=1).mean() if len(rec)>=4 else np.nan
    ta=g["totalAsset_P0"].dropna(); ta=ta[ta>0]
    out["asset_cagr"]=cagr(ta.iloc[-1],ta.iloc[max(0,len(ta)-17)],min(4,len(ta)-1)) if len(ta)>=12 else np.nan
    cash=g["Cash_P0"].dropna(); out["cash_grow"]=(cash.iloc[-1]>cash.iloc[max(0,len(cash)-9)]) if len(cash)>=4 else False
    osh=g["OShares"].dropna(); out["dilut"]=(osh.iloc[-1]/osh.iloc[max(0,len(osh)-13)]-1) if len(osh)>=8 else np.nan
    rev=g["Revenue_P0"].rolling(4).sum().dropna()
    out["rev_rec"]=cagr(rev.iloc[-1],rev.iloc[-13],3) if len(rev)>=13 else np.nan
    out["rev_pri"]=cagr(rev.iloc[-13],rev.iloc[-25],3) if len(rev)>=25 else np.nan
    gpm=g["GPM_P0"].dropna(); out["gpm_pct"]=(gpm<=gpm.iloc[-1]).mean() if len(gpm)>=12 else np.nan
    return out

def fmtp(v,suf="%",mul=100,sign=True):
    if pd.isna(v): return "n/a"
    return (f"{v*mul:+.0f}{suf}" if sign else f"{v*mul:.0f}{suf}")

lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
P("# Investment DNA cards — self-contained, 100% coverage (8 dims)")
P("ROUTE(ICB)·VALUATION·ENGINE(runway×ROIC)·CASH◆·MOAT·MARGIN-CYCLE·RUNWAY/TAM·EVENT")
P("")
cards=[]
for t in DEMO:
    if t not in snap.index: P(f"━━ {t}: no data\n"); continue
    s=snap.loc[t]; ser=series(t); sec=s["sec"]
    route="BANK" if sec==8 and (bank.empty or t in bank.index or s["ICB_Code"]==8355) else ("CYCLICAL" if t in COMMODITY_MAP else "COMPOUNDER")
    if s["ICB_Code"]==8355: route="BANK"
    # MOAT
    gpm=s["gpm_now"]; roe=s["roe5y"]
    moat="STRONG" if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18 and pd.notna(gpm) and gpm>=25) else ("WEAK/commodity" if (pd.notna(gpm) and gpm<15) or (pd.notna(roe) and roe<10) else "MODERATE")
    mt=MOAT_TYPE.get(t,"")
    # MARGIN-CYCLE
    gp=ser["gpm_pct"]; mcyc=("MARGIN_BOTTOM" if gp<=0.25 else "MARGIN_PEAK" if gp>=0.75 else "MID") if pd.notna(gp) else "n/a"
    # RUNWAY/TAM
    rr,rp=ser["rev_rec"],ser["rev_pri"]; accel=(rr-rp) if (pd.notna(rr) and pd.notna(rp)) else np.nan
    if pd.isna(rr): run="n/a"
    elif rr>=0.20: run="CAPTURING"
    elif rr>=0.15 and (pd.isna(accel) or accel>=-0.05): run="DURABLE"
    elif pd.notna(rp) and rp>=0.15 and pd.notna(accel) and accel<=-0.10: run="SATURATING"
    elif rr<0.08 and (pd.isna(rp) or rp<0.08): run="MATURE/FLAT"
    else: run="MODERATE"
    tam="EXPORT" if t in EXPORT else ("STRUCTURAL" if t in STRUCTURAL else "DOMESTIC")
    if route=="BANK" and not bank.empty and t in bank.index:
        b=bank.loc[t]
        P(f"━━ {t} [BANK]  gate={b['gate']}")
        P(f"   Asset-quality: NPL {b['NPL']*100:.2f}% cov {b['coverage']*100:.0f}% CAR {(b['CAR']*100 if pd.notna(b['CAR']) else float('nan')):.0f}% | ROE {b['ROE']*100:.0f}% PB {b['PB']:.2f}")
        P(f"   Moat: {moat} [{mt}]   Runway/TAM: {run} [{tam}]")
        cards.append({"ticker":t,"route":"BANK","gate":b["gate"],"moat":moat,"runway":run}); P(""); continue
    # ENGINE
    machine=(pd.notna(ser["pct_ge1"]) and ser["pct_ge1"]>=0.6 and pd.notna(ser["cfo_np_med"]) and ser["cfo_np_med"]>=1 and ser["cash_grow"])
    runway_ok=(pd.notna(ser["asset_cagr"]) and ser["asset_cagr"]>0.03); roic_ok=(pd.notna(s["roic5y"]) and s["roic5y"]>=12)
    engine="COMPOUNDER" if (roic_ok and runway_ok) else ("YIELD" if (machine and not runway_ok) else ("LOWROIC_GROWTH" if (runway_ok and not roic_ok) else ("CASH_COW" if machine else "-")))
    # VALUATION (compounder lens)
    peg=(s["PE"]/(s["np_yoy"]*100)) if (pd.notna(s["np_yoy"]) and s["np_yoy"]>0 and s["PE"]>0) else np.nan
    hist=(s["pe_z"]<-1) or (s["pb_z"]<-1); pegc=(0<peg<=1) if pd.notna(peg) else False; absc=(s["PE"]<10) or (s["PB"]<1.2)
    trap=(pd.notna(s["np_yoy"]) and s["np_yoy"]<-0.15); nl=sum([hist,pegc,absc])
    verdict=("VALUE_TRAP→event_check" if (trap and (hist or absc)) else "CHEAP_QUALITY" if nl>=2 else "CHEAP_1lens" if nl==1 else "NOT_CHEAP")
    cyc=f"  | commodity {COMMODITY_MAP[t]} pctile {comm.get(COMMODITY_MAP[t],float('nan')):.2f}" if route=="CYCLICAL" else ""
    P(f"━━ {t} [{route}]  {verdict}  (PE{s['PE']} pe_z{s['pe_z']:+.1f} PEG{peg:.2f} dd{fmtp(s['dd'])}){cyc}")
    P(f"   Engine: {engine}{'◆' if machine else ''}  (ROIC {fmtp(s['roic5y'],'%',1,False)}, asset-growth {fmtp(ser['asset_cagr'])}, dilut3y {fmtp(ser['dilut'])})")
    P(f"   Moat:   {moat} [{mt}]  (GPM {fmtp(gpm,'%',1,False)}, ROE {fmtp(roe,'%',1,False)})")
    P(f"   Margin-cycle: {mcyc} (GPM pctile {gp:.2f})" if pd.notna(gp) else f"   Margin-cycle: n/a")
    P(f"   Runway/TAM:   {run} [{tam}]  (rev CAGR {fmtp(rr)} vs prior {fmtp(rp)})")
    if t in EVENTS: P(f"   EVENT: {EVENTS[t]}")
    P("")
    cards.append({"ticker":t,"route":route,"verdict":verdict,"engine":f"{engine}{'◆' if machine else ''}","moat":moat,"moat_type":mt,"margin_cycle":mcyc,"runway":run,"tam":tam,"roic":s["roic5y"],"event":EVENTS.get(t,"")})
pd.DataFrame(cards).to_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","dna_cards.csv"),index=False)
P(f"[{len(cards)} cards | route coverage 100% via ICB-fallback]")
with open(os.path.join(W,"data","dna_cards.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
P("Saved data/dna_cards.{md,csv}")

    if pd.isna(rr): run="n/a"
    elif rr>=0.20: run="CAPTURING"
    elif rr>=0.15 and (pd.isna(accel) or accel>=-0.05): run="DURABLE"
    elif pd.notna(rp) and rp>=0.15 and pd.notna(accel) and accel<=-0.10: run="SATURATING"
    elif rr<0.08 and (pd.isna(rp) or rp<0.08): run="MATURE/FLAT"
    else: run="MODERATE"
    tam="EXPORT" if t in EXPORT else ("STRUCTURAL" if t in STRUCTURAL else "DOMESTIC")
    if route=="BANK" and not bank.empty and t in bank.index:
        b=bank.loc[t]
        P(f"━━ {t} [BANK]  gate={b['gate']}")
        P(f"   Asset-quality: NPL {b['NPL']*100:.2f}% cov {b['coverage']*100:.0f}% CAR {(b['CAR']*100 if pd.notna(b['CAR']) else float('nan')):.0f}% | ROE {b['ROE']*100:.0f}% PB {b['PB']:.2f}")
        P(f"   Moat: {moat} [{mt}]   Runway/TAM: {run} [{tam}]")
        cards.append({"ticker":t,"route":"BANK","gate":b["gate"],"moat":moat,"runway":run}); P(""); continue
    # ENGINE
    machine=(pd.notna(ser["pct_ge1"]) and ser["pct_ge1"]>=0.6 and pd.notna(ser["cfo_np_med"]) and ser["cfo_np_med"]>=1 and ser["cash_grow"])
    runway_ok=(pd.notna(ser["asset_cagr"]) and ser["asset_cagr"]>0.03); roic_ok=(pd.notna(s["roic5y"]) and s["roic5y"]>=12)
    engine="COMPOUNDER" if (roic_ok and runway_ok) else ("YIELD" if (machine and not runway_ok) else ("LOWROIC_GROWTH" if (runway_ok and not roic_ok) else ("CASH_COW" if machine else "-")))
    # VALUATION (compounder lens)
    peg=(s["PE"]/(s["np_yoy"]*100)) if (pd.notna(s["np_yoy"]) and s["np_yoy"]>0 and s["PE"]>0) else np.nan
    hist=(s["pe_z"]<-1) or (s["pb_z"]<-1); pegc=(0<peg<=1) if pd.notna(peg) else False; absc=(s["PE"]<10) or (s["PB"]<1.2)
    trap=(pd.notna(s["np_yoy"]) and s["np_yoy"]<-0.15); nl=sum([hist,pegc,absc])
    verdict=("VALUE_TRAP→event_check" if (trap and (hist or absc)) else "CHEAP_QUALITY" if nl>=2 else "CHEAP_1lens" if nl==1 else "NOT_CHEAP")
    cyc=f"  | commodity {COMMODITY_MAP[t]} pctile {comm.get(COMMODITY_MAP[t],float('nan')):.2f}" if route=="CYCLICAL" else ""
    P(f"━━ {t} [{route}]  {verdict}  (PE{s['PE']} pe_z{s['pe_z']:+.1f} PEG{peg:.2f} dd{fmtp(s['dd'])}){cyc}")
    P(f"   Engine: {engine}{'◆' if machine else ''}  (ROIC {fmtp(s['roic5y'],'%',1,False)}, asset-growth {fmtp(ser['asset_cagr'])}, dilut3y {fmtp(ser['dilut'])})")
    P(f"   Moat:   {moat} [{mt}]  (GPM {fmtp(gpm,'%',1,False)}, ROE {fmtp(roe,'%',1,False)})")
    P(f"   Margin-cycle: {mcyc} (GPM pctile {gp:.2f})" if pd.notna(gp) else f"   Margin-cycle: n/a")
    P(f"   Runway/TAM:   {run} [{tam}]  (rev CAGR {fmtp(rr)} vs prior {fmtp(rp)})")
    if t in EVENTS: P(f"   EVENT: {EVENTS[t]}")
    P("")
    cards.append({"ticker":t,"route":route,"verdict":verdict,"engine":f"{engine}{'◆' if machine else ''}","moat":moat,"moat_type":mt,"margin_cycle":mcyc,"runway":run,"tam":tam,"roic":s["roic5y"],"event":EVENTS.get(t,"")})
pd.DataFrame(cards).to_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","dna_cards.csv"),index=False)
P(f"[{len(cards)} cards | route coverage 100% via ICB-fallback]")
with open(os.path.join(W,"data","dna_cards.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
P("Saved data/dna_cards.{md,csv}")

lines: route="BANK" if sec==8 and (bank.empty or t in bank.index or s["ICB_Code"]==8355) else ("CYCLICAL" if t in COMMODITY_MAP else "COMPOUNDER")
moat="STRONG" if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18 and pd.notna(gpm) and gpm>=25) else ("WEAK/commodity" if (pd.notna(gpm) and gpm<15) or (pd.notna(roe) and roe<10) else "MODERATE")

content.text:
✅ **100% coverage đạt được** — DRC/DHC/FRT/PNJ giờ có card đầy đủ (route qua ICB fallback, mọi chiều tính trực tiếp). Và card **tự lộ ra chính xác** điểm bạn nói về 2 ví dụ mới:

## Validation 2 ví dụ mới (card "tố" đúng bản chất)

**DRC** [COMPOUNDER] CHEAP_QUALITY — nhưng:
- Moat **WEAK/commodity [NONE tire]** (GPM 15%, ROE 13%)
- **dilut3y +30%** (huy động vốn cho nhà máy mới) + runway MATURE/FLAT
→ Card lộ rõ: catalyst (nhà máy) đi kèm **pha loãng + moat yếu + biên mỏng** → đúng "không bền, rớt mạnh." ✅

**DHC** [COMPOUNDER◆ cash-machine] — nhưng:
- Moat MODERATE **[LOCATION South paper]** + **runway SATURATING** (rev CAGR **+26%→0%**!)
→ Card bắt đúng: moat vị trí (không hiện trên biên, tag thủ công) + **đã bão hòa** (tăng trưởng doanh thu sụp từ +26% về 0%). ✅ Đúng "giờ bão hòa, hết cơ hội."

## Vài card nổi bật
- **SCS** ⭐ hồ sơ đẹp nhất: STRONG moat (độc quyền cargo GPM 78%/ROE 47%) + COMPOUNDER + **DURABLE** + CHEAP + margin chưa căng (pctile 0.30)
- **FRT**: CAPTURING (rev +22% bền) nhưng ROIC 6% + dilut +44% + margin-PEAK → đang chiếm lĩnh nhưng chất lượng/độ-bền cần soi
- **VCS**: STRONG moat + matured runway + **MARGIN_BOTTOM** (upside hồi biên) — đa chiều
- **PNJ**: SATURATING + MARGIN_PEAK + dilut +56% → giảm tốc, biên đỉnh

## Hệ thống hoàn chỉnh

`dna_card.py` giờ **self-contained, 100% coverage**: thả mã BẤT KỲ vào → hồ sơ 8 chiều (ROUTE·VALUATION·ENGINE·CASH◆·MOAT·MARGIN-CYCLE·RUNWAY/TAM·EVENT), banks lấy NPL/CAR thật từ vnstock cache. Route qua ICB nên không cần mã nằm trong quality-universe.

Cập nhật memory:

Output 2026-05-31: ★GOLDEN (cheap_quality + COMPOUNDER engine, liquid) = DHA,HAH,LHG,NNC,NTP,PTB,SCS,TLG; ★★+strict-cash-machine◆ = HAH,PTB (HAH=cyclical shipping caveat). aiTitle: Review fundamental analysis for stock selection systems

content.text:
Đã lưu memory. 

## 🎯 Hoàn thành — hệ thống đánh giá cổ phiếu hoàn chỉnh

Bộ **DNA card self-contained** là capstone: thả bất kỳ mã VN nào vào → hồ sơ **8 chiều** đầy đủ, mỗi chiều sinh ra từ một insight thị trường của bạn trong phiên này:

| Chiều | Sinh từ insight |
|---|---|
| ROUTE (ICB) | "mỗi ngành một thước" |
| VALUATION (đa lăng kính) | GAS/FPT — "rẻ" phải tam giác hóa |
| ENGINE (runway×ROIC) | QTP vs VCS/DGC — máy tạo tiền + runway + ROIC |
| CASH-MACHINE◆ | "cỗ máy tạo tiền, không hút vốn" |
| MOAT | DRC vs VCS — catalyst × lợi thế cạnh tranh |
| MARGIN-CYCLE | BMP — consumer mua khi biên crushed |
| RUNWAY/TAM | export vô hạn vs nội địa S-curve bão hòa |
| EVENT | DGC — sự cố tạm thời, moat còn nguyên |

**Nguyên tắc cốt lõi đã validate xuyên suốt:** chất lượng/an toàn = GATE; "rẻ"/"bão hòa" đọc 2 chiều; mua khi sợ hãi/đáy (commodity đáy cho producer, biên đáy cho consumer, P/B thấp cho bank); catalyst cần MOAT để bền; giữ dài; đo per-pick không phải portfolio.

## Cách dùng lại
```
bank_lens_v3.py (vnstock NPL/CAR)  →  cash_machine_screen.py (engine)
  →  margin_cycle_detector.py  →  saturation_detector.py
  →  unified_screener.py (5-layer)  →  dna_card.py (8-dim profile/mã)
```

**Khoảng trống còn lại = DỮ LIỆU, không phải nhận thức:** giá P4/lưu huỳnh/% xuất khẩu (cần SunSirs/SMM/vnstock-segment trả phí). Framework thì đã đầy đủ.

Toàn bộ ~35 script + data CSVs + lý do từng bước nằm trong 3 file memory (`fa_layer_ic_audit_2026`, `qt_v4_eventstudy_2026`, `cyclical_commodity_framework_2026`).

Đây là một phiên nghiên cứu rất trọn vẹn — từ một câu hỏi "FA có nên research thêm không", qua việc loại bỏ các ngõ cụt (FA-alpha portfolio), đến việc reframe đúng (đo pick + đa khung theo ngành) và xây nên một **hệ đánh giá đa chiều nhận-biết-ngành** phản ánh đúng bản chất thị trường VN. Các insight của bạn (compounder, cyclical contrarian, cash machine, runway, moat, margin-cycle, event-override) là thứ định hình toàn bộ — cảm ơn bạn. 

Bạn muốn dừng ở đây, hay còn hướng nào nữa?

Based on the web search results, here's comprehensive information about the natural rubber supply deficit in 2026:

## 2026 Supply Deficit

The Association of Natural Rubber Producing Countries (ANRPC) forecasts a global deficit of nearly 400,000 tons of natural rubber in 2026, following a surplus in 2025, due to sustained demand exceeding limited supply growth. Projections indicate an annual deficit of up to 600,000–800,000 tons of natural rubber until 2028 if current trends continue. The projected shortfall would mark the sixth consecutive year of a global supply gap.

## Production Decline in Key Producing Nations

Thailand (the leading producer with 4.7 million tons), Indonesia, and Vietnam are struggling to ramp up production due to climate challenges (droughts in Southeast Asia) and aging plantations (yields down 15% since 2015). More specifically, Thailand, the leading supplier, is expected to see output remain flat, while Indonesia, the second-largest producer, is forecast to post a decline.

## Replanting Shortage

Supply growth continues to fall short of expectations due to unfavorable weather conditions, limited replanting of aging rubber trees, persistently low productivity among smallholders after years of depressed prices, and competition for land. A big investment happened during the early 2000s, and then later on, a long period of low prices, not much of reinvestment in the rejuvenation of the trees because the trees have a lifespan of 30 years. So the trees need to be replanted. So during that time period, the small farmers were not encouraged to replant the trees.

## Production vs. Demand Outlook

In 2025, global production reached 14.8 million tons compared to consumption of 14.5 million tons, but projections for 2026 anticipate 15.2 million tons produced (+2.4%) versus 15.6 million tons demanded (+1.7%), widening the gap.

content.text:
Web **xác nhận mạnh luận điểm của bạn** — và nó phơi bày một lỗ hổng thật trong cách tôi dùng percentile.

## ANRPC xác nhận: cao su đang THIẾU HỤT CẤU TRÚC, không phải đỉnh chu kỳ thường

- **Thâm hụt ~400,000 tấn năm 2026 — năm thứ 6 LIÊN TIẾP thiếu hụt**; dự báo 600-800k tấn/năm đến 2028.
- **Cung không thể tăng nhanh**: cây già (năng suất −15% từ 2015), vòng đời 30 năm, **giai đoạn giá thấp 2014-2020 → nông dân KHÔNG tái canh** → giờ thiếu cây cho mủ; hạn hán SE Á; **đất chuyển sang cây khác (sầu riêng) / KCN** — đúng y bạn nói.
- Thái Lan đi ngang, Indonesia giảm, VN chật vật. 2026: SX 15.2M vs cầu 15.6M.

## Bạn đúng — percentile của tôi có lỗ hổng nghiêm trọng

Percentile giả định **hồi quy về trung bình lịch sử**. Nhưng khi **đường cung dịch chuyển cấu trúc** (thiếu hụt 6 năm, cung phản ứng chậm vì cây cần 7 năm mới cho mủ), phân phối lịch sử **không còn hiệu lực** — giá có thể ở mức cao *dai dẳng* hoặc cao hơn. "95th percentile" trong một thị trường thiếu hụt cấu trúc **KHÔNG có nghĩa "sắp giảm"**.

Cộng thêm điểm oil của bạn: cao su tự nhiên cạnh tranh với **cao su tổng hợp (từ dầu)** → dầu cao = sàn giá cao su cao. Cost-anchor nâng sàn.

→ **Verdict "rubber 0.95 = AVOID-new late cycle" của tôi là SAI/quá đơn giản.** Với thiếu hụt cấu trúc + cung phản ứng chậm + sàn dầu, biên cao của DRI/PHR/DPR **có thể BỀN nhiều năm** → "cao nhưng ĐƯỢC HỖ TRỢ", không phải "đỉnh sắp sụp."

## Cần sửa framework: percentile × CẤU TRÚC cung-cầu

Đánh giá hàng hóa phải 2 lớp:
| | Percentile (vị trí chu kỳ) | + Overlay cấu trúc |
|---|---|---|
| Cao **+ cung sắp tăng** (phản ứng nhanh) | cyclical → revert → AVOID đúng | |
| Cao **+ thiếu hụt cấu trúc + cung chậm + sàn-dầu** | **BỀN → "cao nhưng hỗ trợ"** (cao su NAY) | không phải avoid |

Cao su có **lag cung dài nhất** (7 năm trưởng thành) → cung *genuinely* không ramp được → luận điểm của bạn vững hơn đa số hàng hóa khác.

## Nhưng cho tôi giữ kỷ luật — 3 đối trọng trung thực

1. **CẦU là biến swing.** Thâm hụt giả định cầu +1.7%/năm. Nếu **ô tô/lốp/Trung Quốc suy thoái** → cầu giảm → thâm hụt đóng lại → giá rớt *dù* cung hạn chế. Cung nâng SÀN, nhưng CẦU lái chu kỳ.
2. **Cổ phiếu đã chạy** (DRI +80% từ đáy). Kể cả rubber giữ cao, **cú re-rating dễ đã qua** — từ đây là "ăn earnings yield trên biên cao bền", KHÔNG phải nhân đôi lần nữa. Khác profile.
3. **"Thiếu hụt cấu trúc = cao mãi mãi" cũng là luận điểm quyến rũ ở MỌI đỉnh.** Nhưng ở cao su, track record 6 năm thâm hụt + lag vật lý 7 năm khiến nó *đáng tin hơn* phần lớn — tôi đồng ý đây là trường hợp thật, không phải wishful thinking.

## Đề xuất sửa framework

Thêm vào cyclical detector một **overlay cấu trúc**:
- **Cost-anchor**: theo dõi giá dầu (Brent) làm sàn cho cao su/nhựa/hóa dầu.
- **Supply-structure**: cân đối cung-cầu (ANRPC cho cao su, tương tự cho urê/thép) + tốc độ phản ứng cung (lag tái canh/xây nhà máy).
- **Reframe verdict**: "cao + thiếu hụt cấu trúc" = ELEVATED-SUPPORTED (giữ/được), không phải "avoid"; "cao + cung sắp tăng" = cyclical-peak (avoid).

→ Meta-lesson (lặp lại cả phiên): **tín hiệu thống kê (percentile/mean-reversion) mã hóa một prior sẽ VỠ khi cấu trúc dịch chuyển** — đúng chỗ kiến thức ngành của bạn (cung-cầu, lag tái canh, chuyển đổi đất) bắt được mà data-percentile bỏ sót.

Bạn muốn tôi (a) thêm overlay dầu + supply-structure vào cyclical detector (đổi verdict cao su từ AVOID → ELEVATED-SUPPORTED), hay (b) soi lại định giá DRI/PHR xem có đang định giá "biên-cao-mãi-mãi" (rủi ro) hay vẫn rẻ trên biên-cao-bền?

Nguồn: [ANRPC deficit 2026 ~400k tấn](https://www.ecofinagency.com/news-agriculture/2002-53129-natural-rubber-prices-set-to-rise-as-supply-gap-widens-to-400-000-tons), [ANRPC – nguyên nhân thiếu hụt từ nhiều thập kỷ](https://www.rubbernews.com/news/anrpc-factors-leading-natural-rubber-shortfall-go-back-decades), [Global rubber shortage 2026](https://www.capmad.com/agribusiness-en/global-rubber-shortage-prices-could-soar-in-2026/)

echo "=== Quarterly NP + GPM (lumpiness / margin) ===" && for tk in DRI PHR; do echo "-- $tk --"; bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id=[REDACTED] --format=csv "SELECT t.quarter, ROUND(t.Revenue_P0/1e9,0) Rev_bn, ROUND(t.NP_P0/1e9,0) NP_bn, ROUND(t.GPM_P0*100,1) GPM, ROUND(t.ROE_Trailing*100,1) ROE_tr FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS t WHERE t.ticker='$tk' AND t.time>='2022-06-01' ORDER BY t.time" 2>/dev/null; done

content.text:
Dữ liệu cho ra một bức tranh định giá **rất khác nhau** giữa hai mã — đúng như bạn phân biệt:

## DRI — thuần cao su: KHÔNG định giá "biên-cao-mãi-mãi", mà đang định giá DE-RATING

| | DRI |
|---|---|
| PE | **5.7** (pe_z **−1.3** = THẤP vs lịch sử của chính nó) |
| PB | 1.32 (pb_z +0.34) |
| ROE_Trailing | 10% (2022) → **25%** (2026Q1) — biên cao su kéo lên |

→ **Điểm mấu chốt:** PE 5.7 + pe_z −1.3 nghĩa là **thị trường đang trả bội số THẤP trên lợi nhuận CAO** = thị trường *hoài nghi biên cao su bền vững*, đang định giá một cú de-rating. Đây là **ngược với "peak-forever"** — DRI KHÔNG bị định giá đỉnh.

→ Hệ quả: **NẾU luận điểm thiếu-hụt-cấu-trúc của bạn đúng (cao su giữ cao)**, thì DRI ở PE 5.7 là **rẻ thật + có biên an toàn + upside re-rating**. Rủi ro "cyclical PE trap" chỉ xảy ra NẾU cao su đảo (cầu suy thoái). DRI = **đặt cược đòn bẩy thuần vào cao su giữ giá**, với bội số rẻ làm đệm. PB 1.32 / ROE 16-25% → rẻ cả trên biên thường lẫn biên cao.

## PHR — cao su + ĐẤT + KCN: phải định giá NAV/SOTP, KHÔNG phải PE

NP của PHR **cực lumpy** — các quý đột biến là **ghi nhận bồi thường đất** (chuyển đất cao su → KCN):

| Quý | NP (tỷ) | |
|---|---|---|
| 2022Q4 | **421** | ← comp windfall |
| 2023Q1 | 228 | ← comp |
| 2024Q4 | 224 | ← comp |
| 2025Q3 | 259 | ← comp |
| 2026Q1 | **279** | ← comp |
| (nền giữa các spike) | 65-150 | cao su + thuê KCN |

→ PE 13.1 / PB 2.02 (cao hơn DRI) vì thị trường định giá **optionality đất/KCN** mà DRI không có. **PE/PEG/biên đều VÔ NGHĨA với PHR** — đây là **công ty tài sản (asset play)**: giá trị = **quỹ đất cao su (Bình Dương/Bình Phước — vùng chuyển KCN đắt giá) + dòng thuê KCN (cổ phần NTC/Tân Bình/VSIP) + cao su**. Đất trên sổ ghi giá vốn → **giá thị trường cao hơn nhiều → NAV thực có thể vượt xa book** dù PB 2.02.

## Đúng phân biệt của bạn — 2 khung định giá khác nhau

| | DRI | PHR |
|---|---|---|
| Bản chất | Đòn bẩy thuần **giá cao su** | **Tài sản đất → KCN** (windfall lumpy + thuê định kỳ) + cao su |
| Định giá đúng | PE/PB trên biên-cao-bền (rẻ, PE 5.7) | **NAV/SOTP** (đất theo giá thị trường + annuity KCN + cao su) |
| Catalyst riêng | (không) | **Bồi thường đất** (pipeline VSIP III/NTC nhiều năm → đột biến LN ngắn hạn lặp lại) |
| Rủi ro | cao su đảo (cầu suy thoái) | timing bàn giao đất / FDI vào KCN |

## Lỗ hổng framework (lại một lần nữa)

Screener cơ học **xử lý sai PHR**: NP lumpy do bồi thường đất làm PE/PEG/biên/engine đều lệch → nó coi PHR là công ty vận hành, trong khi PHR là **asset-play/SOTP** (như holdco, công ty quỹ đất). → Cần thêm **flag "ASSET_PLAY/SOTP"**: khi NP lumpy + spike phi-vận-hành (đất/thoái vốn) + tài sản nặng → **định giá NAV, không phải bội số lợi nhuận**. Phát hiện qua: NP biến động mạnh + tương quan NP-doanh thu thấp + nhiều tài sản đất/đầu tư.

**Caveat trung thực:** NAV đất của PHR không lấy được từ BQ (ghi giá vốn) → cần ước tính ngoài/analyst; PE 13 có thể "đắt" trên vận hành nhưng "rẻ" trên NAV — không kết luận được nếu thiếu số liệu quỹ đất. DRI thì rõ hơn: rẻ trên cả hai cơ sở.

Lưu memory:

## Rubber STRUCTURAL deficit + DRI/PHR valuation (user challenge 2026-05-31) — percentile blind to structural shift
User challenge to "rubber 95th pctile=avoid": price depends on supply-demand + oil anchor, not mean-reversion. **VERIFIED (ANRPC)**: global NR deficit ~400k t 2026 = 6TH CONSECUTIVE YEAR; 600-800k/yr deficit to 2028; supply can't ramp (7-yr tree maturity, 30-yr lifespan, NO replanting during 2014-20 low-price years, yields −15% since 2015, land→durian/IP, SE-Asia drought). Rubber competes w/ oil-derived synthetic → high oil = price floor. → **percentile (mean-reversion prior) BREAKS under structural supply-curve shift; 95th-pctile in a structural deficit ≠ "about to revert".** FIX: commodity regime = percentile × STRUCTURAL overlay (supply-demand balance + cost-anchor[oil] + supply-response lag). Rubber NOW = ELEVATED-SUPPORTED (not avoid). Counterweight: DEMAND is swing (recession closes deficit despite tight supply); stock already re-rated (DRI +80%, now earnings-yield not re-rating); "structural=permanent" is the seductive peak-thesis but rubber's 6-yr record + physical lag make it credible.
**DRI vs PHR valuation**: DRI (pure rubber) PE 5.7/pe_z −1.3 = market pricing a DE-RATING (skeptical rubber sustains), NOT peak-forever → if deficit holds, cheap+re-rating upside; PB 1.32/ROE 16-25%=cheap both bases. Pure rubber-price leverage. **PHR ≠ DRI: it's an ASSET-PLAY** — lumpy NP spikes (421/228/224/259/279bn quarters) = LAND COMPENSATION (rubber land→IP conversion, multi-yr pipeline VSIP III/NTC) + recurring IP rental (NTC/Tân Bình stakes) + rubber. PE13/PB2.02 premium prices land/IP optionality; **PE/PEG/margin MISLEADING → value PHR on NAV/SOTP** (land at market >> book cost; +IP annuity). New framework gap: **ASSET_PLAY/SOTP flag** (lumpy non-operating NP / NP-revenue decorrelation / land-heavy → NAV not earnings-multiple) — screener mis-handles land-banks/holdcos as operating cos. PHR land-NAV not in BQ (cost basis) → needs external estimate.

## Framework template (for extending to steel/phosphorus/urea)

lines: Why some compounders sustain & others slow: **runway depends on TAM.** (1) EXPORT (DGC/VCS, global market ~unlimited) → durable runway → sustained multibagger; (2) DOMESTIC S-CURVE (MWG smartphones 2014-19, VNM 2007-15, FRT/Long Châu pharma 2022-now) → explosive during market-CAPTURE then SATURATES & slows sharply — buy in capture phase, recognize saturation; (3) DOMESTIC STRUCTURAL (HPG — developing-country infra/public-investment/urbanization) → long domestic runway b/c country itself grows. Refines engine/runway: asset-growth shows reinvestment but TAM shows whether runway STAYS open. Detect proxy: revenue-growth DURABILITY (sustained multi-yr CAGR=export/large-TAM; DECELERATING after long run=domestic saturation, 2nd-derivative of revenue) + manual EXPORT tag (or vnstock export%). DONE: `saturation_detector.py` (TTM revenue CAGR recent-3y vs prior-3y = accel; + manual EXPORT/STRUCTURAL tags). Validated: VNM=MATURE/FLAT ✓ (saturated post-2015), FRT=CAPTURING ✓ (Long Châu still capturing), MWG=MODERATE ✓ (post-capture), PNJ/MSN=SATURATING ✓. **KEY LIMITATION → must read 2D (trajectory × TAM tag)**: revenue-trajectory ALONE can't separate domestic-saturation from cyclical/event dip — DGC(−7% mine event), HPG(+12 vs +22 steel cycle), VCS misread as SATURATING/MATURE but are CYCLICAL not saturated. Correct reading: **EXPORT/STRUCTURAL + dip = cyclical (runway intact, dip=opportunity); DOMESTIC + decel-after-long-run = TRUE saturation (VNM/PNJ slow structurally); DOMESTIC CAPTURING = ride (FRT)**. TAM tag rescues detector from mislabeling cycle/event as saturation. Files: saturation_detector.py, data/saturation_detector.{md,csv}. EXPORT tag manual (BQ no export%; vnstock may have segment data — future).

+**DRI vs PHR valuation**: DRI (pure rubber) PE 5.7/pe_z −1.3 = market pricing a DE-RATING (skeptical rubber sustains), NOT peak-forever → if deficit holds, cheap+re-rating upside; PB 1.32/ROE 16-25%=cheap both bases. Signal = commodity at TROUGH (price < trailing-3Y median / low percentile) AND stock cheap (low PB) AND dislocated (deep dd, ideally CRISIS/BEAR) → buy; sell when commodity at peak / valuation rich. aiTitle: Review fundamental analysis for stock selection systems

content.text:
Đã lưu memory.

## Tóm lại — challenge của bạn phơi bày 2 lỗ hổng thật, và làm rõ DRI vs PHR

**(1) Cấu trúc cung-cầu > percentile:** ANRPC xác nhận cao su thiếu hụt **6 năm liên tiếp** + cung không ramp được (lag 7 năm, không tái canh 2014-20, đất chuyển sầu riêng/KCN) + sàn dầu → **percentile (giả định mean-reversion) VỠ khi đường cung dịch chuyển cấu trúc.** Cao su NAY = **ELEVATED-SUPPORTED, không phải "avoid"**. (Đối trọng: cầu vẫn là biến swing; cổ đã re-rate rồi.)

**(2) Định giá:**
- **DRI** = đòn bẩy thuần cao su; PE 5.7/pe_z −1.3 = thị trường định giá **DE-RATING** (hoài nghi biên bền), **KHÔNG phải peak-forever** → nếu thiếu hụt cấu trúc đúng thì **rẻ + upside**; rẻ trên cả PB lẫn biên thường.
- **PHR** = **asset-play** (đất cao su → KCN: windfall bồi thường lumpy + thuê KCN định kỳ + cao su) → **định giá NAV/SOTP, không phải PE**; PE/biên vô nghĩa. Đúng phân biệt của bạn — PHR có optionality đất mà DRI không có.

**2 refinement framework còn lại (đề xuất, chưa build):**
1. **Structural overlay** cho cyclical detector: thêm cost-anchor (Brent) + cờ supply-deficit → đổi verdict "cao + thiếu-hụt-cấu-trúc" = ELEVATED-SUPPORTED thay vì AVOID.
2. **Flag ASSET_PLAY/SOTP**: NP lumpy phi-vận-hành (đất/thoái vốn) + decorrelation NP-doanh-thu + tài sản đất nặng → định giá NAV, không bội số lợi nhuận (PHR, holdco, quỹ đất).

## Meta-theme của cả phiên (challenge này củng cố lần nữa)

**Mọi tín hiệu thống kê/cơ học đều mã hóa một prior sẽ vỡ khi cấu trúc dịch chuyển** — percentile (mean-reversion), PE (giả định earnings vận hành), engine (giả định runway tái đầu tư). Chính **kiến thức ngành + cấu trúc của bạn** (cung-cầu cao su, đất PHR, sự cố DGC, moat DRC, biên BMP) là lớp phủ mà data thuần không có. Hệ thống đa-khung + DNA card của chúng ta hoạt động tốt *vì* nó để chỗ cho các overlay đó (event-check, special-situation, structural).

Bạn muốn tôi build 2 refinement trên (structural overlay + asset-play flag) để khép kín, hay dừng ở đây? Cả hai đều đã ghi nhận trong memory để tiếp nối.

attachment.snippet:
1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	"""
3	bank_lens_v2.py — bank screen with REAL ratios from vnstock (VCI)
4\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
5	Upgrades bank_valuation_lens.py from BQ-proxies (ROE_Min, OwnEq_Cap) to REAL
6	bank metrics: NPL, coverage (LLR/NPL), CAR, NIM, CIR, CASA, loan growth.
7	Five bank-correct axes (percentile-ranked within the bank universe):
8	  Asset quality : low NPL + high coverage
9	  Capital       : high CAR (annual report)
10	  Profitability : high NIM + low CIR + high CASA (cheap funding moat)
11	  Valuation     : ROE/PB (earnings yield on book — cheap-for-quality) + PB-vs-ROE residual
12	  Growth        : loan growth
13	Composite = quality(asset+capital+profit) + value; flag red (high NPL / low CAR / low coverage).
14	Pulls latest QUARTER for NPL/NIM/CASA/CIR/coverage/loanG/ROE/PB; latest ANNUAL for CAR.
15	Output: data/bank_lens_v2.md + .csv
16	"""
17	import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
18	import sys, logging
19	try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
20	except Exception: pass
21	logging.disable(logging.CRITICAL)  # silence vnstock network warnings
22	import os, time
23	import numpy as np, pandas as pd
24	from vnstock import Vnstock
25	WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
26	BANKS=["VCB","BID","CTG","TCB","MBB","ACB","VPB","VIB","HDB","STB","SHB","TPB","MSB","OCB","LPB","EIB","NAB","SSB"]
27	C_NIM="Net Interest Margin"; C_NPL="Non-performing Loan Ratio"; C_CAR="Capital Adequacy Ratio"
28	C_CASA="CASA Ratio"; C_COV="Loan Loss Reserves to NPLs"; C_CIR="Cost to Income Ratio"
29	C_LG="Loans Growth"; C_ROE="ROE (%)"; C_PB="P/B"
30	
31	def pull(tk, retries=3):
32	    for attempt in range(retries):
33	        try:
34	            df=Vnstock().stock(symbol=tk, source="VCI").finance.ratio(period="quarter", lang="en", dropna=False)
35	            df=df.copy()
36	            # flatten MultiIndex + DEDUPE columns (vnstock returns dup "Cost to Income Ratio")
37	            df.columns=[c if isinstance(c,str) else c[-1] for c in df.columns]
38	            df=df.loc[:, ~pd.Index(df.columns).duplicated()]
39	            break
40	        except Exception as e:
41	            if attempt==retries-1: print(f"  [skip {tk}] {repr(e)[:70]}"); return None
42	            time.sleep(4)
43	    try:
44	        q=df[df["lengthReport"].isin([1,2,3,4])].sort_values(["yearReport","lengthReport"])
45	        ann=df[df["lengthReport"]==5].sort_values("yearReport")
46	        if len(q)==0: return None
47	        last=q.iloc[-1]
48	        car=np.nan
49	        if len(ann) and C_CAR in ann.columns:
50	            carv=ann[ann[C_CAR]>0][C_CAR]
51	            car=carv.iloc[-1] if len(carv) else np.nan
52	        g=lambda c: last[c] if c in last.index and pd.notna(last[c]) else np.nan
53	        return {"ticker":tk,"yr":int(last["yearReport"]),"q":int(last["lengthReport"]),
54	            "NIM":g(C_NIM),"NPL":g(C_NPL),"CAR":car,"CASA":g(C_CASA),
55	            "coverage":abs(g(C_COV)),"CIR":abs(g(C_CIR)),"loanG":g(C_LG),
56	            "ROE":g(C_ROE),"PB":g(C_PB)}
57	    except Exception as e:
58	        print(f"  [skip {tk}] {repr(e)[:80]}"); return None
59	
60	rows=[]
61	for i,tk in enumerate(BANKS):
62	    r=pull(tk)
63	    if r:
64	        rows.append(r)
65	        print(f"  {tk}: NPL={r['NPL']*100:.2f}% CAR={(r['CAR']*100 if pd.notna(r['CAR']) else float('nan')):.1f}% NIM={r['NIM']*100:.2f}% ROE={r['ROE']*100:.1f}% PB={r['PB']:.2f}", flush=True)
66	    if i<len(BANKS)-1: time.sleep(3)  # pace requests to avoid reset/rate-limit
67	df=pd.DataFrame(rows)
68	if len(df)==0:
69	    print("\nNO DATA pulled (network/DNS to VCI unavailable). Try again later or via a networked host."); sys.exit(0)
70	df.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","bank_lens_v2_raw.csv"),index=False)
71	print(f"\n[pulled {len(df)}/{len(BANKS)} banks]")
72	
73	# percentile ranks (higher=better); invert NPL & CIR
74	def rk(s,asc=True): return s.rank(pct=True) if asc else (1-s.rank(pct=True))
75	df["q_assetq"]=(rk(df["NPL"],asc=False)+rk(df["coverage"]))/2
76	df["q_capital"]=rk(df["CAR"])
77	df["q_profit"]=(rk(df["NIM"])+rk(df["CIR"],asc=False)+rk(df["CASA"]))/3
78	df["roe_pb"]=df["ROE"]/df["PB"]
79	# PB-vs-ROE residual (cheap-for-ROE)
80	d=df.dropna(subset=["PB","ROE"]); b=np.polyfit(d["ROE"],d["PB"],1)
81	df["pb_resid"]=df["PB"]-(b[0]*df["ROE"]+b[1])
82	df["q_value"]=(rk(df["roe_pb"])+rk(df["pb_resid"],asc=False))/2
83	df["q_growth"]=rk(df["loanG"])
84	df["QUALITY"]=df[["q_assetq","q_capital","q_profit"]].mean(axis=1)
85	df["SCORE"]=0.6*df["QUALITY"]+0.4*df["q_value"]
86	df["red_flag"]=np.where((df["NPL"]>0.03)|(df["coverage"]<0.7)|((df["CAR"]<0.09)&df["CAR"].notna()),"⚠","")
87	df=df.sort_values("SCORE",ascending=False)
88	
89	lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
90	P("# Bank lens v2 — REAL ratios (vnstock/VCI), latest quarter")
91	P(f"universe {len(df)} banks | value fit PB≈{b[0]:.3f}·ROE+{b[1]:.2f}")
92	P("")
93	P(f"{'tkr':<5}{'NPL%':>6}{'cov%':>6}{'CAR%':>6}{'NIM%':>6}{'CIR%':>6}{'CASA%':>6}{'loanG%':>7}{'ROE%':>6}{'PB':>5}{'ROE/PB':>7}{'SCORE':>6} flag")
94	P("-"*84)
95	for _,r in df.iterrows():
96	    P(f"{r['ticker']:<5}{r['NPL']*100:>6.2f}{r['coverage']*100:>6.0f}"
97	      f"{(r['CAR']*100 if pd.notna(r['CAR']) else float('nan')):>6.1f}{r['NIM']*100:>6.2f}{r['CIR']*100:>6.0f}"
98	      f"{r['CASA']*100:>6.0f}{r['loanG']*100:>+7.1f}{r['ROE']*100:>6.1f}{r['PB']:>5.2f}{r['roe_pb']*100 if r['roe_pb']<1 else r['roe_pb']:>7.1f}{r['SCORE']:>6.2f} {r['red_flag']}")
99	P("")
100	P("Top-quality (asset+capital+profit): "+", ".join(df.sort_values('QUALITY',ascending=False).head(6)['ticker']))
101	P("Cheapest-for-ROE (value): "+", ".join(df.sort_values('q_value',ascending=False).head(6)['ticker']))
102	P("Best combined (0.6 quality + 0.4 value): "+", ".join(df.head(6)['ticker']))
103	P("Red flags (NPL>3% | coverage<70% | CAR<9%): "+", ".join(df[df['red_flag']!='']['ticker'].tolist() or ['none']))
104	P("")
105	P("Note: CAR = latest ANNUAL (quarterly not disclosed). coverage/CIR sign-corrected. Real vnstock data.")
106	df.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","bank_lens_v2.csv"),index=False)
107	with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","bank_lens_v2.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
108	P("Saved data/bank_lens_v2.{md,csv}")

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
asset_play_detector.py — flag ASSET-PLAY / SOTP companies (value on NAV, not PE)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
User insight (PHR): land-bank → IP conversion gives LUMPY land-compensation NP
spikes (non-operating) + recurring IP rental → earnings multiples (PE/PEG/margin)
MISLEAD; value on NAV/sum-of-parts instead. Screener mishandles land-banks/holdcos
as operating companies.
Data proxies (BQ): (1) NP↔Revenue correlation LOW (NP driven by non-operating items,
not sales); (2) NP lumpiness HIGH (CV); (3) asset-heavy (low asset turnover = Rev/Assets).
Flag ASSET_PLAY when all three → "value on NAV not earnings-multiple".
Validates PHR (should flag) vs DRI (pure-operating rubber, should NOT). Output: data/asset_play.csv + .md
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"; BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
W=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
def bq(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try: r=subprocess.run(f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=2000000',capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=300,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

# universe: quality names + land/IP/RE + commodity + validation pair
fa=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"fa_ratings_lh.csv")).sort_values(["ticker","quarter"])
fa["is_ab"]=fa["tier"].isin(["A","B"]).astype(int); fa["qn"]=fa.groupby("ticker").cumcount()+1
fa["pct_AB"]=fa.groupby("ticker")["is_ab"].cumsum()/fa["qn"]*100
last=fa.groupby("ticker").tail(1)
univ=sorted(set(last[(last["pct_AB"]>=70)&(last["qn"]>=12)&(last["tier"].isin(["A","B"]))]["ticker"])
            | {"PHR","DRI","DPR","IDC","SIP","KBC","NTC","D2D","TIP","SZC","BCM","DXG","NLG","KDH"})
tks="','".join(univ)
df=bq(f"""SELECT t.ticker,t.time,t.NP_P0,t.Revenue_P0,t.totalAsset_P0
FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.time>='2015-01-01' ORDER BY t.ticker,t.time""")
df["time"]=pd.to_datetime(df["time"])

rows=[]
for tk,g in df.groupby("ticker"):
    g=g.sort_values("time")
    npv=g["NP_P0"].dropna(); rev=g["Revenue_P0"]
    if len(npv)<12: continue
    pair=g.dropna(subset=["NP_P0","Revenue_P0"])
    corr=pair["NP_P0"].corr(pair["Revenue_P0"]) if len(pair)>=10 else np.nan
    np_cv=npv.std()/abs(npv.mean()) if npv.mean()!=0 else np.nan
    ttm_rev=rev.rolling(4).sum(); ta=g["totalAsset_P0"]
    turn=(ttm_rev/ta).dropna().median()   # asset turnover (low = asset-heavy)
    # ASSET_PLAY: NP decoupled from revenue + lumpy + asset-heavy
    score=sum([ (pd.notna(corr) and corr<0.35), (pd.notna(np_cv) and np_cv>0.6), (pd.notna(turn) and turn<0.5) ])
    flag="ASSET_PLAY" if score>=2 and (pd.notna(turn) and turn<0.7) else ("partial" if score>=2 else "")
    rows.append({"ticker":tk,"np_rev_corr":corr,"np_cv":np_cv,"asset_turn":turn,"flags":score,"verdict":flag})
res=pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values(["verdict","asset_turn"])

lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
P("# ASSET-PLAY / SOTP detector — value on NAV, not earnings-multiple")
P("proxies: NP↔Rev corr LOW (non-operating NP) + NP CV HIGH (lumpy) + asset-turn LOW (asset-heavy)")
P("")
P(f"{'tkr':<6}{'NP-Rev corr':>12}{'NP CV':>7}{'assetTurn':>10}{'flags':>6}  verdict")
P("-"*52)
for _,r in res[res["verdict"]!=""].iterrows():
    P(f"{r['ticker']:<6}{r['np_rev_corr']:>+12.2f}{r['np_cv']:>7.2f}{r['asset_turn']:>10.2f}{int(r['flags']):>6}  {r['verdict']}")
P("")
P("ASSET_PLAY (value on NAV/SOTP): "+", ".join(res[res['verdict']=='ASSET_PLAY']['ticker'].tolist() or ['none']))
P("")
P("## Validation PHR vs DRI")
for tk in ["PHR","DRI","DPR"]:
    r=res[res["ticker"]==tk]
    if len(r): rr=r.iloc[0]; P(f"  {tk}: NP-Rev corr {rr['np_rev_corr']:+.2f}, NP CV {rr['np_cv']:.2f}, assetTurn {rr['asset_turn']:.2f} → {rr['verdict'] or 'operating (PE ok)'}")
P("  → PHR = ASSET_PLAY (land-comp NP decoupled from rubber rev) → NAV; DRI = operating rubber (NP tracks rev) → PE/PB ok")
P("")
P("Caveat: proxy only; true NAV (land at market) needs external estimate; flags land-banks/IP/holdcos/RE.")
res.to_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","asset_play.csv"),index=False)
with open(os.path.join(W,"data","asset_play.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
P("Saved data/asset_play.{md,csv}")

content.text: Brent **103.69 (03/2026)** — dầu spike (Trung Đông) → **nâng sàn cao su/tổng hợp** (hỗ trợ producer) NHƯNG **ép biên consumer nhựa** (BMP đỉnh biên + dầu lên → sẽ nén — khớp margin-cycle!). Build structural overlay với Brent embedded:

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
cyclical_structural.py — STRUCTURAL overlay for the cyclical detector (2026-05-31)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
User challenge: a high commodity PERCENTILE ≠ "about to revert" when the SUPPLY CURVE
has structurally shifted (rubber: 6-yr ANRPC deficit, 7-yr replant lag, land conversion)
or a high COST ANCHOR (oil) holds the floor. Percentile encodes mean-reversion; it
breaks under structural shifts. Fix: commodity regime = PERCENTILE × STRUCTURE × COST-ANCHOR.
  high pctile + DEFICIT/long-supply-lag/high-oil → ELEVATED-SUPPORTED (earnings sustain, NOT avoid)
  high pctile + RESPONSIVE/ample supply          → cyclical-peak AVOID-new (reverts)
  low  pctile (any)                              → BUY-zone (cheap commodity)
Brent embedded (cost anchor for oil-linked: rubber↔synthetic, PVC, urea↔gas).
Output: data/brent_monthly.csv, data/cyclical_structural.{md,csv}
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
W=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
# STRUCTURE per commodity (manual, from ANRPC/research) + oil-linkage
STRUCTURE={
 "rubber":  ("DEFICIT","6yr ANRPC deficit, 7yr replant lag, land→durian/IP, oil-anchored synthetic", True),
 "iron_ore":("RESPONSIVE","China-demand driven, major miners can ramp → not structurally tight", False),
 "urea":    ("AMPLE/soft","gas-anchored, broadly adequate, corrected −35%/mo", True),
 "dap":     ("BALANCED","phosphate chain, no acute structural deficit", False)}
COMMODITY_MAP={"DRI":"rubber","PHR":"rubber","DPR":"rubber","GVR":"rubber","TRC":"rubber","HRC":"rubber",
 "HPG":"iron_ore","HSG":"iron_ore","NKG":"iron_ore","SMC":"iron_ore","POM":"iron_ore","DCM":"urea","DPM":"urea",
 "DDV":"dap","LAS":"dap","DGC":"dap","CSV":"dap"}
BRENT="""2016-04,42.25;2016-12,54.07;2017-12,64.21;2018-10,80.47;2018-12,56.46;2019-12,65.85;2020-04,23.34;2020-12,49.87;2021-06,73.07;2021-12,74.31;2022-03,115.59;2022-06,120.08;2022-12,80.90;2023-06,74.89;2023-12,77.86;2024-06,82.56;2024-12,73.83;2025-04,67.75;2025-08,68.20;2025-12,62.72;2026-01,66.77;2026-02,71.11;2026-03,103.69"""
# (compact anchor set; full 120-mo series fetched separately — pctile computed on these monthly anchors)
br=pd.DataFrame([p.split(",") for p in BRENT.split(";")],columns=["m","p"]); br["p"]=br["p"].astype(float)
br.to_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","brent_monthly.csv"),index=False)
oil_now=br["p"].iloc[-1]; oil_pct=(br["p"]<=oil_now).mean()

def commodity_pct(c):
    try:

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
cyclical_structural.py — STRUCTURAL overlay for the cyclical detector (2026-05-31)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
User challenge: a high commodity PERCENTILE ≠ "about to revert" when the SUPPLY CURVE
has structurally shifted (rubber: 6-yr ANRPC deficit, 7-yr replant lag, land conversion)
or a high COST ANCHOR (oil) holds the floor. Percentile encodes mean-reversion; it
breaks under structural shifts. Fix: commodity regime = PERCENTILE × STRUCTURE × COST-ANCHOR.
  high pctile + DEFICIT/long-supply-lag/high-oil → ELEVATED-SUPPORTED (earnings sustain, NOT avoid)
  high pctile + RESPONSIVE/ample supply          → cyclical-peak AVOID-new (reverts)
  low  pctile (any)                              → BUY-zone (cheap commodity)
Brent embedded (cost anchor for oil-linked: rubber↔synthetic, PVC, urea↔gas).
Output: data/brent_monthly.csv, data/cyclical_structural.{md,csv}
"""

import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass

 "iron_ore":("RESPONSIVE","China-demand driven, major miners can ramp → not structurally tight", False),
 "urea":    ("AMPLE/soft","gas-anchored, broadly adequate, corrected −35%/mo", True),
 "dap":     ("BALANCED","phosphate chain, no acute structural deficit", False)}
COMMODITY_MAP={"DRI":"rubber","PHR":"rubber","DPR":"rubber","GVR":"rubber","TRC":"rubber","HRC":"rubber",
 "HPG":"iron_ore","HSG":"iron_ore","NKG":"iron_ore","SMC":"iron_ore","POM":"iron_ore","DCM":"urea","DPM":"urea",
 "DDV":"dap","LAS":"dap","DGC":"dap","CSV":"dap"}
BRENT="""2016-04,42.25;2016-12,54.07;2017-12,64.21;2018-10,80.47;2018-12,56.46;2019-12,65.85;2020-04,23.34;2020-12,49.87;2021-06,73.07;2021-12,74.31;2022-03,115.59;2022-06,120.08;2022-12,80.90;2023-06,74.89;2023-12,77.86;2024-06,82.56;2024-12,73.83;2025-04,67.75;2025-08,68.20;2025-12,62.72;2026-01,66.77;2026-02,71.11;2026-03,103.69"""

br=pd.DataFrame([p.split(",") for p in BRENT.split(";")],columns=["m","p"]); br["p"]=br["p"].astype(float)
br.to_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","brent_monthly.csv"),index=False)
oil_now=br["p"].iloc[-1]; oil_pct=(br["p"]<=oil_now).mean()

✅ **Cả 2 refinement đã tích hợp vào unified_screener** — và verdict giờ phản ánh đúng 2 challenge của bạn:

## CYCLICAL — verdict mới (structural overlay)

| Mã | Verdict cũ | **Verdict mới** | Badge |
|---|---|---|---|
| **DRI/GVR/HRC/TRC** | AVOID-new (0.95 late cycle) | **ELEVATED-SUPPORTED(DEFICIT)** → HOLD/selective | |
| **PHR / DPR** | AVOID-new | **ELEVATED-SUPPORTED(DEFICIT)** | **ASSET_PLAY→NAV** ◆ |
| **DCM / DPM** (urê) | — | **cmdty_PEAK(AMPLE/soft)** → AVOID-new (reverts) | |
| NKG/SMC/POM (thép) | TROUGH_BUY | TROUGH_BUY (iron-ore rẻ) | |

**Phân biệt chính xác giờ đã có:**
- **Cao su 0.95 → KHÔNG còn "avoid"** mà "ELEVATED-SUPPORTED" (thiếu hụt cấu trúc 6 năm + lag 7 năm + sàn dầu $104) → biên cao **có thể bền** → HOLD/selective, không bán mù. *(rủi ro = cầu suy thoái)*
- **Urê 0.90 → VẪN "AVOID-new"** vì AMPLE/soft + đang điều chỉnh (không có hỗ trợ cấu trúc) — overlay phân biệt được "cao có đỡ" (rubber) vs "cao chu kỳ sắp sụp" (urea).
- **PHR/DPR** = ELEVATED-SUPPORTED **+ ASSET_PLAY→NAV** (cao su + quỹ đất → KCN, định giá NAV không phải PE); **DRI** = operating thuần (PE/PB ok, không asset-play). Đúng phân biệt của bạn.

## Insight cross-detector (chỉ thấy khi gộp)

Dầu $104 (pctile 0.91) là **lưỡi dao 2 lưỡi**: nâng sàn cao su (producer DRI/PHR thắng) NHƯNG **ép biên consumer nhựa** → BMP (đang MARGIN_PEAK) + dầu lên = **biên sắp nén** — margin-cycle + structural overlay cùng cảnh báo BMP một lúc.

lines: User challenge to "rubber 95th pctile=avoid": price depends on supply-demand + oil anchor, not mean-reversion. **VERIFIED (ANRPC)**: global NR deficit ~400k t 2026 = 6TH CONSECUTIVE YEAR; 600-800k/yr deficit to 2028; supply can't ramp (7-yr tree maturity, 30-yr lifespan, NO replanting during 2014-20 low-price years, yields −15% since 2015, land→durian/IP, SE-Asia drought). Rubber competes w/ oil-derived synthetic → high oil = price floor. → **percentile (mean-reversion prior) BREAKS under structural supply-curve shift; 95th-pctile in a structural deficit ≠ "about to revert".** FIX: commodity regime = percentile × STRUCTURAL overlay (supply-demand balance + cost-anchor[oil] + supply-response lag). Rubber NOW = ELEVATED-SUPPORTED (not avoid). Counterweight: DEMAND is swing (recession closes deficit despite tight supply); stock already re-rated (DRI +80%, now earnings-yield not re-rating); "structural=permanent" is the seductive peak-thesis but rubber's 6-yr record + physical lag make it credible.

**DRI vs PHR valuation**: DRI (pure rubber) PE 5.7/pe_z −1.3 = market pricing a DE-RATING (skeptical rubber sustains), NOT peak-forever → if deficit holds, cheap+re-rating upside; PB 1.32/ROE 16-25%=cheap both bases. Pure rubber-price leverage. **PHR ≠ DRI: it's an ASSET-PLAY** — lumpy NP spikes (421/228/224/259/279bn quarters) = LAND COMPENSATION (rubber land→IP conversion, multi-yr pipeline VSIP III/NTC) + recurring IP rental (NTC/Tân Bình stakes) + rubber. PE13/PB2.02 premium prices land/IP optionality; **PE/PEG/margin MISLEADING → value PHR on NAV/SOTP** (land at market >> book cost; +IP annuity). New framework gap: **ASSET_PLAY/SOTP flag** (lumpy non-operating NP / NP-revenue decorrelation / land-heavy → NAV not earnings-multiple) — screener mis-handles land-banks/holdcos as operating cos. PHR land-NAV not in BQ (cost basis) → needs external estimate.

Signal = commodity at TROUGH (price < trailing-3Y median / low percentile) AND stock cheap (low PB) AND dislocated (deep dd, ideally CRISIS/BEAR) → buy; sell when commodity at peak / valuation rich. Use PB not PE (cyclical PE trap: low PE at peak earnings = sell signal). Next: ingest historical series for steel HRC (SunSirs China), phosphorus (SunSirs), urea (TradingEconomics/IndexMundi) and repeat the event study. Đã lưu. 

## Hoàn thành 2 refinement (đã build + validate + wire vào screener)

**1. Structural overlay** — `cyclical_structural.py`: percentile × cấu trúc cung × cost-anchor dầu. Sửa đúng lỗ hổng bạn chỉ ra: rubber 0.95 không còn bị "avoid" mù mà thành **ELEVATED-SUPPORTED** (thiếu hụt cấu trúc + sàn dầu); urê vẫn AVOID (ample/soft). Brent embedded ($104 = 2 lưỡi: đỡ rubber, ép nhựa).

**2. Asset-play detector** — `asset_play_detector.py`: NP-Rev decorrelation + lumpy + asset-heavy → NAV. Validate PHR=ASSET_PLAY / DRI=operating (đúng phân biệt của bạn) + bắt cụm KCN/BĐS.

Cả hai **đã wire vào unified_screener** → verdict mới chính xác.

## Tổng kết — hệ thống giờ có ~10 chiều, mỗi chiều từ một challenge/insight của bạn

Và mỗi lần bạn challenge, nó lại lộ ra **cùng một meta-lesson**: *mọi tín hiệu thống kê/cơ học mã hóa một prior sẽ vỡ khi cấu trúc dịch chuyển* —
- percentile → vỡ khi cung dịch chuyển cấu trúc (rubber deficit) → cần structural overlay
- PE/earnings-multiple → vỡ với asset-play (PHR land comp) → cần NAV lens
- mean-reversion margin → cần pricing-power/moat (BMP vs DRC)
- reported NP → cần event-check (DGC)

Chính kiến thức ngành + cấu trúc của bạn là lớp phủ mà data thuần không có — và hệ thống được thiết kế để *để chỗ* cho các overlay đó (manual tags: STRUCTURE, MOAT_TYPE, EVENTS, EXPORT).

**Còn 1 việc nhỏ để khép kín 100%:** propagate 2 CSV mới (cyclical_structural + asset_play) vào **dna_card.py** để mỗi card cũng hiện structural-verdict + ASSET_PLAY flag (hiện DNA card đã có cyclical pctile nhưng chưa có structural/asset-play). 

Bạn muốn tôi propagate nốt vào DNA card cho đồng bộ hoàn toàn, hay dừng ở đây? Tất cả (~38 script + data + lý do) đã nằm trong 3 file memory.
